Private Sub btnChange_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnChange.Click

        If Data_From_Extractor = False Then
            ' Get current state before changing
            Dim currentState As Boolean = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel
            Dim fromText As String = If(currentState, "Panel", "No Panel")
            Dim toText As String = If(currentState, "No Panel", "Panel")

            ' Ask for confirmation
            Dim confirmMessage As String = $"Are you sure you want to change from '{fromText}' to '{toText}'?"
            Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(confirmMessage, "Confirm Change", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)

            If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = False
                Else
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True
                End If

                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                    lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel
                Else
                    lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

﻿Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.Net.Mail
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Media
Imports System.Data.Odbc
'Imports Microsoft.Office.Core
'Imports Microsoft.Office.Interop
Imports System.IO.Ports
Imports System.Data.SqlClient

Public Class frm_SMT
#Region "Variables globales"
    'x = Valor de tiempo de espera de ultima tablilla
    Dim x As Integer

    'IsOpenDT = Determina si esta abierta la forma de DownTime
    Public IsOpenDT As Boolean

    'changesMade = Determina si se puede cerrar o no la forma
    Public changesMade As Integer = 1

    'Valores por default para defectos: Departamento 1 es operaciones. Defecto -1 es ninguno.
    Public selectedDefectCode As Integer = -1
    Public DefectCodeName As String = ""
    Public DefectDepartment As Integer = 1

    'Player = almacena el sonido para las alertas de duplicados
    Private Player As SoundPlayer = New SoundPlayer(My.Resources._8bit)

    Dim dt_plexvs As Boolean = 1

    Dim DB9_Conection_Stage As String = "EMPTY"
    Dim escanead_correcto As Boolean = False
    Dim estuvo_mal As Boolean = False '2020-01-26 EM: USE TO CATCH BAD BOARD FROM AOI...

    '2020-03-09 EM: TO blink
    Dim Blink_bom As Boolean = False
    Dim Blink_Bom_Status As Boolean = False

    '2020-10-13 EM: Timer to lock load 
    Dim date_timer As DateTime = DateTime.Now()

    Dim AutoscanType As Integer = 1

    Dim stenciltimer As Integer = 0

#End Region

    'Dim ticjets
    Dim haveticket As Boolean = True
    Dim haveticket_color As Boolean = False
    Dim back_color As Color = Color.WhiteSmoke
    Dim back_font As Color = Color.Black

    Private Sub fm_Index_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        'LOAD VALUES FROM SELECTION 1
        'ExFunctions.SelectedGet(1)

        ' Este maximizada
        'Me.WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized

        lblDate.Text = DateString.ToString

        lblVersionSoftware.Text = ExData.SOFTWAREVERSION

        ExFunctions.ByHour(Data_History, ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)

        txtArea.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName

        txtStation.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.StationName

        ' Cargar datos de la estacion
        Me.Text = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='CompanyName'") & " - " & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName & " - " & ExData.Selected_Area.StationName


        ' Cargar datos del modelo
        lbl_modelsel.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber & " Lado " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & ExFunctions.GetLetter(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinID, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinText)

        If IO.File.Exists(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.modelpic) Then
            Dim foto As Image = Image.FromFile(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.modelpic)
            pbx_model.Image = foto
        Else
            pbx_model.Image = My.Resources.sin_imagen
        End If

        ' Calcular tiempo desde la ultima pieza
        Dim a As DateTime = DateTime.Now() : Dim b As DateTime = ExData.Selected_Area.LastPiece
        Dim diff = a - b : x = diff.TotalSeconds : tmr_DownTime.Start()

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 10000 Then
            lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "00000") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "00000")
        ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 1000 Then
            lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "0000") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "0000")
        ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 100 Then
            lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "000") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "000")
        ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 10 Then
            lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "00") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "00")
        Else
            lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "0") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "0")
        End If

        pbar.Minimum = 0
        pbar.Maximum = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal Then
            pbar.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal
        Else
            pbar.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
        End If

        lblBoxTotal.Text = "/" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal
        lblBoxCount.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
        lblPlaced.Text = CalculatePickAndPlace()

        'Shift  Selected

        'Cargar lista de ultimos seriales
        Data_lastserials.DataSource = ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials
        Data_lastserials.Sort(Data_lastserials.Columns("Hora"), System.ComponentModel.ListSortDirection.Descending)
        Data_lastserials.AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        If Data_lastserials.RowCount > 0 Then
            Data_lastserials.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = 0
        End If

        ColorearSeriales()

        ' Cargar tupo

        Dim dtAutoscanType As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [TypeID] FROM [Part_Operation_SMT_ICTInline_Conveyor_Type] WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main & "'")

        If dtAutoscanType.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            AutoscanType = dtAutoscanType.Rows(0).Item(0)
        End If

        ' Cargar modelo
        ExFunctions.aioptions(ddlAssemblyProcess, btnAssemblyInstruction, ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side)

        ' Iniciar contador de ultima pieza
        selectedDefectCode = ExData.DEF_DefaultDefectCode
        IsOpenDT = False

        'Label5.Visible = False

        lblCustomer.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerName
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType = 2 Then
            lbl_job.Text = "KB " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber
        Else
            lbl_job.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber
        End If

        lblStd1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_StandarQty

        lbl_job.Text = lbl_job.Text & " [" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Inventario_Disponible & "]"

        lblBinName.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinText

        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
            lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel
        Else
            lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
        End If

        ddlAssemblyProcess.DisplayMember = "ProcessName"
        ddlAssemblyProcess.ValueMember = "AutoID"
        ddlAssemblyProcess.DataSource = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Process

        'Formato de tabla
        Dim SerialesConDefecto As New DataTable
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("Serial", GetType(System.String))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("TrnDate", GetType(System.DateTime))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("IsPanel", GetType(System.Boolean))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("Malas", GetType(System.Int32))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("Seleccion", GetType(System.Int32))

        ExData.SerialesDefectuosos = SerialesConDefecto
        ExData.SerialesDefectuosos.Clear()

        'If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main_ManualPlexTransactions Then

        'Else
        'End If

        txt_pendientes1.Enabled = True

        If Data_From_Extractor = False Then
            If ExData.aoi_data Then

                tabControl.SelectedIndex = 1

                'Try review if requiere extractor
                Dim dt_extractors_temp As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT * FROM CF_tbl_extractors WHERE stationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "' and isenable=1 and tipo=27")
                If dt_extractors_temp.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    Data_From_Extractor_Type = 27
                    dt_Extractors = dt_extractors_temp

                    If dt_Extractors.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                        Dim extractorid As Integer = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("AutoID")

                        Dim trn2 As DateTime = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("Fecha")
                        Dim tableName As String = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("Tabla")
                        Dim trnc As Integer = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("indice")
                        Dim machinename As String = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("MachineName")
                        Dim machintetype As String = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("MachineType")
                        Dim requeststage As Boolean = dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("RequestStage")

                        Dim sql_test As String = "Select TOP 1 * From " & tableName & " WHERE AutoID>'" & trnc & "' and stationid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main & "' AND IsRework=0 Order by AutoID DESC"

                        Dim dtAOI As DataTable = BeConnMachines.GetDt(sql_test)

                        If dtAOI.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                            Dim currentid As Integer = dtAOI.Rows(0).Item("AutoID")

                            If dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("indice") < currentid Then
                                dt_Extractors.Rows(0).Item("indice") = currentid
                                dt_Extractors.AcceptChanges()
                            End If

                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE CF_tbl_extractors SET Indice='" & currentid & "',Fecha=GETDATE() WHERE autoid='" & extractorid & "'")
                        End If
                    End If

                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = False
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel = 1


                    tmr_extractor.Enabled = True
                    tmr_extractor.Start()
                    Data_From_Extractor = True
                End If
            End If
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub frm_SMT_index_Shown(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Shown
        CheckUserCertifications(Pbx_id, Label17, lb_username)

        'SMT LOAD PN1
        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(1)

        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.UpdateControlPanelInformation(linkWorkcenter1, lblCP1_status, lblCP1_pn, lblCP1_job, lblCP1_user, lblCP1_checksheet, lblCP1_inv, lbl_workcenter, lbl_pn_plex, lbl_plexop, lbl_plexjob)


        If ExData.CONF_Plex_Transaction_Active = False Then
            btn_processarplex.Visible = False
            btn_processarplex.Enabled = False
            Label38.BackColor = Color.Transparent
            Label38.ForeColor = Color.Black
            Label38.Text = "Plex workcenter"
        End If

        '2020-01-08 EM: PLEX COMPARATION AVAILABLE
        'checkblink()

        '2020-09-14 EM: Load controlled list. 
        ExFunctions.LoadControlledTOGrid(dgv_controlled)

        ExFunctions.bonustable(ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main, dv_bonuspeople, dv_bonustech, dv_bonuslead, dv_bonusqa, btnbonus)

        If ExData.CONF_Production_Bonus_actived Then
            tabbonus.SelectedIndex = 1
        End If

        ExFunctions.loadAlerts(flp_alerts, txt_qaalerts)

        tmr_Alerts.Start()
        tmr_Material.Start()
        tmr_Seconds.Start()
        txt_serial.Select()

        '2020-01-22 EM: Activate 
        tblautoscan.Enabled = False
        ExData.allow_manual_scanning = False

        Load_DB9_Ports()

        If ExData.port_usage = True Then
            tblautoscan.Enabled = True
            txt_serial.Enabled = False
            Rb_pass.Enabled = False
            Rb_reject.Enabled = False
            DB9_Conection_Stage = "INICIO"

            'START TIMER UPDATE I/O
            tmr_io.Start()

            'START TIMER
            tmr_coms.Start()
        Else
            tblautoscan.Enabled = False
            txt_serial.Enabled = True
            Rb_pass.Enabled = True
            Rb_reject.Enabled = True
            DB9_Conection_Stage = "EMPTY"
            tmr_coms.Stop()

            txt_serial.Select()
        End If

        date_timer = DateTime.Now()


        '04/26/21 EM: REMOVE ALL SERIALS LOADED...
        BeConn.UpdateRecords("DELETE FROM [Part_Station_Material_Load] WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main & "' and trndate<DATEADD(hour,-12,getdate())")

        ExData.SMT_AllowLoadMaterial = True

        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE [dbo].[PD_idt_stations] SET [Allow_LoadMaterial] = 1 WHERE StationID = '" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")

        txt_serial.Select()
    End Sub

#Region "COM ports"

    Public Sub Load_DB9_Ports()
        '2020-01-22 EM: Sub to load com serial boards....
        'Color green: Chartreuse - DarkGreen
        'Color red: OrangeRed - MistyRose

        'LOAD COMS
        Load_DB9_Ports_Setup()

        'Simulate change
        Read_DB9_Values()

        'RESET STAGE
        DB9_Conection_Stage = "INICIO"
    End Sub

    '2020-01-22 EM: SERIAL PORT CONECTION
    Dim DB9_1 As New SerialPort
    Dim DB9_2 As New SerialPort

    'Pines
    Dim DB9_1_Pin6 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: SENSOR 1 PIN 6 CAFE
    Dim DB9_1_Pin8 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: SENSOR 2 PIN 8 GRIS
    Dim DB9_1_Pin1 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: AOI IN GOOD/BAD PIN 1 MORADO
    Dim DB9_1_Pin9 As BePin '2022-09-16 EM: NOT IN USE
    'RTS PIN 7 VERDE 2020-01-23 EM: USE TO AVOI MOVEMENT OF CONVEYOR
    'DTR PIN 4 AMARILLO START SCANNERS

    Dim DB9_2_Pin6 As BePin '2020-01-22 EM: SENSOR 3 PIN 6 CAFE
    Dim DB9_2_Pin8 As BePin '2022-09-16 EM: READ ICT IF IS READY
    Dim DB9_2_Pin1 As BePin
    Dim DB9_2_Pin9 As BePin
    'RTS PIN 7 VERDE    2020-01-23 STOP MOTOR CONVEYOR
    'DTR PIN 4 AMARILLO     '2022-09-16 EM: STOP MOTOR 2.

    Sub Load_DB9_Ports_Setup()
        'READ CONFIGURATION IF EXIST
        Dim productName As String = "NoName"

        Try
            productName = System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().GetName().Name
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        '◘ Create directory
        Dim confDir As String = "C:\BeFirst\Configuration"

        If My.Computer.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(confDir) Then

        Else
            Directory.CreateDirectory(confDir)
            Try
                Dim ToHideDir As New System.IO.DirectoryInfo(confDir)
                ToHideDir.Attributes = IO.FileAttributes.Hidden
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        'Hide folder
        Dim fileName As String = confDir & "\" & productName & "_COM.txt"
        ExData.port_file = fileName

        '◘ Read File (Configuration)
        If My.Computer.FileSystem.FileExists(fileName) Then
            'Read current settings
            Dim readText() As String = File.ReadAllLines(fileName)
            Dim s As String
            For Each s In readText
                'Read if sline is valid
                If s.Length > 1 Then
                    'Check if a variable
                    If s.Substring(0, 1) = "@" Then
                        Dim variables() = s.Substring(1).Split("^")
                        Select Case variables(0)
                            Case "port_com_port1"
                                ExData.port_com_port1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_baud1"
                                ExData.port_com_baud1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_parity1"
                                ExData.port_com_parity1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_data1"
                                ExData.port_com_data1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_stop1"
                                ExData.port_com_stop1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_port2"
                                ExData.port_com_port2 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_baud2"
                                ExData.port_com_baud2 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_parity2"
                                ExData.port_com_parity2 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_data2"
                                ExData.port_com_data2 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_stop2"
                                ExData.port_com_stop2 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_port3"
                                ExData.port_com_port3 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_baud3"
                                ExData.port_com_baud3 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_parity3"
                                ExData.port_com_parity3 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_data3"
                                ExData.port_com_data3 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_stop3"
                                ExData.port_com_stop3 = variables(1)
                        End Select
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            'Build and show ports...

            'LOAD PORTS....
            Try
                If ExData.port_com_port1.Contains("COM") Then
                    If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                        Try
                            'RemoveHandler DB9_1.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg1
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                        DB9_1.Close()
                    End If
                    'AddHandler DB9_1.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg1
                    DB9_1.PortName = ExData.port_com_port1
                    DB9_1.BaudRate = CInt(ExData.port_com_baud1)
                    DB9_1.Open()

                    DB9_1.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                    DB9_1.RtsEnable = True 'ALLOW AOI SEND UNITS

                    txtcamera1.ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    txtcamera1.BackColor = Color.Chartreuse
                Else
                    txtcamera1.ForeColor = Color.MistyRose
                    txtcamera1.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                End If

                If ExData.port_com_port2.Contains("COM") Then
                    If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                        Try
                            'RemoveHandler DB9_2.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg2
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                        DB9_2.Close()
                    End If
                    'AddHandler DB9_2.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg2
                    DB9_2.PortName = ExData.port_com_port2
                    DB9_2.BaudRate = CInt(ExData.port_com_baud2)
                    DB9_2.Open()

                    DB9_2.DtrEnable = False 'SET SMEMA 3/4 OPEN (NO BOARD)
                    DB9_2.RtsEnable = False 'ENABLE MOTOR 1

                    txtcamera2.ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    txtcamera2.BackColor = Color.Chartreuse
                Else
                    txtcamera2.ForeColor = Color.MistyRose
                    txtcamera2.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

        End If

    Sub Read_DB9_Values()
        Try
            '-- 1 Lectura sensor 1
            If DB9_1_Pin6 Is Nothing Then
                DB9_1_Pin6 = New BePin(_Pins.DSR)
            End If
            DB9_1_Pin6.State = _Pins.DSR
            If DB9_1.DsrHolding Then
                txtSensor1.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                DB9_1_Pin6.stado = True
                txtstage2.Text = "ON"
                txtstage2.BackColor = Color.Chartreuse
                txtstage2.ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen
            Else
                txtSensor1.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                DB9_1_Pin6.stado = False
                txtstage2.Text = "OFF"
                txtstage2.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                txtstage2.ForeColor = Color.MistyRose
            End If

            If DB9_1_Pin8 Is Nothing Then
                DB9_1_Pin8 = New BePin(_Pins.CTS)
            End If
            DB9_1_Pin8.State = _Pins.CTS
            If DB9_1.CtsHolding Then
                txtSensor2.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                DB9_1_Pin8.stado = True
                txtstage3.Text = "ON"
                txtstage3.BackColor = Color.Chartreuse
                txtstage3.ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen
            Else
                txtSensor2.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                DB9_1_Pin8.stado = False
                txtstage3.Text = "OFF"
                txtstage3.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                txtstage3.ForeColor = Color.MistyRose
            End If

            If DB9_1_Pin1 Is Nothing Then
                DB9_1_Pin1 = New BePin(_Pins.DCD)
            End If
            DB9_1_Pin1.State = _Pins.DCD
            If DB9_1.CDHolding Or estuvo_mal Then
                txtAoiSensor.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                DB9_1_Pin1.stado = True
                estuvo_mal = True
                txtstage1.Text = "BAD"
                txtstage1.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                txtstage1.ForeColor = Color.MistyRose
            Else
                txtAoiSensor.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                DB9_1_Pin1.stado = False
                txtstage1.Text = "Good"
                txtstage1.BackColor = Color.Chartreuse
                txtstage1.ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen
            End If

            '-- 2 Lectura sensor 2, sin uso.
            If DB9_2_Pin6 Is Nothing Then
                DB9_2_Pin6 = New BePin(_Pins.DSR)
            End If
            DB9_2_Pin6.State = _Pins.DSR
            If DB9_2.DsrHolding Then
                DB9_2_Pin6.stado = True
                txtSensor3.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
            Else
                DB9_2_Pin6.stado = False
                txtSensor3.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
            End If

            If DB9_2_Pin8 Is Nothing Then
                DB9_2_Pin8 = New BePin(_Pins.CTS)
            End If
            DB9_2_Pin8.State = _Pins.CTS
            If DB9_2.CtsHolding Then
                txtICTin.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                DB9_2_Pin8.stado = True
            Else
                txtAoiSensor.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                DB9_2_Pin8.stado = False
            End If


            '-- 3 Check Values sended

            Try
                If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                    If DB9_1.DtrEnable = True Then
                        txttrigger.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    Else
                        txttrigger.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                    End If

                    If DB9_1.RtsEnable = True Then
                        txtaoibusy.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    Else
                        txtaoibusy.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                    End If
                Else
                    txttrigger.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                End If

                'If DB9_2.IsOpen Then

                'Else
                '    txtaoibusy.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                'End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try



        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Async Function enviarssn(ssn As String, Optional UnitStatus As Boolean = True, Optional DefectDescription As String = "", Optional selectedDefectCode As Integer = -1) As Task

        Dim initialstatus As Boolean = True

        If ssn = "" Then
            If txt_serial.Text = "" And txt_loadserialno.Text <> "" Then
                btn_loadserialno1.PerformClick()
            Else
                '◘ Serial empty
                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_empty, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
            End If
        Else
            '◘ Serial not empty
            If ssn = "OK" Or ssn.Length < 2 Then
                '◘ Restore Pass values
                Rb_pass.Checked = True : selectedDefectCode = -1 : txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
            ElseIf ssn.Length > 5 Then

                '◘ Production continue
                If ssn.Substring(0, 3) = "(S)" Then
                    txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                Else

                    ExFunctions.CloseOpenTickets(ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)

                    '◘ Production....
                    Dim xlocHelp As Integer = 99

                    'Option for down components quantities
                    Dim indexpanel As Integer = 1

                    'Build Datatable with serial numbers
                    Dim regex1 As Regex

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True Then

                        'Is by panel
                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.hasParentSSN Then

                            Dim temp_ssn As String = ssn

                            Dim childVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                               {
                                    New SqlParameter("@Child", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                               }

                            'If is by panel search by virtual master label (Parent)
                            ssn = BeConn.GetString("Select parente from PD_tbl_parents_smt where child=@Child", childVarcharParameter)

                            If ssn = "" And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                If ssn = "" Then
                                    ssn = BeConn_OLD.GetString("Select parente from PD_tbl_parents_smt where child=@Child", childVarcharParameter)
                                End If
                            End If

                            If ssn = "" And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site <> "" Then
                                Dim unitresult = Units.GetUnitsArrayGetChildsSITE(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site, temp_ssn)

                                If unitresult.Count > 0 Then
                                    ssn = unitresult(0).Parent
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If

                        'Serial panel verfication
                        regex1 = New Regex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat)
                        Dim match As Match = regex1.Match(ssn)
                        Dim stageactual As Integer = 0

                        If (match.Success) Then

                            escanead_correcto = True

                            'Çheck current status of panel.
                            Dim ignorar_panelstatus As Boolean = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT CAST([Result] as bit) FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='Production_BYPanel_IgnorePanelStatus'")

                            Dim unitStage As Integer = -99

                            Dim ssnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                            {
                                New SqlParameter("@ssn", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                            }

                            unitStage = BeConn.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end  
                                        from PD_tbl_units_wip 
                                        left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID
                                        where ssnpanel=@ssn", ssnParameter)

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                Dim oldunitStage As Integer = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end  
                                        from PD_tbl_units_wip 
                                        left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID
                                        where ssnpanel=@ssn", ssnParameter)

                                If oldunitStage > unitStage And oldunitStage > 0 Then
                                    unitStage = oldunitStage
                                End If
                            End If

                            stageactual = unitStage

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.shouldMergeBeforeProcess Then

                                'INTERPLANT: OPTION NOT AVAILABLE

                                ExData.parenssn = ssn

                                Dim ssnvParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                        {
                                                            New SqlParameter("@ParentSSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ExData.parenssn}
                                                        }

                                BeConn.GetDt("DELETE FROM PD_tbl_parents_smt WHERE Parente=@ParentSSN", ssnvParameter)

                                Dim contadori As Integer = 0
                                For pieza As Integer = 1 To ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel
                                    ExData.childi = contadori
                                    frm_a_d_unitMergeChilds.ShowDialog()
                                    contadori += 1
                                Next
                            End If

                            Dim IsGood As Boolean = True
                            Dim IsRework As Boolean = False

                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Clear()
                            For i As Integer = 1 To ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel
                                ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add(ssn, ssn & "-" & i, IsGood, -1, IsRework, 1, stageactual, "")
                            Next

                            'If material should come already merged.
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanelWithChilds Then
                                Dim parenteVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                   {
                                        New SqlParameter("@parente", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                                   }

                                Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT Child FROM PD_tbl_parents_smt WHERE parente=@parente", parenteVarcharParameter)

                                If dt.Rows.Count > 0 And dt.Rows.Count = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
                                    Dim i As Integer = 0
                                    For Each row In dt.Rows
                                        'Cambio el serial e indico que es hijo...
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(1) = row.item(0)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(5) = 0
                                        i += 1
                                    Next
                                Else

                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then

                                        dt = BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT Child FROM PD_tbl_parents_smt WHERE parente=@parente", parenteVarcharParameter)

                                    ElseIf dt.Rows.Count = 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site <> "" Then

                                        Dim unitresult = Units.GetUnitsArrayGetChildsSITE(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site, ssn)

                                        For Each unitChild In unitresult
                                            dt.Rows.Add(unitChild.Child)
                                        Next

                                    End If

                                    If dt.Rows.Count > 0 And dt.Rows.Count = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
                                        Dim i As Integer = 0
                                        For Each row In dt.Rows
                                            'Cambio el serial e indico que es hijo...
                                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(1) = row.item(0)
                                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(5) = 0
                                            i += 1
                                        Next
                                    Else

                                        ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.merge_panel_incomplete, My.Resources.Messages.merge_panel_incomplete_title)
                                        txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                                        Exit Function
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        Else

                            'Serial format not mach 
                            Dim dt_email As DataTable = ExFunctions.getEmailProductEngineer(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerID)

                            Dim responsable As String = ""
                            If dt_email.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                responsable = dt_email.Rows(0).Item(0)
                            Else
                                responsable = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='Admin_Name'")
                            End If
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.hasParentSSN Then
                                'No cazado
                                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable & " ." & My.Resources.Messages.prod_merge_return, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                            ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.hasParentSSN = False Then
                                'No coincide
                                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                            Else
                                'NO coincide.
                                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                            End If
                            txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                            Exit Function
                        End If
                    Else
                        'Is individual
                        regex1 = New Regex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat)
                        Dim match As Match = regex1.Match(ssn)
                        If (match.Success) Then

                            escanead_correcto = True

                            'Limpio tabla y agrego serial.
                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Clear()
                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Add("N/A", ssn, 1, -1, 0, 0, 0, "")
                        Else
                            'Si no coincide avisar!
                            Dim dt_email As DataTable = ExFunctions.getEmailProductEngineer(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerID)

                            Dim responsable As String = ""
                            If dt_email.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                responsable = dt_email.Rows(0).Item(0)
                            Else
                                responsable = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='Admin_Name'")
                            End If

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                            Else
                                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                            End If
                            txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                            Exit Function
                        End If
                    End If

                    Dim Dia As DateTime = DateTime.Now()

                    Dim requestbytwodefects As Boolean = False
                    Dim requestbytwodefects_code As String = "None"
                    'Check for bad units.
                    Dim malas As Integer = 0
                    If Rb_pass.Checked = False Then

                        initialstatus = False

                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel > 1 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True Then
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanelWithChilds Then
                                'IsSerialzied 
                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectCodeID = selectedDefectCode
                                Dim SelectorDialog As New frm_a_d_defectsUnitsScan
                                SelectorDialog.ShowDialog()
                                Dim result As String = SelectorDialog.Result() : SelectorDialog = Nothing : malas = CInt(Int(result))
                                If malas > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
                                    malas = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel
                                End If
                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.debugeo = False Then
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(DefectDepartment) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(DefectDepartment) - malas
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment) + malas
                                    colorx(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment))
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.Contains(DefectCodeName) Then
                                        Dim indexOfMyDW = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.IndexOf(DefectCodeName)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty(indexOfMyDW) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty(indexOfMyDW) + malas
                                        Try
                                            'Check if diference < 15 Min and is active to this pn
                                            'Check if is asctive for this partnumber...
                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Two_Defects_15min Then
                                                If malas > 1 Then
                                                    'Close as default
                                                    'Mark as defective by 15 min...
                                                    requestbytwodefects = True
                                                    requestbytwodefects_code = DefectCodeName
                                                Else
                                                    'Compare time...
                                                    Dim previous_datetime = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQtyDate(indexOfMyDW)
                                                    Dim current_datetime = DateTime.Now()

                                                    Dim diff = current_datetime - previous_datetime
                                                    If Math.Abs(diff.TotalMinutes) > 15 Then
                                                        'Mark as defective by 15 min...
                                                        requestbytwodefects = True
                                                        requestbytwodefects_code = DefectCodeName
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            End If

                                            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQtyDate(indexOfMyDW) = DateTime.Now()
                                        Catch ex As Exception

                                        End Try
                                    Else
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.Add(DefectCodeName)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty.Add(malas)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQtyDate.Add(DateTime.Now())
                                    End If
                                End If
                            Else
                                'Quantity of bad units.
                                Dim SelectorDialog As New frm_a_d_defectsUnitsQuantity
                                SelectorDialog.ShowDialog()
                                Dim result As String = SelectorDialog.Result() : SelectorDialog = Nothing : malas = CInt(Int(result))
                                If malas > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
                                    malas = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel
                                End If
                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.debugeo = False Then
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(DefectDepartment) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(DefectDepartment) - malas
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment) + malas
                                    colorx(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment))
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.Contains(DefectCodeName) Then
                                        Dim indexOfMyDW = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.IndexOf(DefectCodeName)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty(indexOfMyDW) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty(indexOfMyDW) + malas
                                    Else
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.Add(DefectCodeName)
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty.Add(malas)
                                    End If
                                End If
                                For i As Integer = 0 To malas - 1
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(2) = False
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(i).Item(3) = selectedDefectCode
                                    '2020-04-27 EM: Moved to record
                                    'ExFunctions.addtoplexlist(ssn, False, Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss"), 1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID, ExData.Selected_Area.PartNumber)
                                Next
                            End If
                        Else
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.debugeo = False Then
                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(DefectDepartment) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(DefectDepartment) - 1
                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment) + 1
                                colorx(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefectosCount(DefectDepartment))
                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.Contains(DefectCodeName) Then
                                    Dim indexOfMyDW = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.IndexOf(DefectCodeName)
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty(indexOfMyDW) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty(indexOfMyDW) + 1
                                Else
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myList.Add(DefectCodeName)
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.myQty.Add(1)
                                End If

                                '2020-04-27 EM: Moved to record
                                'ExFunctions.addtoplexlist(ssn, False, Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss"), 1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID, ExData.Selected_Area.PartNumber)
                            End If
                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(0).Item(2) = False
                            ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(0).Item(3) = selectedDefectCode

                            'Add to dtSerialsBad
                        End If

                    ElseIf Rb_pass.Checked = False And Data_From_Extractor Then
                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(0).Item(2) = False
                        ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows(0).Item(3) = 212 'DEFAULT AOI Error
                    End If

                    '◘ Serials numbers
                    Dim mensajesFormatoInvalido As Integer = 0
                    Dim mensajesAreaInvalida As Integer = 0
                    Dim mensajesReparacion As Integer = 0
                    Dim mensajesReparacionQA As Integer = 0
                    Dim mensajesQAlocked As Integer = 0
                    Dim mensajesmissingaoi As Integer = 0
                    Dim mensajesmissingaoitext As String = ""
                    Dim inserted_wip As Integer = 0

                    ExData.Selected_Area.LastPiece = Dia
                    Dim shift = ExFunctions.GetShift(DateTime.Now())

                    Dim duplicado As Integer = 0

                    Dim isMessageDisplayed As Boolean = False

                    'PROCESAR CADA SERIAL!
                    Dim ssnchilid As Integer = 0

                    'SKIP JOB QTY VALIDATION
                    ' If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Job_Qty_Allowed > (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count + ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows.Count) Then

                    For Each son As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.ParentChilds.Rows
                        'Para cada serial, repetimos la operacion....
                        Dim ssnchild As String = son.Item(1)
                        Dim ssnpanel As String = son.Item(0)

                        Dim IsFromPanel As Boolean = son.Item(5)

                        'Revisar individualmente
                        '2.5 Candado, WIP LOCATION 

                        '◘ Revisar si coincide formato...
                        Dim regex3 As Regex
                        regex3 = New Regex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat)
                        Dim match As Match = regex3.Match(ssnchild)
                        If match.Success Or IsFromPanel Then

                            Dim insertTracking As Boolean = True

                            Dim insertAsBad As Boolean = False

                            Dim IsGood As Boolean = son.Item(2)

                            Dim DefectCode As Integer = son.Item(3)

                            If DefectDescription.Length > 0 And UnitStatus = False And selectedDefectCode > 0 Then
                                insertAsBad = True
                            End If

                            'Get SSN of Conversion
                            Dim tempn_conversion As String = ssnchild

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HaveConversionBefore Then

                                'INTERPLANT: OPTION NOT AVAILABLE 

                                Dim conversionParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                    {
                                                                        New SqlParameter("@Child_SSN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild}
                                                                    }

                                Dim dt_conversion As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT TOP 1 SSN FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion] where [Child_SSN]=@Child_SSN order by trndate desc", conversionParameter)

                                If dt_conversion.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                    For Each convesion In dt_conversion.Rows
                                        tempn_conversion = convesion.Item(0)
                                    Next
                                Else
                                    Dim conversionSSNParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                    {
                                                                        New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild}
                                                                    }

                                    Dim dt_conversion2 As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT TOP 1 Child_SSN FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion] where [SSN]=@SSN order by trndate desc", conversionSSNParameter)

                                    If dt_conversion2.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        For Each convesion In dt_conversion2.Rows
                                            tempn_conversion = convesion.Item(0)
                                        Next
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If


                            'Check if units is locked due failure in process
                            Dim snnConvertionWIPParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                            {
                                New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild},
                                New SqlParameter("@SSNConvertion", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = tempn_conversion}
                            }

                            Dim History As List(Of UnitsHistory) = New List(Of UnitsHistory)

                            Dim useAPIS As Boolean = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT CAST([Result] as bit) FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='Production_Use_APIS'")

                            If useAPIS Then

                                History.AddRange(Units.GetUnitResultHistory(ssnchild, "", "", "", ""))
                                If ssnchild <> tempn_conversion Then
                                    History.AddRange(Units.GetUnitResultHistory(tempn_conversion, "", "", "", ""))
                                End If

                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site <> "" Then
                                    History.AddRange(Units.GetUnitResultHistorySite(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site, ssnchild, "", "", "", ""))
                                    If ssnchild <> tempn_conversion Then
                                        History.AddRange(Units.GetUnitResultHistorySite(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site, tempn_conversion, "", "", "", ""))
                                    End If
                                End If

                                History = History.OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                'Check if units is locked due failure in process
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If History.Count > 0 Then
                                        If History(0).isGood = False Then
                                            'Check if area allow failures...
                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Failures_Allowed > 0 Then

                                                Dim countBadItems As Integer = History.Where(Function(h) h.isGood = False AndAlso h.area = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName AndAlso h.side = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side).Count()

                                                If countBadItems < ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Failures_Allowed Then

                                                Else
                                                    insertTracking = True
                                                    insertAsBad = True
                                                    mensajesReparacion += 1
                                                    Continue For
                                                End If
                                            ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID_Failures_Allowed > 0 Then
                                                Dim failures_before As Integer = 0

                                                Dim countBadItems As Integer = History.Where(Function(h) h.isGood = False).Count()

                                                If countBadItems < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID_Failures_Allowed Then
                                                    'Scans are below of allowed. OK
                                                Else
                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                    mensajesReparacion += 1
                                                    Continue For
                                                End If
                                            Else
                                                insertTracking = True
                                                insertAsBad = True
                                                mensajesReparacion += 1
                                                Continue For
                                            End If
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If

                                '1 - Custom Areas Validations
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows
                                            Try
                                                Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False

                                                Dim pasaFCTafterRework As Boolean = True

                                                Dim AreaName As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT Area FROM PD_idt_areas WHERE AREAID='" & area.Item("AreaID") & "'")

                                                If AreaName = "FCT" Then

                                                    pasaFCTafterRework = False

                                                    Dim results As List(Of UnitsHistory) = History.Where(Function(h) (h.area = AreaName OrElse h.area = "Retrabajo")).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                    If results.Count > 0 Then
                                                        If results(0).area = AreaName Then
                                                            pasaFCTafterRework = True
                                                        End If
                                                    End If
                                                End If

                                                If pasaFCTafterRework = True Then

                                                    Dim results As List(Of UnitsHistory) = History.Where(Function(h) h.area = AreaName AndAlso h.side = area.Item("Side")).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                    If results.Count > 0 Then
                                                        If results(0).isGood = True Then
                                                            pasaprueba = True
                                                        Else
                                                            pasaprueba = False
                                                        End If
                                                    Else
                                                        pasaprueba = False
                                                    End If

                                                End If

                                                If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                    insertAsBad = True
                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                    mensajesAreaInvalida += 1

                                                    'ExFunctions.ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1))
                                                    ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)

                                                    Exit For
                                                End If
                                            Catch ex As Exception
                                                insertAsBad = True
                                            End Try
                                        Next
                                    End If
                                End If

                                '2 - CHECK AOI RESULTS
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    Try
                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasAOIToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                            For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasAOIToReview.Rows
                                                Try
                                                    Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False

                                                    'INTERPLANT: TODO

                                                    Dim unitresult = Units.GetAOIResult(ssnchild, area.Item(2), area.Item(0))

                                                    If unitresult.isGood Then
                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                    End If

                                                    If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                        mensajesmissingaoi += 1

                                                        mensajesmissingaoitext = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1)

                                                        ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1)
                                                        txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                        txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                        Exit For
                                                    End If
                                                Catch ex As Exception
                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                End Try
                                            Next
                                        End If
                                    Catch ex As Exception
                                        insertTracking = False
                                    End Try
                                End If

                                '3 - Check If Ignoer after failure
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        If IsGood = False Then
                                            For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Rows

                                                Dim AreaName As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT Area FROM PD_idt_areas WHERE AREAID='" & area.Item("AreaID") & "'")

                                                Dim results As List(Of UnitsHistory) = History.Where(Function(h) h.area = AreaName).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                If results.Count > 0 Then
                                                    If results(0).isGood = True Then
                                                        insertTracking = True
                                                        insertAsBad = True

                                                        txtmsg.Text = "Ignore Failure due " & area.Item(1)
                                                        txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                        txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            Next
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If

                                '4 - Check if units is locked by QA
                                If insertTracking Or ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.SegregateQAUnits Then

                                    'INTERPLANT: TODO

                                    Dim snnQAParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                        {
                                            New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild}
                                        }

                                    Dim dt_unitlocked As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT SN,Comments FROM QA_tbl_lockunitspvs WHERE SN=@SN Order By TrnDate desc", snnQAParameter, False)

                                    If dt_unitlocked.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        insertTracking = True
                                        insertAsBad = True

                                        mensajesQAlocked += 1
                                        ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit " & ssnchild & " locked by QA", ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                    End If
                                End If

                                'Check if units is rework and not QA...
                                'If have process of QA validation after Rework
                                If insertTracking Then

                                    'INTERPLANT: TODO

                                    If ExData.req_rework_threesteps Then
                                        Dim areaid As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("Select isnull(StatusAreaID,0) as StatusAreaID from PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion)", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                        If areaid = ExData.CONF_diagnostic_area_id Or areaid = ExData.CONF_rework_area_id Then
                                            ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit " & ssnchild & " not release by QA after rework", ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                            insertTracking = True
                                            insertAsBad = True
                                            mensajesReparacionQA += 1
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If


                                '6 Check if all previous steps are correct. 
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasRouting.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasRouting.Rows
                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID > CInt(area.Item("Stage")) Then
                                                Try
                                                    Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False

                                                    Dim AreaName As String = area.Field(Of String)("Area")

                                                    Dim AreaSideName As String = area.Field(Of String)("Side")

                                                    Dim Skips As Integer = area.Field(Of Int32)("Skips")

                                                    Dim DueDate As DateTime = area.Field(Of DateTime)("DueDate")

                                                    Dim allowDueSkip As Boolean = False

                                                    If Skips > 0 Then
                                                        If DueDate > DateTime.Now Then
                                                            allowDueSkip = True
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    If allowDueSkip Then
                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                    Else
                                                        Dim results As List(Of UnitsHistory) = History.Where(Function(h) h.area = AreaName AndAlso h.side = area.Item("Side")).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                        If results.Count > 0 Then
                                                            If results(0).isGood = True Then
                                                                pasaprueba = True
                                                            Else
                                                                pasaprueba = False
                                                            End If
                                                        Else
                                                            'CHECK PANEL
                                                            Dim HistoryPanel As List(Of UnitsHistory) = New List(Of UnitsHistory)

                                                            HistoryPanel.AddRange(Units.GetPanelResultHistory(ssnpanel, "", "", "", ""))

                                                            If HistoryPanel.Count > 0 Then
                                                                Dim resultsPanel As List(Of UnitsHistory) = HistoryPanel.Where(Function(h) h.area = AreaName AndAlso h.side = area.Item("Side")).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                                If resultsPanel.Count > 0 Then
                                                                    If resultsPanel(0).isGood = True Then
                                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                                    Else
                                                                        pasaprueba = False
                                                                    End If
                                                                Else
                                                                    pasaprueba = False
                                                                End If
                                                            Else
                                                                pasaprueba = False
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                        insertAsBad = True
                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                        mensajesAreaInvalida += 1

                                                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & AreaName & " " & area.Item(1), My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & AreaName & " " & area.Item(1), Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                                        ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)

                                                        Exit For
                                                    End If
                                                Catch ex As Exception
                                                    insertAsBad = True
                                                End Try
                                            End If
                                        Next
                                    End If
                                End If

                            Else
                                'Check if units is locked due failure in process
                                If insertTracking Then

                                    Dim dtUnitStatus = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [IsGood] FROM [PD_tbl_units_wip] where (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) order by trndate desc", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                        dtUnitStatus.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT [IsGood] FROM [PD_tbl_units_wip] where (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) order by trndate desc", snnConvertionWIPParameter))
                                    End If

                                    'Check if units is locked due failure in process
                                    If dtUnitStatus.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        If dtUnitStatus.Rows(0).Item(0) = False Then
                                            'Check if area allow failures...
                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Failures_Allowed > 0 Then
                                                Dim failures_before As Integer = 0

                                                Dim dt_count As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking] where (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) and AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' and TrnDate<GETDATE()", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                                If dt_count.Rows.Count < ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Failures_Allowed Then

                                                Else
                                                    insertTracking = True
                                                    insertAsBad = True
                                                    mensajesReparacion += 1
                                                End If
                                            ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID > 0 Then
                                                Dim failures_before As Integer = 0

                                                Dim dt_count As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking] where SSN=@SSN and AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' and TrnDate<GETDATE()", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                                If dt_count.Rows.Count < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID Then
                                                    'Scans are below of allowed. OK
                                                Else
                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                    mensajesReparacion += 1
                                                    Continue For
                                                End If
                                            Else
                                                insertTracking = True
                                                insertAsBad = True
                                                mensajesReparacion += 1
                                            End If
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If

                                '1 - Custom Areas Validations
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        Dim snnConvertionParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                           {
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNConvertion", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = tempn_conversion}
                                           }

                                        Dim dt_steps As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate,JobSide FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) and PartID=PartID Order By TrnDate desc", snnConvertionParameter)

                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                            dt_steps.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate,JobSide FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) and PartID=PartID Order By TrnDate desc", snnConvertionParameter))
                                        End If

                                        For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows
                                            Try
                                                Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False
                                                Dim results As DataRow() = dt_steps.Select("AreaID = '" & area.Item(0) & "'", "TrnDate DESC")

                                                If results.Length > 0 Then
                                                    If results(0).Item(0) = True Then
                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                    Else
                                                        pasaprueba = False
                                                    End If
                                                Else
                                                    pasaprueba = False
                                                End If

                                                If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                    insertAsBad = True

                                                    mensajesAreaInvalida += 1
                                                    'ExFunctions.ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1))
                                                    ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                End If
                                            Catch ex As Exception
                                                insertAsBad = True
                                            End Try
