                                        Next
                                    End If
                                End If

                                '2 - CHECK AOI RESULTS
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    Try
                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasAOIToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                            For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasAOIToReview.Rows
                                                Try
                                                    Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False

                                                    Dim unitresult = Units.GetAOIResult(ssnchild, area.Item(2), area.Item(0))

                                                    If unitresult.isGood Then
                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                    End If

                                                    If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                        mensajesmissingaoi += 1

                                                        mensajesmissingaoitext = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1)

                                                        ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1)
                                                        txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                        txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                        Exit For
                                                    End If
                                                Catch ex As Exception
                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                End Try
                                            Next
                                        End If
                                    Catch ex As Exception
                                        insertTracking = False
                                    End Try
                                End If

                                '3 - Check If Ignoer after failure
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        If IsGood = False Then
                                            For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Rows
                                                Dim snnConvertionVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                               {
                                                    New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild},
                                                    New SqlParameter("@SSNConvertion", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = tempn_conversion}
                                               }

                                                Dim dt_steps As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) and AreaID='" & area.Item(0).ToString() & "' Order By TrnDate desc", snnConvertionVarcharParameter)

                                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                    dt_steps.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) and AreaID='" & area.Item(0).ToString() & "' Order By TrnDate desc", snnConvertionVarcharParameter))
                                                End If

                                                If dt_steps.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                    If dt_steps.Rows(0).Item(0) = True Then
                                                        insertTracking = True
                                                        insertAsBad = True

                                                        txtmsg.Text = "Ignore Failure due " & area.Item(1)
                                                        txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                        txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            Next
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If

                                '4 - Check if units is locked by QA
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    Dim snnQAParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                        {
                                            New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild}
                                        }

                                    Dim dt_unitlocked As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT SN,Comments FROM QA_tbl_lockunitspvs WHERE SN=@SN Order By TrnDate desc", snnQAParameter, False)

                                    If dt_unitlocked.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        insertTracking = True
                                        insertAsBad = True

                                        mensajesQAlocked += 1
                                        ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit " & ssnchild & " locked by QA", ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                    End If
                                End If

                                'Check if units is rework and not QA...
                                'If have process of QA validation after Rework
                                If insertTracking Then
                                    If ExData.req_rework_threesteps Then
                                        Dim areaid As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("Select isnull(StatusAreaID,0) as StatusAreaID from PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion)", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                        If areaid = ExData.CONF_diagnostic_area_id Or areaid = ExData.CONF_rework_area_id Then
                                            ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit " & ssnchild & " not release by QA after rework", ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                            insertTracking = True
                                            insertAsBad = True
                                            mensajesReparacionQA += 1
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If

                            'Check if previos validations area OK!
                            If insertTracking = False Then

                            Else
                                Dim unitStage As Integer = -99

                                Dim snnVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                        {
                                            New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild}
                                        }



                                Dim hasCorrect As Boolean = False
                                If useAPIS Then
                                    hasCorrect = True
                                Else

                                    unitStage = BeConn.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", snnVarcharParameter)

                                    Dim oldStageID As Integer = 0

                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                        If unitStage = -99 Then 'Check PREVIOS VALID STAGE

                                            Dim oldStage As Integer = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("SELECT  case WHEN isgood=1 THEN abs(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage) else -1 * abs(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage) END as STAGE FROM            PD_tbl_units_tracking INNER JOIN PD_tbl_rutes ON PD_tbl_units_tracking.AreaID = PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID AND PD_tbl_units_tracking.JobSide = PD_tbl_rutes.Side AND PD_tbl_units_tracking.PartID = PD_tbl_rutes.PartID WHERE        (PD_tbl_units_tracking.SSN = @SSN) ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnVarcharParameter)

                                            If oldStage <> 0 Then 'ACCEPT VALID STAGES ONLY

                                                oldStageID = oldStage

                                            End If
                                        End If
                                    End If

                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                        Dim oldStageUnit As Integer = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", snnVarcharParameter)

                                        If oldStageUnit > 0 And oldStageUnit > unitStage Then
                                            unitStage = oldStageUnit
                                        End If

                                        If unitStage = -99 Then
                                            unitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", snnVarcharParameter)
                                        End If
                                    End If

                                    'It is First Operation!
                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID = 1 Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                    'Come previous operation! 
                                    If hasCorrect = False And (Math.Abs(unitStage) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID - 1) Then
                                        If useAPIS Then
                                            If History.Count > 0 Then

                                                Dim HistoryOfPreviousStage = History.Where(Function(h) h.area = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaName AndAlso h.side = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                If HistoryOfPreviousStage.Count > 0 Then
                                                    If HistoryOfPreviousStage(0).isGood = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    Else

                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            End If
                                        Else
                                            Dim previousresult As Boolean = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT  isgood FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide & "' ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                If previousresult = False Then
                                                    previousresult = BeConn_OLD.GetBoolean("SELECT  isgood FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide & "' ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnConvertionWIPParameter)
                                                End If
                                            End If

                                            If previousresult = True Then
                                                hasCorrect = True
                                            End If
                                        End If
                                    End If

                                    'IS OK and come from same or next operations!
                                    If hasCorrect = False And (Math.Abs(unitStage) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) And unitStage <> -99 Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                    'Si esta mala pero esta en la misma operacion, se puede cambiar de status, si viene de extractor.
                                    If hasCorrect = False And (unitStage < 0 And Math.Abs(unitStage) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) And Data_From_Extractor = True Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                    'IS RMA
                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_rma_area_id) Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                    'IS QUALITY INSPECTION
                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_Quality_Inspection_area_id) Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                    'IS MERGED BEFORE PROCESS
                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.shouldMergeBeforeProcess = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanelWithChilds = True Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                    'IGNORE STAGES!
                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.IgnorarStages = True) Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If


                                    If hasCorrect = False And insertAsBad Then
                                        hasCorrect = True
                                    End If

                                End If


                                If hasCorrect = False Then
                                    If unitStage < 0 And Math.Abs(unitStage) <> 99 Then
                                        mensajesReparacion += 1
                                        Continue For
                                    Else
                                        xlocHelp = unitStage
                                        mensajesAreaInvalida += 1
                                        Continue For
                                    End If
                                Else

                                    Dim IsRework, ContinueW As Boolean
                                    ContinueW = True : IsRework = False

                                    Dim ssnindex As Integer = 1

                                    Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT SSN,TrnDate,JobNumber,JobID,JobType,PartID,JobSide,GroupMLS FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE SSN=@SSN AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "'", snnVarcharParameter)

                                    If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        ssnindex = dt.Rows.Count + 1
                                        duplicado += 1
                                        IsRework = True
                                    End If

                                    Dim JobDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID
                                    Dim JobTypeDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType
                                    Dim JobNumberDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber
                                    Dim PartIDDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID
                                    If (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.FromPartID <> ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.toPartID) And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.topart Then
                                        PartIDDePieza = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.toPartID
                                    End If
                                    Dim JobSideDePieza As String = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side
                                    Dim GrupoMLSDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinID

                                    If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                        GrupoMLSDePieza = dt.Rows(0).Field(Of Integer)("GroupMLS")
                                    Else

                                    End If

                                    If insertAsBad Then
                                        IsGood = False
                                        DefectCode = ExData.DEF_DefaultDefectCode
                                    End If

                                    If DefectDescription.Length > 0 And UnitStatus = False And selectedDefectCode > 0 Then
                                        DefectCode = selectedDefectCode
                                    End If



                                    'Insert tracking.
                                    Dim insertParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                        {
                                            New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = PartIDDePieza},
                                            New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = IsGood},
                                            New SqlParameter("@DefectCodeID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = DefectCode},
                                            New SqlParameter("@IsRework", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = IsRework},
                                            New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID},
                                            New SqlParameter("@TrnDate", SqlDbType.DateTime) With {.Value = Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss")},
                                            New SqlParameter("@JobID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobDePieza},
                                            New SqlParameter("@JobType", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobTypeDePieza},
                                            New SqlParameter("@JobNumber", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobNumberDePieza},
                                            New SqlParameter("@JobSide", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = JobSideDePieza},
                                            New SqlParameter("@SSNPanel", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnpanel},
                                            New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild},
                                            New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID},
                                            New SqlParameter("@AreaID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID},
                                            New SqlParameter("@SSNIndex", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ssnindex},
                                            New SqlParameter("@Shift", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = shift},
                                            New SqlParameter("@GroupMLS", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = GrupoMLSDePieza},
                                            New SqlParameter("@SetupID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.SetupID},
                                            New SqlParameter("@SSNQty", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = 1}
                                        }

                                    BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_tracking] (PartID,IsGood,DefectCodeID,IsRework,StationID,TrnDate,JobID,JobType,JobNumber,JobSide,SSNPanel,SSN,ControlID,AreaID,SSNIndex,Shift,GroupMLS,SetupID,SSNQty) VALUES (@PartID,@IsGood,@DefectCodeID,@IsRework,@StationID,@TrnDate,@JobID,@JobType,@JobNumber,@JobSide,@SSNPanel,@SSN,@ControlID,@AreaID,@SSNIndex,@Shift,@GroupMLS,@SetupID,@SSNQty)", insertParameter)

                                    ExFunctions.updateUnitsQuantity(ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinID, ssnindex, ssnchild, 1)

                                    Dim dt_wip As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select * from PD_tbl_units_wip where ssn=@SSN", snnVarcharParameter)

                                    If dt_wip.Rows.Count = 0 Then
                                        Dim insertwipParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                            {
                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = PartIDDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = IsGood},
                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectCodeID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = DefectCode},
                                                New SqlParameter("@IsRework", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = IsRework},
                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@TrnDate", SqlDbType.DateTime) With {.Value = Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss")},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobType", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobTypeDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobNumber", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobNumberDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobSide", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = JobSideDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNPanel", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnpanel},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@StatusAreaID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@GroupMLS", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = GrupoMLSDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNQty", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = 1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@stageid", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID * (If(IsGood, 1, -1))}
                                            }

                                        BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_wip] (PartID,IsGood,DefectCodeID,IsRework,StationID,TrnDate,JobID,JobType,JobNumber,JobSide,SSNPanel,SSN,ControlID,StatusAreaID,GroupMLS,SSNQty,stageid) VALUES (@PartID,@IsGood,@DefectCodeID,@IsRework,@StationID,@TrnDate,@JobID,@JobType,@JobNumber,@JobSide,@SSNPanel,@SSN,@ControlID,@StatusAreaID,@GroupMLS,@SSNQty,@stageid)", insertwipParameter)
                                    Else
                                        Dim updatewipParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                           {
                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = PartIDDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = IsGood},
                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectCodeID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = DefectCode},
                                                New SqlParameter("@IsRework", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = IsRework},
                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@TrnDate", SqlDbType.DateTime) With {.Value = Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss")},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobType", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobTypeDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobNumber", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = JobNumberDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobSide", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = JobSideDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNPanel", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnpanel},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@StatusAreaID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@GroupMLS", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = GrupoMLSDePieza},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNQty", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = 1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@stageid", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID * (If(IsGood, 1, -1))}
                                           }

                                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_wip] SET IsGood=@IsGood,DefectCodeID=@DefectCodeID,TrnDate=@TrnDate,IsRework=@IsRework,ControlID=@ControlID,StationID=@StationID, StatusAreaID=@StatusAreaID, JobSide=@JobSide,stageid=@stageid,JobID=@JobID,JobType=@JobType,JobNumber=@JobNumber,IsActive=1 WHERE SSN=@SSN", updatewipParameter)
                                    End If

                                    If IsGood = False Then
                                        ExData.SerialesDefectuosos.Rows.Add(ssnchild, DateTime.Now, 0, 1, 0)
                                    Else
                                        Try
                                            For i As Integer = ExData.SerialesDefectuosos.Rows.Count - 1 To 0
                                                Dim dr As DataRow = ExData.SerialesDefectuosos.Rows(i)
                                                If dr("Serial") = ssnchild Then dr.Delete()
                                            Next

                                            ExData.SerialesDefectuosos.AcceptChanges()
                                        Catch ex As Exception

                                        End Try
                                    End If

                                    If ssnindex = 1 Then
                                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild + 1

                                        '2020-04-27 EM: Moved to record
                                        ExFunctions.addtoplexlist(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected, ssnchild, IsGood, Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss"), 1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber, txt_pendientes1)

                                            ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora = ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora.AddHours(+1)
                                        Else
                                            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty + 1
                                        End If
                                    End If

                                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_jobs_qty_build SET QtyBuild=QtyBuild + 1 WHERE ID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BuildID & "'")
                                    End If

                                    ' Agregar a la tabla

                                    R("Serial") = ssnchild : R("Hora") = Dia : R("IsGood") = IsGood
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials.Rows.InsertAt(R, 0)

                                    ' Avisamos del estado de la pieza
                                    If ssnindex = 1 Then
                                        If ExData.templastserial = "" Then
                                            ExData.templastserial = ssnchild
                                            ExData.templastserialtime = Dia
                                        Else
                                            ExData.tempserial = ssnchild
                                            ExData.tempserialtime = Dia
                                            'Aqui comparacion
                                            crearganacia(ExData.templastserialtime, ExData.tempserialtime)
                                            'Cambio viejo
                                            ExData.templastserial = ssnchild
                                            ExData.templastserialtime = Dia
                                        End If
                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_success : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                                    Else
                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_duplicate : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                                        duplicado += 1
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        Else
                            mensajesFormatoInvalido += 1
                            Continue For
                        End If

                        If ExData.allow_manual_scanning = True Then
                            individual_counter += 1
                            If individual_counter >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel Then
                                DB9_Conection_Stage = "MOVE TO 3 SENSOR"
                            End If
                        Else
                            individual_counter = 0
                        End If
                    Next

                    ' Si coincide eliminare razon de timepo muerto
                    ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = ExData.DEF_DefaultDownTimeCode

                    '2020-10-04 EM: load load material after scan units.
                    If ExData.SMT_AllowLoadMaterial = True And Math.Abs((DateTime.Now() - date_timer).TotalMinutes) > 10 Then
                        ExData.SMT_AllowLoadMaterial = False
                        If ExData.SMT_disable_load Then
                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE [dbo].[PD_idt_stations] SET [Allow_LoadMaterial] = 0 WHERE StationID = '" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")
                        End If
                    End If

                    If duplicado > 0 Or mensajesFormatoInvalido > 0 Or mensajesmissingaoi > 0 Then
                        Me.Player.Play()
                    End If

                    Data_lastserials.DataSource = ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials
                    ColorearSeriales()
                    If Data_lastserials.RowCount > 0 Then
                        Data_lastserials.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = 0
                    End If

                    BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_idt_stations SET IsActive='True',DownTimeCodeID='" & ExData.DEF_DefaultDownTimeCode & "',LastPieceTime='" & Dia.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss") & "',LastPartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "',LastJob='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID & "',LastJobType='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType & "',LastJobText='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobText & "',LastJobQty='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal & "',LastJobQtyBuild='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild & "',LastSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "',LastHourQty='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty & "',LastRate='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate & "',LastBinId='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.BinID & "' WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")


                    Try
                        Dim x As Integer = Math.Abs(Math.Round((ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild) * (3600 / ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate)))

                        '30 Min time
                        If ExData.SMT_ChangeOver_Alert = False And Math.Ceiling(x / 60) < 30 Then
                            ExData.SMT_ChangeOver_Alert = True
                            'SHOW ALERT
                            Dim options2 = New frm_a_d_msgNextJob
                            options2.ShowDialog()
                        End If

                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_jobs_normal SET EstimateProdTime='" & ExFunctions.GetTime(x) & "',EstimateProdTimeMin='" & Math.Ceiling(x / 60) & "' WHERE ID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID & "'")

                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try

                    'ACTUALIZAR CONTADORES
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 10000 Then
                        lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "00000") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "00000")
                    ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 1000 Then
                        lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "0000") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "0000")
                    ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 100 Then
                        lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "000") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "000")
                    ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate > 10 Then
                        lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "00") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "00")
                    Else
                        lbl_rate.Text = Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty, "0") & "/" & Format(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.estrate, "0")
                    End If

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal Then
                        pbar.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal
                    Else
                        pbar.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                    End If
                    lblBoxCount.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild


                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal Then
                        Panel2.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                        Try
                            Label2.Text = "Cantidad extra permitida " & CInt(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal / 10)
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try

                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild >= (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal * (1.1)) Then
                            btn_logout.PerformClick()
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' Si la orden esta completa
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild <= 0 Then
                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_jobs_normal SET StationID='-1', LastEdit= Getdate(),EditBy='" & ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID & "',Job_Status_Key='" & Planning_Job_Completed & "' WHERE ID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID & "'")
                    End If

                    ' Reiniciamos contador segundos
                    If x < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime Then
                        x = 0 : lbl_timer.Text = ExFunctions.GetTime(0)
                    End If

                    If x >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False Then
                        revisarDWt(ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main) : x = 0 : lbl_timer.Text = ExFunctions.GetTime(0) : lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Black
                    End If

                    ' Restauramos valores 
                    ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = ExData.DEF_DefaultDownTimeCode : ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True

                    If ExData.port_usage = True Then
                        Rb_pass.Checked = True : selectedDefectCode = -1
                    End If

                    If mensajesmissingaoi > 0 Then
                        Dim msgtitle As String = mensajesmissingaoitext

                        Dim msgcont As String = mensajesmissingaoitext

                        Dim msgqtys As String = ""

                        Dim msgcolor As String = ""

                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesmissingaoi > 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                            msgtitle = msgtitle & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgcont = msgcont & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgqtys = "OK: " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesmissingaoi & " BAD: " & mensajesmissingaoi
                            msgcolor = "ORANGE"
                        Else
                            msgtitle = msgtitle & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgcont = msgcont & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                        End If

                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(msgcont, msgtitle, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor, msgcolor, msgqtys)
                    End If

                    If mensajesReparacion > 0 Then

                        Dim msgtitle As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid

                        Dim msgcont As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_rework

                        Dim msgqtys As String = ""

                        Dim msgcolor As String = ""

                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesReparacion > 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                            msgtitle = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgcont = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_rework & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgqtys = "OK: " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesReparacion & " BAD: " & mensajesReparacion
                            msgcolor = "ORANGE"
                        Else
                            msgtitle = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid
                            msgcont = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_rework
                        End If

                        ShowMSG(msgcont, msgtitle, msgcolor, msgqtys)
                    End If

                    If mensajesAreaInvalida > 0 Then

                        'Si no tiene registro y no es la stage 1, entonces es invalida
                        Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT a.Area,pr.Side,pr.stage FROM PD_tbl_rutes pr INNER JOIN PD_idt_areas a ON pr.areaid=a.areaid WHERE pr.PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "' AND (pr.Stage='" & Math.Abs(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) - 1 & "' or pr.Stage='" & Math.Abs(xlocHelp) & "') order by stage asc")

                        If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                            Dim msgtitle As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid

                            Dim msgcont As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_before1 & dt.Select("stage='" & Math.Abs(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) - 1 & "'").CopyToDataTable.Rows(0).Field(Of String)("Area") & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_before2 & dt.Select("stage='" & Math.Abs(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) - 1 & "'").CopyToDataTable.Rows(0).Field(Of String)("Side") & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_before3

                            Dim msgqtys As String = ""

                            Dim msgcolor As String = ""

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesAreaInvalida > 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                                msgtitle = msgtitle & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                                msgcont = msgcont & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                                msgqtys = "OK: " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesAreaInvalida & " BAD: " & mensajesAreaInvalida
                                msgcolor = "ORANGE"
                            Else
                                msgtitle = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid
                                msgcont = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_before0
                            End If

                            ShowMSG(msgcont, msgtitle, msgcolor, msgqtys)

                        Else

                            Dim msgtitle As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid

                            Dim msgcont As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_before0

                            Dim msgqtys As String = ""

                            Dim msgcolor As String = ""

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesAreaInvalida > 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                                msgtitle = msgtitle & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                                msgcont = msgcont & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                                msgqtys = "OK: " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesAreaInvalida & " BAD: " & mensajesAreaInvalida
                                msgcolor = "ORANGE"
                            Else
                                msgtitle = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_station_invalid
                                msgcont = My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_before0
                            End If

                            ShowMSG(msgcont, msgtitle, msgcolor, msgqtys)

                        End If

                    End If

                    If mensajesFormatoInvalido > 0 Then

                        'Si no tiene registro y no es la stage 1, entonces es invalida
                        Dim dt_email As DataTable = ExFunctions.getEmailProductEngineer(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CustomerID)

                        Dim responsable As String = ""
                        If dt_email.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                            responsable = dt_email.Rows(0).Item(0)
                        Else
                            responsable = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='Admin_Name'")
                        End If

                        Dim msgtitle As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid

                        Dim msgcont As String = My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat.Substring(1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartIdFormat.Length - 2) & My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format_own & responsable

                        Dim msgqtys As String = ""

                        Dim msgcolor As String = ""

                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesFormatoInvalido > 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel Then
                            msgtitle = msgtitle & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgcont = msgcont & My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_one_of_panel
                            msgqtys = "OK: " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.pzspanel - mensajesFormatoInvalido & " BAD: " & mensajesFormatoInvalido
                            msgcolor = "ORANGE"
                        End If

                        ShowMSG(msgcont, msgtitle, msgcolor, msgqtys)

                    End If

                    ' Si ya van 5% defectos avisar
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(0) <= 0 Then
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(0) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefaultDefectsQty(0)
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = 1
                        ExData.PNSeleccionado = -1
                        If ExData.req_lockstation And ExData.Selected_Area.Area_AbleLock Then
                            ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_unlockFiveDefects)
                        End If
                    ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(1) <= 0 Then
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(1) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefaultDefectsQty(1)
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = 2
                        ExData.PNSeleccionado = -1
                        If ExData.req_lockstation And ExData.Selected_Area.Area_AbleLock Then
                            ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_unlockFiveDefects)
                        End If
                    ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(2) <= 0 Then
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(2) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefaultDefectsQty(2)
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = 3
                        ExData.PNSeleccionado = -1
                        If ExData.req_lockstation And ExData.Selected_Area.Area_AbleLock Then
                            ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_unlockFiveDefects)
                        End If
                    ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(3) <= 0 Then
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(3) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefaultDefectsQty(3)
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = 4
                        ExData.PNSeleccionado = -1
                        If ExData.req_lockstation And ExData.Selected_Area.Area_AbleLock Then
                            ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_unlockFiveDefects)
                        End If
                    ElseIf (requestbytwodefects And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Two_Defects_15min) Then
                        'ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = -1
                        'ExData.PNSeleccionado = -1
                        '2020-07-15 EM: Currently only using this department. 
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Defectos(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.defectodepartmenselec - 1) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DefaultDefectsQty(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.defectodepartmenselec - 1)
                        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.LockDepartmentSel = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.defectodepartmenselec
                        ExData.PNSeleccionado = -1
                        If ExData.req_lockstation And ExData.Selected_Area.Area_AbleLock Then
                            'requestbytwodefects_code
                            ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_unlockTwoDefects)
                        End If
                    End If

                    'CHECK FOR TRANSACTION
                    Try
                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Select("Workcenter_Key='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected & "'").Length() >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_StandarQty Then

                            If btn_processarplex.Enabled And ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") Then
                                Dim alltransaction As Boolean = True

                                If ExData.CONF_Plex_Recursive_Transactions = False Then
                                    alltransaction = False
                                End If

                                Await BePlex.Do_Transaction_RecursiveAsync(alltransaction, True, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Building_Key, If(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType = 1, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber, ""), ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales)

                                Try
                                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Clear()
                                    txt_pendientes1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count
                                Catch ex As Exception

                                End Try

                                ExFunctions.updateplexinfo(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Selected, False, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.Quantity, lbl_workcenter, lbl_pn_plex, lbl_plexop, lbl_plexop, lbl_plexjob)
                            End If

                        End If
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try

                    ExFunctions.SelectedSet(1)

                    ' Vaciar serial y seleccionar
                    txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                    'End If
                End If
            Else
                ' Si el serial es muy corto
                ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_shortage, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid)
                txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
            End If
        End If
        'txt_serial.Enabled = True
    End Function

    '  Cerrar sesion ==========================================================================================================================
    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_logout.Click
        'If CInt(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyPLEXBuild - ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild) < 0 And ExData.req_plexverification Then
        'Validate PLEX VALUES

        If dt_plexvs = 0 And ExData.req_plexverification Then
            ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.plex_nocompletetxt, My.Resources.Messages.plex_nocomplete)
        Else
            ExData.usernameclose = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID
            ExData.qrcodeclose = ""
            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal Then
                changesMade = 1
                If ExData.LANGUAGE = "es" Then
                    frm_a_d_msgIncompleteJob.ShowDialog()
                End If

                If cerrarorden = True Then
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = 1 Then
                        guardarcierre()
                    End If

                    changesMade = 2

                    Me.Close()
                End If
            Else
                If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = 1 Then
                    guardarcierre()
                End If

                changesMade = 2
                Me.Close()
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

#Region "Funciones"



    Private Sub ColorearSeriales()
        ' Colorear los seriales si pasaron o no (verde o rojo)
        Data_lastserials.Columns("IsGood").Visible = False
        Dim lastColIndex = Data_lastserials.Columns.Count - 1
        Dim lastCol = Data_lastserials.Columns.Item(lastColIndex)
        lastCol.AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.Fill
        For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Data_lastserials.Rows
            row.Height = 35
            If row.Cells("IsGood").Value = True Then
                row.DefaultCellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Green
            Else
                row.DefaultCellStyle.ForeColor = Color.Red
            End If
        Next
        Data_lastserials.ScrollBars = ScrollBars.None
        Data_lastserials.ReadOnly = True
        If Data_lastserials.RowCount > 0 Then
            Data_lastserials.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = 0
        End If
    End Sub

#End Region

        If changesMade = 1 Then 'cannot close
            e.Cancel = True
            'code save chages 

        ElseIf changesMade = 2 Then
            'can close
            tmr_coms.Stop() '2020-01-22 EM: tmr to close serial comunication

            '2020-01-22 EM: DISPOSE SERIAL PORTS...
            Try
                DB9_1.Close()
                DB9_2.Close()
                DB9_1.Dispose()
                DB9_2.Dispose()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
            closeics(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key_Kanban, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID)

            frm_a_b_Login.Show()
            frm_a_b_Login.RefreshTable()

            e.Cancel = False
        ElseIf changesMade = 3 Then
            'can close
            tmr_coms.Stop() '2020-01-22 EM: tmr to close serial comunication

            '2020-01-22 EM: DISPOSE SERIAL PORTS...
            Try
                DB9_1.Close()
                DB9_2.Close()
                DB9_1.Dispose()
                DB9_2.Dispose()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
            closeics(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key_Kanban, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID)

            frm_a_b_Login.Close()
            e.Cancel = False
        ElseIf changesMade = 4 Then
            e.Cancel = False
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub Button8_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_exit.Click
        If dt_plexvs = 0 And ExData.req_plexverification Then
            ShowMSG(My.Resources.Messages.plex_nocompletetxt, My.Resources.Messages.plex_nocomplete)
        Else
            ExData.usernameclose = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID
            ExData.qrcodeclose = ""
            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyTotal Then
                changesMade = 1
                frm_a_d_msgIncompleteJob.ShowDialog()
                If cerrarorden = True Then
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = 1 Then

                        guardarcierre()
                    End If
                    frm_a_b_Login.Close()
                    changesMade = 3
                    Me.Close()
                End If
            Else
                If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = 1 Then
                    guardarcierre()
                End If
                frm_a_b_Login.Close()
                changesMade = 3
                Me.Close()
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Sub guardarcierre()
        BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_StationCloseHistory]
           ([TrnDate]
           ,[PartID]
           ,[AreaID]
           ,[StationID]
           ,[JobID]
           ,[JobType]
           ,[JobNumber]
           ,[JobSide]
           ,[ControlID]
           ,[QtyBuild]
           ,[QtyPlex],QRCODE)
     VALUES
           (GetDate()
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "'
           ,'" & ExData.usernameclose & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild & "'
           ,'" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyPLEXBuild & "','" & ExData.qrcodeclose & "')")

    Public Sub colorx(qty As Integer)
        imt1.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt2.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt3.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt4.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt5.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray

        If qty Mod 5 >= 1 Then
            imt1.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty Mod 5 >= 2 Then
            imt2.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty Mod 5 >= 3 Then
            imt3.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If
        If qty Mod 5 >= 4 Then
            imt4.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty >= 5 And qty Mod 5 = 0 Then
            imt5.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Function CalculatePickAndPlace() As Integer
        Dim total As Integer = 0

        Dim trndate As DateTime = DateTime.Now

        Dim trnstart As DateTime

        If trndate.Hour >= 6 Then
            trnstart = New DateTime(trndate.Year, trndate.Month, trndate.Day, 6, 0, 0)
        Else
            trnstart = New DateTime(trndate.Year, trndate.Month, trndate.Day, 6, 0, 0).AddDays(-1)
        End If

        Dim dtHanwha As DataTable = BeConnMachines.GetDt("SELECT [SMT].[StationID],[PD_idt_stations].[StationName],[PD_idt_stations].[SortNo],[SMT].[MachineID],[SMT].[Part_Key],[PP].[Part_No],[SMT].[Side],SUM([SMT].[Panels] ) as Panels ,SUM([SMT].[Panels] * PPAtributes.[PiecesByPanel]) as Total FROM [Machines_Extractor_SMT_Hanwha_Panels_Details] SMT INNER JOIN [10.120.10.4].[BeFirst].[dbo].[Part] AS PP ON PP.Part_Key = SMT.Part_Key INNER JOIN [10.120.10.4].[BeFirst].[dbo].[PD_idt_stations] ON SMT.StationID = PD_idt_stations.StationID INNER JOIN [10.120.10.4].[BeFirst].[dbo].[CS_idt_partnumbers] AS PPAtributes ON PPAtributes.Part_Key = SMT.Part_Key where TrnDate between '" & trnstart.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss") & "' AND '" & trnstart.AddHours(+24).ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss") & "' AND MachineID=1 AND [SMT].[StationID]='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "' AND [SMT].Side='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' AND [SMT].Part_Key='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Part_Key & "' GROUP BY [SMT].[StationID],[PD_idt_stations].[StationName],[PD_idt_stations].[SortNo],[SMT].[MachineID],[SMT].[Part_Key],[PP].[Part_No],[SMT].[Side] order by [SortNo],[Part_No],[Side] ASC", False)

        If dtHanwha.Rows.Count > 0 Then

            total = dtHanwha.Rows(0).Item("Total")

        End If

        Return total
    End Function

#Region "COM Ports"
    Dim individual_counter As Integer = 0

    Private Sub tmr_coms_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_coms.Tick
        If ExData.port_usage = True Then
            Select Case DB9_Conection_Stage
                Case "INICIO"
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    'MOVE TO STAGE 2 BY DEFAULT - HERE ONLY READ AOI
                    DB9_Conection_Stage = "WAIT SENSOR 1"

                    escanead_correcto = False '2020-01-23 EM: TO ensure scan the units...

                Case "WAIT SENSOR 1"
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    'HERE WAIT FOR UNIT--- IF SENSOR 1 IS PRESENT (ON)
                    If DB9_1_Pin6.stado Then
                        'KEEP AOI OUTPU ON
                        If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                            DB9_1.RtsEnable = False 'DISABLE AOI SEND UNITS
                            txtaoibusy.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                        End If

                        'GO TO WAIT BOARD IN SENSOR 2
                        DB9_Conection_Stage = "WAIT SENSOR 2"

                    Else
                        'WAITING
                        lblstg2msg.Text = "Esperando tablilla"

                        If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                            DB9_1.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                            txttrigger.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                            DB9_1.RtsEnable = True 'ALLOW AOI SEND UNITS
                            txtaoibusy.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                        End If

                        If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                            DB9_2.RtsEnable = False 'ENABLE MOTOR 1
                            txtMotor1.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                        End If

                    End If

                Case "WAIT SENSOR 2"

                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    ' WAITING FOR SECOND SENSOR...
                    If DB9_1_Pin8.stado Then
                        If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                            DB9_2.RtsEnable = True 'DISABLE MOTOR 1
                            txtMotor1.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                        End If

                        'CHECK IF BAD...
                        'ACTION USING AOI STATUS
                        If DB9_1_Pin1.stado = True Or estuvo_mal Then
                            'ASK ABOUT GOOD BAD
                            tmr_coms.Stop()

                            Dim options = New frm_SMT_aoiResultSelect

                            If options.ShowDialog() = System.Windows.Forms.DialogResult.OK Then
                                'Open defect
                                selectedDefectCode = -1
                                txt_serial.Select()
                                ShowFormBig(New frm_a_d_defects)
                                Me.Focus()
                                selectedDefectCode = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.defectoselec
                                DefectDepartment = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.defectodepartmenselec - 1
                                Dim bus = ExData.Selected_Area.TablaDefectCodes.Select("DefectCodeID='" & selectedDefectCode & "'")
                                If bus.Length > 0 Then
                                    Rb_reject.Checked = True
                                    DefectCodeName = bus(0).Item(1)
                                    lbldefect.Text = DefectCodeName
                                    lbldefect.ForeColor = Color.Red
                                End If

                                DB9_Conection_Stage = "SCANING BOARDS"
                            Else
                                'MOVE NEXT STAGE

                                DB9_Conection_Stage = "SCANING BOARDS"
                            End If

                            tmr_coms.Start()


                        Else
                            'MOVE TO STAGE 3 if is good

                            DB9_Conection_Stage = "SCANING BOARDS"
                        End If
                    Else
                        'WAITING
                        lblstg3msg.Text = "Esperando tablilla"
                    End If
                Case "SCANING BOARDS"
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    If Rb_reject.Checked Then
                        'IS BAD
                        tmr_coms.Stop()

                        Dim options = New frm_SMT_untiBadBoard

                        If options.ShowDialog() = System.Windows.Forms.DialogResult.OK Then
                            'Open defect
                            Dim serial As String = options.serial
                            txt_serial.Text = serial
                            btn_Add.PerformClick()

                            DB9_Conection_Stage = "MOVE TO 3 SENSOR"
                        Else
                            'MOVE NEXT STAGE

                            DB9_Conection_Stage = "MOVE TO 3 SENSOR"
                        End If

                        tmr_coms.Start()
                    Else
                        'IS GOOD: Waiting by board.
                        If DB9_1_Pin8.stado Then

                            DB9_Conection_Stage = "TURN ON CAMERA"

                            'Turn ON the scaner
                            If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                                If ExData.allow_manual_scanning = True Then
                                    individual_counter = 0
                                    txt_serial.Enabled = True
                                    Rb_pass.Enabled = True
                                    Rb_reject.Enabled = True
                                Else
                                    DB9_1.DtrEnable = True 'ON TRIGGER CAMERAS/ REPEAT STEP
                                    txttrigger.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                                    txt_serial.Enabled = False
                                    Rb_pass.Enabled = False
                                    Rb_reject.Enabled = False
                                End If
                            Else
                                MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.COMS_Scan_Fail)
                                DB9_Conection_Stage = "RESET SYSTEM"
                            End If
                        Else
                            'WAITING
                            lblstg3msg.Text = "Esperando tablilla"
                        End If
                    End If
                Case "TURN ON CAMERA"

                    If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                        DB9_2.RtsEnable = True  'DISABLE MOTOR 1
                        txtMotor1.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                    End If

                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    If ExData.allow_manual_scanning = False Then
                        'TRY READ SERIAL
                        Try
                            '-- TRY READ DATA
                            Dim readed As Boolean = False
                            Dim serial_ssn As String = ""
                            If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                                Dim serial As String = DB9_1.ReadExisting
                                If serial.Length > 5 Then
                                    lblstg4msg.Text = serial
                                    serial_ssn = serial
                                    readed = True
                                End If
                            End If

                            If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                                Dim serial As String = DB9_2.ReadExisting.Replace("ERROR", "")
                                If serial.Length > 5 Then
                                    lblstg4msg.Text = serial
                                    serial_ssn = serial
                                    readed = True
                                End If
                            End If

                            If readed Then
                                txtstage4.Text = "OK"
                                'TURN OFF CAMERAS
                                If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                                    DB9_1.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                                    txttrigger.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                                End If

                                txt_serial.Text = serial_ssn
                                btn_Add.PerformClick()

                                '2020-01-23 EM: Escaneado incorrecto
                                If escanead_correcto = False Then
                                    If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                                        DB9_1.DtrEnable = True 'ON TRIGGER CAMERAS/ REPEAT STEP
                                        txttrigger.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                                    End If
                                Else
                                    txtstage4.BackColor = Color.Chartreuse
                                    txtstage4.ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen

                                    Try
                                        If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                                            DB9_2.RtsEnable = True 'DISABLE MOTOR 1
                                            txtMotor1.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                                        End If
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    '2020-01-26 EM: Wait some seconds (1)
                                    For i As Integer = 0 To Math.Floor(1 * 100)
                                        System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(10)
                                        'Application.DoEvents()
                                    Next

                                    DB9_Conection_Stage = "MOVE TO 3 SENSOR"
                                End If
                            Else
                                lblstg4msg.Text = "Esperando tablilla"
                                txtstage4.Text = "FALSE"
                                txtstage4.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                                txtstage4.ForeColor = Color.MistyRose
                                'DB9_Conection_Stage = "MOVE TO 3 SENSOR"
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                    End If
                Case "MOVE TO 3 SENSOR"
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                        DB9_1.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS/ REPEAT STEP
                        txttrigger.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                    End If

                    If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                        DB9_2.RtsEnable = False 'ENABLE MOTOR 1
                        txtMotor1.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    End If

                    'WAIT SENSOR 3 is ON...
                    If DB9_2_Pin6.stado = True Then
                        DB9_Conection_Stage = "WAIT SENSOR 3 OFF"

                        DB9_2.DtrEnable = True 'SET SMEMA 3/4 CLOSED (IS BOARD)
                        txtSmema34.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                    End If
                Case "WAIT SENSOR 3 OFF"
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    'WAIT SENSOR 3 is OFF...
                    If DB9_2_Pin6.stado = False Then
                        DB9_Conection_Stage = "RESET SYSTEM"
                    End If

                Case "WAIT ICT READY"
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    'WAIT ICT 3 is OFF...
                    If DB9_2_Pin8.stado = True Then
                        DB9_Conection_Stage = "RESET SYSTEM"
                    End If

                Case "RESET SYSTEM"
                    tblStage5.BackColor = Color.LightSteelBlue
                    tblStage1.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage2.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage3.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
                    tblStage4.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro

                    'USE TO RESET VALUES...
                    If DB9_1.IsOpen Then
                        DB9_1.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                        txttrigger.BackColor = Color.OrangeRed
                        DB9_1.RtsEnable = True 'ALLOW AOI SEND UNITS
                        txtaoibusy.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    End If

                    If DB9_2.IsOpen Then
                        DB9_2.RtsEnable = False 'ENABLE MOTOR 1
                        txtMotor1.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                        DB9_2.DtrEnable = False 'SET SMEMA 3/4 OPEN (NO BOARD)
                        txtSmema34.BackColor = Color.DarkGreen
                    End If


                    'DB9_1: aoi
                    'DB9_2: conveyor

                    '2020-02-18 EM: TO avoid erros wiht AOI
                    txt_serial.Enabled = False
                    Rb_pass.Enabled = False
                    Rb_reject.Enabled = False

                    estuvo_mal = False
                    DB9_Conection_Stage = "INICIO"

            End Select
        Else
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub
