                                                                            HistoryPanel.AddRange(Units.GetPanelResultHistory(ssnparent, "", "", "", ""))

                                                                            If HistoryPanel.Count > 0 Then
                                                                                Dim resultsPanel As List(Of UnitsHistory) = HistoryPanel.Where(Function(h) h.area = AreaName AndAlso h.side = area.Item("Side")).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                                                If resultsPanel.Count > 0 Then
                                                                                    If resultsPanel(0).isGood = True Then
                                                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                                                    Else
                                                                                        pasaprueba = False
                                                                                    End If
                                                                                Else
                                                                                    pasaprueba = False
                                                                                End If
                                                                            Else
                                                                                pasaprueba = False
                                                                            End If
                                                                        End If
                                                                    End If

                                                                    If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                                        insertAsBad = True
                                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                                        mensajesareainvalida += 1

                                                                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & AreaName & " " & area.Item(1), My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & AreaName & " " & area.Item(1), Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                                                        ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)

                                                                        Exit For
                                                                    End If
                                                                Catch ex As Exception
                                                                    insertAsBad = True
                                                                End Try
                                                            End If
                                                        Next
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            Else

                                                '0.1 Check if more that scan allowed

                                                '0.2 Check if more that scan allowed Per PART

                                                '0 - Check if units is locked due failure in process
                                                If insertTracking Then
                                                    Try

                                                        Dim dtUnitStatus = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [IsGood] FROM [PD_tbl_units_wip] where (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConversion) order by trndate desc", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                        If dtUnitStatus.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                            If dtUnitStatus.Rows(0).Item(0) = False Then
                                                                'Check if area allow failures...
                                                                If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Failures_Allowed > 0 Then
                                                                    Dim failures_before As Integer = 0

                                                                    Dim dt_count As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking] where SSN=@SSN and AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' and TrnDate<GETDATE()", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                                    If dt_count.Rows.Count < ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID_Failures_Allowed Then
                                                                        'Scans are below of allowed. OK
                                                                    Else
                                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                                        mensajesreparacion += 1
                                                                        Continue For
                                                                    End If
                                                                ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID_Failures_Allowed > 0 Then
                                                                    Dim failures_before As Integer = 0

                                                                    Dim dt_count As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking] where SSN=@SSN and AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' and TrnDate<GETDATE()", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                                    If dt_count.Rows.Count < ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID_Failures_Allowed Then
                                                                        'Scans are below of allowed. OK
                                                                    Else
                                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                                        mensajesreparacion += 1
                                                                        Continue For
                                                                    End If
                                                                Else
                                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                                    mensajesreparacion += 1
                                                                    Continue For
                                                                End If
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    End Try
                                                End If

                                                '1 - Custom Areas Validations
                                                If insertTracking Then
                                                    Try
                                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                                                            Dim dt_steps As DataTable = New DataTable()

                                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                                dt_steps = BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate,JobSide FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConversion) and PartID=PartID Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter)
                                                            End If

                                                            dt_steps.Merge(BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate,JobSide FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConversion) and PartID=PartID Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter))

                                                            For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows
                                                                Try
                                                                    Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False

                                                                    '2024-05-30 EM: Check when have FCT if rework was performed
                                                                    Dim pasaFCTafterRework As Boolean = True

                                                                    If area.Item("AreaID") = ExData.CONF_fct_area_id Then

                                                                        pasaFCTafterRework = False

                                                                        Dim restulsFCTANDREWOR As DataRow() = dt_steps.Select("AreaID = '" & ExData.CONF_fct_area_id & "' OR AreaID = '" & ExData.CONF_rework_area_id & "'", "TrnDate DESC")

                                                                        If restulsFCTANDREWOR.Length > 0 Then
                                                                            If restulsFCTANDREWOR(0).Item("AreaID") = ExData.CONF_fct_area_id Then
                                                                                pasaFCTafterRework = True
                                                                            Else
                                                                                'Means need a new retest due have functional.
                                                                            End If
                                                                        End If

                                                                    Else
                                                                        pasaFCTafterRework = True
                                                                    End If

                                                                    If pasaFCTafterRework = True Then
                                                                        Dim results As DataRow() = dt_steps.Select("AreaID = '" & area.Item("AreaID") & "' AND JobSide='" & area.Item("Side") & "'", "TrnDate DESC")

                                                                        If results.Length > 0 Then
                                                                            If results(0).Item(0) = True Then
                                                                                pasaprueba = True
                                                                            Else
                                                                                pasaprueba = False
                                                                            End If
                                                                        Else
                                                                            pasaprueba = False
                                                                        End If
                                                                    End If

                                                                    If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                                        insertTracking = False

                                                                        If pasaFCTafterRework = False Then
                                                                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1) & " DUE REWORK. TEST AGAIN.", My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                                                            ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1) & " DUE REWORK. TEST AGAIN.", ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                                        Else
                                                                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                                                            ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                                        End If

                                                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1)
                                                                        txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                                        txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                                        Exit For
                                                                    End If
                                                                Catch ex As Exception
                                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                                End Try
                                                            Next
                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    End Try
                                                End If

                                                '2 - CHECK AOI RESULTS
                                                If insertTracking Then
                                                    Try
                                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasAOIToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                            For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasAOIToReview.Rows
                                                                Try
                                                                    Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False

                                                                    Dim unitresult = Units.GetAOIResult(ssnchild, area.Item(2), area.Item(0))

                                                                    If unitresult.isGood Then
                                                                        pasaprueba = True
                                                                    End If

                                                                    If pasaprueba = False Then
                                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                                        mensajesmissingaoi += 1

                                                                        mensajesmissingaoitext = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1)

                                                                        ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & " AOI " & area.Item(1)
                                                                        txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                                        txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                                        Exit For
                                                                    End If
                                                                Catch ex As Exception
                                                                    insertTracking = False
                                                                End Try
                                                            Next
                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception
                                                        insertTracking = False
                                                    End Try
                                                End If

                                                '3 - Check If Ignoer after failure
                                                If insertTracking Then
                                                    Try
                                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                                                            If _forcevalues Then
                                                                IsGood = _isgood
                                                            End If

                                                            If IsGood = False Then
                                                                For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasIgnoreFailuresIfPass.Rows

                                                                    Dim dt_steps As DataTable = New DataTable()

                                                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                                        dt_steps = BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate,JobSide FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConversion) and AreaID='" & area.Item(0).ToString() & "' Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter)
                                                                    End If


                                                                    dt_steps.Merge(BeConn.GetDt("SELECT IsGood,AreaID,TrnDate,JobSide FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConversion) and AreaID='" & area.Item(0).ToString() & "' Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter))

                                                                    If dt_steps.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                                        If dt_steps.Rows(0).Item(0) = True Then
                                                                            insertTracking = False

                                                                            txtmsg.Text = "Ignore Failure due " & area.Item(1)
                                                                            txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                                                            txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                                                            Exit For
                                                                        End If
                                                                    Else

                                                                    End If
                                                                Next

                                                            End If

                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    End Try
                                                End If

                                                '4 - Check if units is locked by QA
                                                If insertTracking Or ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.SegregateQAUnits Then 'If insertTracking Then
                                                    Try
                                                        Dim ssnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                    {
                                                                        New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssnchild}
                                                                    }

                                                        Dim dt_unitlocked As DataTable = New DataTable()

                                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                            dt_unitlocked = BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT SN,Comments FROM QA_tbl_lockunitspvs WHERE SN=@SSN Order By TrnDate desc", ssnParameter, False)
                                                        End If

                                                        dt_unitlocked.Merge(BeConn.GetDt("SELECT SN,Comments FROM QA_tbl_lockunitspvs WHERE SN=@SSN Order By TrnDate desc", ssnParameter, False))

                                                        If dt_unitlocked.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                            insertTracking = False

                                                            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.dtLockedQAUnits.Rows.Add(ssnchild, "")

                                                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Unit_LockedQA & ssnchild & " " & dt_unitlocked.Rows(0).Item("Comments"), "Unit Locked", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                                            ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit " & ssnchild & " locked by QA", ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                                            Continue For
                                                        End If

                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    End Try
                                                End If


                                                '5 Check if units is rework and not QA...
                                                If insertTracking Then
                                                    Try
                                                        'If have process of QA validation after Rework
                                                        If ExData.req_rework_threesteps Then

                                                            Dim areaid As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("Select isnull(StatusAreaID,0) as StatusAreaID from PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                            If areaid = ExData.CONF_diagnostic_area_id Or areaid = ExData.CONF_rework_area_id Then
                                                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Unit " & ssnchild & " not release by QA after rework", "Unit Locked", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                                                ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit " & ssnchild & " not release by QA after rework", ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                                                txt_serial.Select()
                                                                Continue For
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    End Try
                                                End If

                                                '5.1 Locked due a failure in process (Is in rework)

                                            End If

                                            'Revisar si necesita reimpresion...
                                            If insertTracking And ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_printunit_area_id Then

                                                'INTERPLANT: OPTION NOT AVAILABLE 

                                                Dim originalssn As String = ssnchild

                                                Dim conversionssn As String = originalssn

                                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Packout_Check_Conversion Then
                                                    Dim ssnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                {
                                                                    New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = originalssn},
                                                                    New SqlParameter("@ConversionSSN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = conversionssn}
                                                                }

                                                    Try
                                                        Dim dt_conversion As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT TOP 1 ssn FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion] where [Child_SSN]=@SSN order by trndate desc", ssnParameter)

                                                        For Each convesion In dt_conversion.Rows
                                                            conversionssn = convesion.Item(0)
                                                        Next
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    End Try

                                                    'Check ssn is not printed
                                                    Dim dt_printed As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AutoID],[SSN],[TrnDate] FROM [PD_tbl_units_conversion_printer] WHERE SSN=@SSN or SSN=@ConversionSSN", ssnParameter)

                                                    If dt_printed.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG("Unit already printed, call QA to delete it. Unidad impresa recientemente, llama a calidad para liberar la unidad.", "DUPLICATE UNIT")
                                                        ExFunctions.saveerror("Unit already printed", ssnchild, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                                        ExFunctions.AddDefectToList(ssn, "Unit already printed")
                                                        txt_serial.Text = ""
                                                        txt_serial.Select()

                                                        Exit Sub
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            End If

                                            If insertTracking = False And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.ScanningByTool = True Then
                                                insertTracking = True
                                            End If

                                            'Check if previos validations area OK!
                                            If insertTracking = False Then
                                                'No CONTINUAR!
                                            Else

                                                Dim unitStage As Integer = -99



                                                Dim hasCorrect As Boolean = False

                                                If useAPIS Then

                                                    hasCorrect = True

                                                Else

                                                    'If have conversion before this stage!
                                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HaveConversionBefore Then
                                                        unitStage = BeConn.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@ConversionSSN or ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
                                                    Else
                                                        unitStage = BeConn.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                            Dim oldunitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                            If oldunitStage > unitStage And oldunitStage > 0 Then
                                                                unitStage = oldunitStage
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                        If unitStage = -99 Then
                                                            'Review OLD database temporal.
                                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HaveConversionBefore Then
                                                                unitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@ConversionSSN or ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
                                                            Else
                                                                unitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)


                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If



                                                    'Check if meet any option to do the transaction

                                                    '7 - IS NEW and Stage is 1.
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID = 1 Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '8 - COME FROM PREVIOUS STAGE OR IS NEW  (IF LAST RECORD IN PREVOUS OP WAS OK)
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (Math.Abs(unitStage) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID - 1) Then
                                                        If useAPIS Then
                                                            If History.Count > 0 Then
                                                                Dim HistoryOfPreviousStage = History.Where(Function(h) h.area = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaName AndAlso h.side = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                                If HistoryOfPreviousStage.Count > 0 Then
                                                                    If HistoryOfPreviousStage(0).isGood = True Then
                                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                                    Else

                                                                    End If
                                                                End If
                                                            End If
                                                        Else
                                                            Dim previousresult As Boolean = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT  isgood FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide & "' ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                                If previousresult = False Then
                                                                    previousresult = BeConn_OLD.GetBoolean("SELECT  isgood FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide & "' ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnConvertionWIPParameter)
                                                                End If
                                                            End If

                                                            If previousresult = True Then
                                                                hasCorrect = True
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    '9 - COME FROM CURRENT OR BEST OPERATION
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (Math.Abs(unitStage) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID And Math.Abs(unitStage) <> 99) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '10 - IS BAD BUT SAME OPERATION AND IS ALLOWED TO CORRECT ACTION
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (unitStage < 0 And Math.Abs(unitStage) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) And Data_From_Extractor = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    ' 11 - IS RMA
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_rma_area_id) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    ' 12 - IS Quality Inpsection
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_Quality_Inspection_area_id) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '13 - IS MERGED BEFORE PROCESS (NO HISTORY)
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.shouldMergeBeforeProcess = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanelWithChilds = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '14 - IGNORE STAGES
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.IgnorarStages = True) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    'Check if last valid operation is valid
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 Then
                                                        Dim oldstageid As Integer = 0

                                                        Dim tempoldStage As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT  case WHEN isgood=1 THEN abs(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage) else -1 * abs(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage) END as STAGE FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking INNER JOIN PD_tbl_rutes ON PD_tbl_units_tracking.AreaID = PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID AND PD_tbl_units_tracking.JobSide = PD_tbl_rutes.Side AND PD_tbl_units_tracking.PartID = PD_tbl_rutes.PartID WHERE (PD_tbl_units_tracking.SSN = @SSN) ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                        If tempoldStage <> 0 Then
                                                            oldstageid = tempoldStage
                                                        End If

                                                        'LAST VALID OPERATION IS SAME (REWORK)
                                                        If (Math.Abs(oldstageid) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) Then
                                                            hasCorrect = True
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    If hasCorrect = False And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.ScanningByTool = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If
                                                End If


                                                'PERFORM IF IS CORRECT!
                                                If hasCorrect = False Then
                                                    If unitStage < 0 And Math.Abs(unitStage) <> 99 Then
                                                        mensajesreparacion += 1
                                                        Continue For
                                                    Else
                                                        xlocHelp = unitStage
                                                        mensajesareainvalida += 1
                                                        Continue For
                                                    End If
                                                Else

                                                    'Es prod normal
                                                    ' Tercer candado: No este duplicado en el area/lado

                                                    ' Valores por default, Continuda, es Bueno, es Retrabajo
                                                    Dim IsRework As Boolean
                                                    IsRework = False

                                                    ' Indice de la pieza
                                                    Dim ssnindex As Integer = 1

                                                    ' Si esta duplicado, por el momento solo avisar
                                                    'TODO Si esta duplicado no dejar escanea

                                                    Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT SSN,TrnDate,JobNumber,JobID,JobType,PartID,JobSide,GroupMLS FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE SSN=@SSN AND AreaID='" & temp_areaid & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "'", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                    If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                        ssnindex = dt.Rows.Count + 1
                                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_duplicate : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                                                        duplicado += 1
                                                        IsRework = True
                                                    End If

                                                    Dim JobDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID
                                                    Dim JobTypeDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType
                                                    Dim JobNumberDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber
                                                    Dim PartIDDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID
                                                    If (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.FromPartID <> ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.toPartID) And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.topart Then
                                                        PartIDDePieza = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.toPartID
                                                    End If
                                                    Dim JobSideDePieza As String = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side

                                    End If

                                    ' Vaciar serial y seleccionar
                                    txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                                Else
                                    'Go And CLOSE THE JOB
                                    BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_jobs_normal SET StatusID=0, Job_Status_Key='" & Planning_Job_Completed & "' WHERE jobid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber & "' and JobType='" & ExData.Planning_Type_Job & "' and areaid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and Side='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' ")

                                    'UPDATE THE JO
                                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Select a new JOB, process the material before exit. Selecciona otro Job, no olvides procesar el material antes de salir.", "Job Complete", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                                    txt_serial.Select()
                                End If
                            Else
                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            End If
                        End If
                    Else
                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Pallet not match with the part no. El pallet no coincide con el numero de parte.", "Pallet Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                        txt_serial.Text = ""
                        txt_serial.Select()
                    End If


                    Pallet_SlotNo = -1
                    lblSlot.Text = "--"
                End If
            Else
                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Serial coincide con mas de dos modelos. " & pn_coincide & "Remueve uno.", "Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
            End If
        End If

        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then
            var_stageid = 0
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Sub counteriszeroMail()
        Dim dtC As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT top 1 u.Username as Name,u.email as Email From IT_tbl_emails_suscriptions a INNER JOIN HR_idt_users u ON a.ControlID = u.ControlID WHERE  (a.ReporteID='80' OR a.ReporteID=0)")

        Dim sendt As Boolean = False

        Try
            Dim mm As New MailMessage()
            mm.From = New MailAddress("autoemail@firstronic.com", "BeFirst")

            For Each rowe As DataRow In dtC.Rows
                Dim name As String = rowe("Name").ToString()
                Dim email As String = rowe("Email").ToString()
                mm.To.Add(email)
                sendt = True
            Next

            mm.Subject = "Pallet locked " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber & " - " & ExData.Selected_Area.StationName & " - " & ExData.Tool_Name

            Dim mensaje As String = ""

            mensaje = mensaje & "Process:<br />" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationName & "<br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "<br />Partnumber:<br />" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber & "<br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "<br />Tool Name:<br />" & ExData.Tool_Name & "<br />"


            mensaje = mensaje & "<br />Details: <br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "Pallet locked more than 6000 Cycles" & ": " & ExData.Tool_Name & "<br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "<br /><hr><br />This is an automatically generated email – please do not reply to it. If you have any queries please email emarquez@firstronic.com."

            mm.Body = mensaje

            mm.IsBodyHtml = True
            Dim smtp As New SmtpClient()
            smtp.Host = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result]  FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='SMTPServer'")
            smtp.EnableSsl = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT CAST([Result] as bit)  FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='SMTPSSL'")
            Dim credentials As New System.Net.NetworkCredential()
            credentials.UserName = Settings.SMTPEmail.setting_Value
            credentials.Password = Settings.SMTPPassword.setting_Value
            smtp.UseDefaultCredentials = True
            smtp.Credentials = credentials
            smtp.Port = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result]  FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='SMTPPort'")
            If sendt = True Then
                Try
                    smtp.Send(mm)
                Catch ex6 As Exception

                End Try
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Form1_FormClosing(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles Me.FormClosing
        If changesMade = 1 Then 'cannot close
            e.Cancel = True
            'code save chages 
        ElseIf changesMade = 2 Then

            tmr_extractor.Stop()
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()

            'can close
            Try
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Close()
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Dispose()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In tcp_IsRunning
                    tcp_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                For Each kvp In tcp_Listeners
                    kvp.Value?.Stop()
                Next
                tcp_Listeners.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In smb_IsRunning
                    smb_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                smb_Paths.Clear()
                smb_FilePattern.Clear()
                smb_ReadInterval.Clear()
                smb_Types.Clear()
                smb_Domains.Clear()
                smb_Usernames.Clear()
                smb_Passwords.Clear()
                smb_ProcessedFiles.Clear()
                smb_LastRead.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            e.Cancel = False
            frm_a_b_Login.Close()
        ElseIf changesMade = 3 Then

            tmr_extractor.Stop()
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()

            'can close
            Try
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Close()
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Dispose()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In tcp_IsRunning
                    tcp_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                For Each kvp In tcp_Listeners
                    kvp.Value?.Stop()
                Next
                tcp_Listeners.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In smb_IsRunning
                    smb_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                smb_Paths.Clear()
                smb_FilePattern.Clear()
                smb_ReadInterval.Clear()
                smb_Types.Clear()
                smb_Domains.Clear()
                smb_Usernames.Clear()
                smb_Passwords.Clear()
                smb_ProcessedFiles.Clear()
                smb_LastRead.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            e.Cancel = False
            frm_a_b_Login.Close()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click_1(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_load1.Click
        If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_fix_plex_area_id Then
            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = 1
            Dim options = New frm_WAVE_plexCorrections()
            options.ShowDialog()
            refreshdata(1)
        Else
            Dim unload As Boolean = False
            If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And Data_From_Extractor = False Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    btn_process1.PerformClick()
                    unload = True
                    'Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                    'If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                    '    unload = True
                    'End If
                Else
                    unload = True
                End If
            Else
                unload = True
            End If

            If unload Then
                Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                    If frm.Name = "frm_WAVE_jobSelection" Then
                        frmisOPen = True
                    End If
                Next

                If frmisOPen = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = 1
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection()
                    options.ShowDialog()
                    refreshdata(1)
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Async Sub ShowForm2(WhichForm As Form)
        With WhichForm
            .ShowDialog()
            .BringToFront()
        End With
        Await Task.Delay(2000)
    End Sub

    Public Sub colorx(qty As Integer)
        imt1.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt2.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt3.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt4.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt5.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray

        If qty Mod 5 >= 1 Then
            imt1.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty Mod 5 >= 2 Then
            imt2.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty Mod 5 >= 3 Then
            imt3.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If
        If qty Mod 5 >= 4 Then
            imt4.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty >= 5 And qty Mod 5 = 0 Then
            imt5.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If
    End Sub

            Dim ConnectionString As String = ExData.ConnectionString

            For Each aoimachine As DataRow In dt_Extractors.Rows

                Dim directoriosuccessGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim StationID As Integer = aoimachine.Item("StationID")

                Dim SearchName As String = aoimachine.Item("MachineName")

                Dim Path As String = directoriolecturaGood
                Dim PathSuccess As String = directoriosuccessGood


                If IO.Directory.Exists(Path) Then
                    Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(Path, "*.TST")
                    Dim texto As String = ""

                    For Each sFile As String In files

                        Dim blnIgnoreFiles As Boolean = True

                        If sFile.Contains("_" & SearchName & "_") Then
                            blnIgnoreFiles = False
                        End If

                        If blnIgnoreFiles Then

                        Else
                            texto = IO.File.ReadAllText(sFile)

                            Try
                                Dim strLines As String() = texto.Split(New [Char]() {CChar(vbCrLf)}).Select((Function(s) s.Trim)).ToArray()

                                'Solo asegurar es valido
                                If strLines.Length > 0 Then


                                    'OBTENER NUMERO DE PARTE
                                    Dim line1 As String()

                                    If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                        line1 = strLines(1).Trim.Split(",")
                                    Else
                                        line1 = strLines(0).Trim.Split(",")
                                    End If

                                    'OBTENER SIDE
                                    If line1(0).Substring(8, 1) = "A" Then
                                        line1(0) = line1(0).Substring(0, 8) + line1(0).Substring(9, 5) + "A"
                                    End If

                                    If line1(0).Substring(8, 1) = "B" Then
                                        line1(0) = line1(0).Substring(0, 8) + line1(0).Substring(9, 5) + "B"
                                    End If

                                    Dim partnumber As String = line1(0).Substring(0, 13).Replace("_", "-")

                                    Dim found = dt_PartNumbersAvailables.Select("PartNumber='" & line1(0).Substring(0, 3).Replace("_", "-") & "'")

                                    Try
                                        found = dt_PartNumbersAvailables.Select("PartNumber='" & partnumber & "'")
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    If PreviousPartNumber <> partnumber Then
                                        Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(True, partnumber)
                                        If resultado = False Then
                                            PreviousPartNumber = ""
                                            Exit Sub
                                        Else
                                            PreviousPartNumber = partnumber
                                        End If
                                    Else
                                        PreviousPartNumber = partnumber
                                    End If

                                    If found.Length > 0 Then
                                        'Obtener partID
                                        Dim partid As Integer = found(0).Item("PartID")

                                        Dim ifGoodUnlockUnit As Boolean = True
                                        'Check if unlock

                                        Dim dtDisableUnlock As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AutoID] FROM [Quality_Inspection_AOI_ChangeStatus_DisableOK] where partid='" & partid & "' and areaid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "'")

                                        If dtDisableUnlock.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                            ifGoodUnlockUnit = False
                                        End If

                                        Dim sideid As String = "A"
                                        If line1(0).Length > 13 Then
                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(13, 1)
                                        End If
                                        If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(5, 1)
                                            If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                                sideid = "A"
                                            End If
                                        End If

                                        Dim arraqty As Integer

                                        If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                            arraqty = strLines(4).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        Else
                                            arraqty = strLines(3).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        End If

                                        'Fecha
                                        Dim line2 As String()

                                        If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                            line2 = strLines(2).Trim.Split(",")

                                        Else
                                            line2 = strLines(1).Trim.Split(",")

                                        End If

                                        Dim Fecha As DateTime = DateTime.Now

                                        'DEFINE LINE
                                        Dim linea As Integer = StationID
                                        Dim AOIID As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID

                                        'BARCODE Panel
                                        Dim codigossn As String = ""

                                        Dim line3 As String

                                        If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                            line3 = strLines(3).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        Else
                                            line3 = strLines(2).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        End If

                                        If chReworkAOI.Checked Then

                                            'Check for serial Numbers 

                                            ExData.WAVE_AOIREWORK_SSN = ""

                                            Dim frmSerial As New frm_WAVE_aoirework

                                            frmSerial.ShowDialog()

    Public Function Load_PartNumber(extracto As Boolean, Optional pn As String = "", Optional pn_partid As Integer = -1, Optional bin As Integer = -1, Optional job As Integer = -1) As Boolean
        Dim resultado As Boolean = True
        Dim sel As Integer = 0

        Dim pnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                   {
                        New SqlParameter("@partid", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = pn_partid},
                        New SqlParameter("@partnumber", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = pn}
                   }

        Dim dt0 As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT partnumber,partid FROM [CS_idt_partnumbers] where partid=@partid or partnumber=@partnumber", pnParameter)

        If dt0.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            pn = dt0.Rows(0).Item(0)
            pn_partid = dt0.Rows(0).Item(1)

            If extracto = True Then
                tmr_extractor.Stop()
                sel = 1
                ExData.Selected_Area.CasillaReset(sel)
                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = sel

                Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                    If frm.Name = "frm_WAVE_jobSelection" Then
                        frmisOPen = True
                    End If
                Next

                If frmisOPen = False Then
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection(pn, bin, job, True)
                    options.ShowDialog()

                    refreshdata(sel)

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber <> pn Then
                        resultado = False
                    Else

                        tmr_extractor.Start()
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                sel = 1
                ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation = 1

                If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation6 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation5 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation4 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation3 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 > 1 Then
                    Dim optionssel = New frm_a_d_casillaPositionSelect
                    optionssel.ShowDialog()
                End If

                sel = ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation


                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation

                Dim unload As Boolean = False
                If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And Data_From_Extractor = False Then
                    Select Case sel
                        Case 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 2
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 3
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 4
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 5
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 6
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                    End Select
                Else
                    unload = True
                End If

                If unload Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = sel
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection(pn, bin, job)
                    options.ShowDialog()
                    refreshdata(sel)

                    Select Case sel
                        Case 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 2
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 3
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 4
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 5
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 6
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                    End Select
                End If

            End If
        Else
            resultado = False
        End If



        Return resultado
    End Function

    Private Sub DataReceivedHandler(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadExisting()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then
            'sensor1 = False
            sensor1_active = False
        Else
            sensor1_active = True
            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()
            Try
                If Incoming_Text.Length > 0 Then
                    If Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 1 Then
                        Try
                            If Math.Abs(DateDiff(DateInterval.Minute, DateTime.Now, lastunit_date)) < 120 Then
                                sensor1 = True
                            Else
                                sensor1 = False
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                    ElseIf Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 0 Then
                        sensor1 = False
                    End If
                Else
                    'sensor1 = False
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sensor1 = False
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DataReceivedHandler_Scanner(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadExisting()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then
            'sensor1 = False
            'sensor1_active = False
        Else
            'sensor1_active = True
            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()
            Try
                If Incoming_Text.Length > 0 Then
                    If Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 1 Then
                        Try
                            If Math.Abs(DateDiff(DateInterval.Minute, DateTime.Now, lastunit_date)) < 120 Then
                                sensor1 = True
                            Else
                                sensor1 = False
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                    ElseIf Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 0 Then
                        sensor1 = False
                    End If
                Else
                    'sensor1 = False
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sensor1 = False
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub


    Private sensor1 As Boolean = False
    Private sensor1_active As Boolean = False
    Private downtime_new As Boolean = False

    Private Sub tmr_sensors_dw_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_sensors_dw.Tick
        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors Then
            If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.IsOpen = False Then
                'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Red
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.Red
            Else
                If sensor1_active Then
                    'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Lime
                    sensor1_active = False
                Else
                    'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If
            End If
            If sensor1 Then
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.Lime
                ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
                If x_use = False Then
                    x_use = True
                    x = 0
                    lbl_timer.Text = GetTime(0)
                    lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Black
                    ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = 80
                    ExData.Selected_Area.LastPiece = DateTime.Now()
                    downtime_new = False
                End If
            Else
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red

                If x Mod 15 = 0 And x_use = False And downtime_new = True Then
                    x_use = True
                    revisarDWt()
                End If

                If downtime_new = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
                    frm_a_d_downtime.ShowDialog(Me)
                    downtime_new = True
                    ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Async Sub btn_process1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_process1.Click
        If btn_process1.Enabled And ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PackoutStage = False Then
            Dim alltransaction As Boolean = True

            If ExData.CONF_Plex_Recursive_Transactions = False Then
                alltransaction = False
            End If

            Await BePlex.Do_Transaction_RecursiveAsync(alltransaction, True, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Selected, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Building_Key, If(ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobType = 1, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobNumber, ""), ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales, txt_pendientesplex1.Text)

            Try
                ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Clear()
                txt_pendientesplex1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            ExFunctions.updateplexinfo(ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Selected, False, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Quantity, lbl_wk1, lbl_pnplex1, lbl_plexop1, Nothing, lbl_plexjob1)
        End If

        ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.UpdateComparation(dt_vs1)
    End Sub

    '========================
    'SCANNER KEYENCE SR700

    Dim var_stageid As Integer = 0
    Dim escanead_correcto As Boolean = False
    Dim estuvo_mal As Boolean = False '2020-01-26 EM: USE TO CATCH BAD BOARD FROM AOI...



    Private Sub cbAutoScanner_CheckedChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cbAutoScanner.CheckedChanged
        If cbAutoScanner.Checked Then
            Try
                'LOAD COMS
                CONF_SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner()

                var_stageid = 0

                tmr_io.Start()
                tmr_coms.Start()
                ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        Else
            ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = False

            If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
            End If
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_io_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_io.Tick
        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then

            'Read_DB9_Values()
        Else
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim scannerold As String = ""
    Public Property VerifyValidation As Integer

    Private Sub tmr_coms_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_coms.Tick
        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then
            Select Case var_stageid
                Case 0
                    If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                        SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = True 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS

                        var_stageid = 1
                    End If
                Case 1
                    Try
                        '-- TRY READ DATA
                        Dim readed As Boolean = False
                        Dim serial_ssn As String = ""
                        If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                            Dim serial As String = SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.ReadExisting
                            If serial.Length > 10 Then
                                serial_ssn = serial.Trim
                                lblscanner.Text = serial_ssn
                                readed = True
                            End If
                        End If

                        If readed Then
                            'TURN OFF CAMERAS
                            If scannerold <> serial_ssn Then

                                If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                                End If

                                var_stageid = 2

                                scannerold = serial_ssn
                                txt_serial.Text = serial_ssn
                                btn_Add.PerformClick()
                            Else

                            End If
                        End If
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                Case 2
                    'DO Nothing UNtil 

            End Select
        Else
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub
