    Private Sub chReworkAOI_CheckedChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles chReworkAOI.CheckedChanged

        'Delete all files in AOI...

        If Data_From_Extractor_Type = 14 Then
            Dim ConnectionString As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='DataBase_Machines'")
            Dim Connection As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(ConnectionString)

            For Each aoimachine As DataRow In dt_Extractors.Rows

                Dim directoriolecturaGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim directoriosuccessGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim StationID As Integer = aoimachine.Item("StationID")

                Dim SearchName As String = aoimachine.Item("MachineName")

                Dim Path As String = directoriolecturaGood
                Dim PathSuccess As String = directoriosuccessGood


                If IO.Directory.Exists(Path) Then
                    Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(Path, "*.TST")
                    Dim texto As String = ""

                    For Each sFile As String In files

                        Dim blnIgnoreFiles As Boolean = True

                        If sFile.Contains("_" & SearchName & "_") Then
                            blnIgnoreFiles = False
                        End If

                        If blnIgnoreFiles Then

                        Else
                            texto = IO.File.ReadAllText(sFile)

                            Try
                                File.Delete(sFile)
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            Next
        End If



    End Sub

Private Sub lblpanel2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles lblpanel2.Click
        If Data_From_Extractor = False Then
            ' Get current state before changing
            Dim currentState As Boolean = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel
            Dim fromText As String = If(currentState, "Panel", "No Panel")
            Dim toText As String = If(currentState, "No Panel", "Panel")

            ' Ask for confirmation
            Dim confirmMessage As String = $"Are you sure you want to change from '{fromText}' to '{toText}'?"
            Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(confirmMessage, "Confirm Change", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)

            If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel = False
                Else
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel = True
                End If

Private Sub lblpanel2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles lblpanel2.Click
        If Data_From_Extractor = False Then
            ' Get current state before changing
            Dim currentState As Boolean = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel
            Dim fromText As String = If(currentState, "Panel", "No Panel")
            Dim toText As String = If(currentState, "No Panel", "Panel")

            ' Ask for confirmation
            Dim confirmMessage As String = $"Are you sure you want to change from '{fromText}' to '{toText}'?"
            Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(confirmMessage, "Confirm Change", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)

            If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel = False
                Else
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel = True
                End If

                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.isByPanel Then
                    lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel
                    lblpanel2.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel
                Else
                    lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
                    lblpanel2.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

#Region "SMB Credential API Declarations"
    ' Win32 API for network authentication
    Private Declare Function WNetAddConnection2 Lib "mpr.dll" Alias "WNetAddConnection2A" _
        (ByRef lpNetResource As NETRESOURCE, ByVal lpPassword As String, ByVal lpUsername As String, ByVal dwFlags As Integer) As Integer

    Private Declare Function WNetCancelConnection2 Lib "mpr.dll" Alias "WNetCancelConnection2A" _
        (ByVal lpName As String, ByVal dwFlags As Integer, ByVal fForce As Integer) As Integer

    <StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)>
    Private Structure NETRESOURCE
        Public dwScope As Integer
        Public dwType As Integer
        Public dwDisplayType As Integer
        Public dwUsage As Integer
        Public lpLocalName As String
        Public lpRemoteName As String
        Public lpComment As String
        Public lpProvider As String
    End Structure

    Private Const RESOURCETYPE_DISK As Integer = &H1
    Private Const CONNECT_UPDATE_PROFILE As Integer = &H1

    ' Helper function to decrypt password (simple implementation - enhance as needed)
    Private Function DecryptPassword(encryptedBytes As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(encryptedBytes) OrElse encryptedBytes Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        End If

        Try
            Dim bytes As Byte() = CType(encryptedBytes, Byte())
            If bytes.Length = 0 Then Return ""

            ' TODO: Implement proper decryption if passwords are encrypted
            ' For now, assuming plain text stored as bytes
            Return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(bytes)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("Password decryption error: " & ex.Message)
            Return ""
        End Try
    End Function

    ' Connect to SMB share with credentials
    Private Function ConnectSMB(remotePath As String, username As String, password As String, domain As String) As Boolean
        Try
            ' If no credentials provided, use current Windows credentials
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(username) AndAlso String.IsNullOrEmpty(password) Then
                Return True
            End If

            ' Extract the share path (without file path)
            Dim uri As New Uri(remotePath)
            Dim sharePath As String = "\\" & uri.Host & uri.LocalPath.Split("\"c)(0)

            ' Prepare username with domain if provided
            Dim fullUsername As String = username
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(domain) Then
                fullUsername = domain & "\" & username
            End If

            ' Create network resource structure
            Dim netResource As New NETRESOURCE()
            netResource.dwType = RESOURCETYPE_DISK
            netResource.lpRemoteName = sharePath

            ' Attempt connection
            Dim result As Integer = WNetAddConnection2(netResource, password, fullUsername, 0)

            If result = 0 Then
                Return True ' Success
            ElseIf result = 1219 Then
                ' Already connected - this is OK
                Return True
            Else
                Debug.WriteLine($"SMB connection failed with error code: {result}")
                Return False
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("ConnectSMB error: " & ex.Message)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    ' Disconnect from SMB share
    Private Sub DisconnectSMB(remotePath As String)
        Try
            Dim uri As New Uri(remotePath)
            Dim sharePath As String = "\\" & uri.Host & uri.LocalPath.Split("\"c)(0)
            WNetCancelConnection2(sharePath, 0, 1)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("DisconnectSMB error: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

#Region "TCP as SERVER"
    Private Sub tcp_StopServer(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            If tcp_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                tcp_IsRunning(casilla) = False
            End If
            If tcp_Listeners.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                tcp_Listeners(casilla)?.Stop()
                tcp_Listeners.Remove(casilla)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub tcp_SERVER_Add(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            ' Stop existing listener for this casilla if already running
            tcp_StopServer(casilla)

            Dim tcpRows As DataRowCollection
            Select Case casilla
                Case 1 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 2 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 3 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 4 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 5 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 6 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case Else : Return
            End Select

            If tcpRows.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim firstTCP As DataRow = tcpRows(0)
            If firstTCP("CLIENT_OR_SERVER").ToString() <> "SERVER" Then Return

            tcp_Types(casilla) = firstTCP("TCP_TYPE").ToString()
            tcp_PreviousSerials(casilla) = ""
            tcp_IsRunning(casilla) = True

            Dim listener As New TcpListener(IPAddress.Parse(firstTCP("IP").ToString()), CInt(firstTCP("Port")))
            listener.Server.SetSocketOption(SocketOptionLevel.Socket, SocketOptionName.ReuseAddress, True)
            listener.Start()
            tcp_Listeners(casilla) = listener

            Task.Run(Sub()
                         While tcp_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) AndAlso tcp_IsRunning(casilla)
                             Try
                                 Dim client As TcpClient = listener.AcceptTcpClient()
                                 Me.Invoke(Sub() lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " Connected: " & client.Client.RemoteEndPoint.ToString())
                                 Task.Run(Sub() server_Handle_Client(client, casilla))
                             Catch ex As SocketException
                                 If Not (tcp_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) AndAlso tcp_IsRunning(casilla)) Then Exit While
                             End Try
                         End While
                     End Sub)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("TCP Server Error (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub server_Handle_Client(client As TcpClient, casilla As Integer)
        Try
            Using stream As NetworkStream = client.GetStream()
                Dim buffer(1024) As Byte
                Dim bytesRead As Integer = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length)
                Dim receivedMessage As String = Encoding.ASCII.GetString(buffer, 0, bytesRead).Trim()

                Dim tcpType As String = If(tcp_Types.ContainsKey(casilla), tcp_Types(casilla), "")

                If receivedMessage.Length > 0 And tcpType = "InSight Vision Cognex" Then

                    Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                  lblscanner.Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("f") & " [C" & casilla & "] Received: " & receivedMessage
                                  ' Expected format: PartNumber;SSN;Result;Ref1;Status1;Ref2;Status2;...
                                  Dim parts() As String = receivedMessage.Split(";"c)
                                  If parts.Length < 3 Then Exit Sub

                                  Dim msgPartNumber As String = parts(0).Trim()
                                  Dim msgSSN As String = parts(1).Trim()
                                  Dim msgIsGood As Boolean = parts(2).Trim().ToUpper() = "TRUE"

                                  ' Avoid duplicate processing
                                  Dim prevSerial As String = If(tcp_PreviousSerials.ContainsKey(casilla), tcp_PreviousSerials(casilla), "")
                                  If msgSSN = prevSerial Then Exit Sub
                                  tcp_PreviousSerials(casilla) = msgSSN

                                  ' Get the casilla-specific part number and station ID
                                  Dim casillaPartNumber As String = ""
                                  Dim casillaStationID As Integer = 0
                                  Select Case casilla
                                      Case 1 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.StationID
                                      Case 2 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.StationID
                                      Case 3 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.StationID
                                      Case 4 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.StationID
                                      Case 5 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.StationID
                                      Case 6 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.StationID
                                  End Select

                                  ' Validate part number matches loaded casilla
                                  If msgPartNumber <> casillaPartNumber Then
                                      ' TODO: update casilla with new part number (msgPartNumber)
                                      ' Add the model-change logic here and return after updating
                                      Exit Sub
                                  End If

                                  ' Build comments string from failed circuit references (pairs after index 2)
                                  Dim comments As String = ""
                                  If Not msgIsGood AndAlso parts.Length > 3 Then
                                      Dim failedRefs As New List(Of String)
                                      Dim i As Integer = 3
                                      While i + 1 <= parts.Length - 1
                                          Dim refName As String = parts(i).Trim()
                                          Dim refPass As Boolean = parts(i + 1).Trim().ToUpper() = "TRUE"
                                          If Not refPass Then
                                              failedRefs.Add(refName)
                                          End If
                                          i += 2
                                      End While
                                      If failedRefs.Count > 0 Then
                                          comments = "Failed: " & String.Join(", ", failedRefs.ToArray())
                                      End If
                                  End If

                                  enviarssn(msgSSN, DateTime.Now(),
                                            ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID,
                                            casillaStationID,
                                            msgIsGood, 0, False, False, False, comments)
                              End Sub)
                End If

                Dim responseBytes() As Byte = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes("Message received.")
                stream.Write(responseBytes, 0, responseBytes.Length)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' client disconnected
        Finally
            client.Close()
        End Try
    End Sub
#End Region

#Region "SMB File Monitoring"
    Private Sub smb_SERVER_Add(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            Dim smbRows As DataRowCollection
            Select Case casilla
                Case 1 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 2 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 3 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 4 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 5 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 6 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case Else : Return
            End Select

            If smbRows.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim firstSMB As DataRow = smbRows(0)
            If Not Convert.ToBoolean(firstSMB("SMB_ENABLED")) Then Return

            smb_Paths(casilla) = firstSMB("SMB_PATH").ToString()
            smb_FilePattern(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_FILE_PATTERN")), "*.TXT", firstSMB("SMB_FILE_PATTERN").ToString())
            smb_ReadInterval(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_READ_INTERVAL")), 5000, CInt(firstSMB("SMB_READ_INTERVAL")))
            smb_Types(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_TYPE")), "", firstSMB("SMB_TYPE").ToString())
            smb_Domains(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_DOMAIN")), "", firstSMB("SMB_DOMAIN").ToString())
            smb_Usernames(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_USERNAME")), "", firstSMB("SMB_USERNAME").ToString())
            smb_Passwords(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED")), "", DecryptPassword(firstSMB("SMB_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED")))
            smb_IsRunning(casilla) = True
            smb_ProcessedFiles(casilla) = New List(Of String)
            smb_LastRead(casilla) = DateTime.MinValue

            Me.Invoke(Sub()
                          lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " SMB: " & smb_Paths(casilla)
                      End Sub)

            ' Connect to SMB with credentials
            Dim username As String = If(smb_Usernames.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Usernames(casilla), "")
            Dim password As String = If(smb_Passwords.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Passwords(casilla), "")
            Dim domain As String = If(smb_Domains.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Domains(casilla), "")

            If Not ConnectSMB(smb_Paths(casilla), username, password, domain) Then
                Me.Invoke(Sub()
                              MessageBox.Show("Failed to authenticate to SMB share (Casilla " & casilla & ")", "SMB Authentication Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                          End Sub)
                Return
            End If

            Task.Run(Sub()
                         While smb_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) AndAlso smb_IsRunning(casilla)

                             Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                           lblscanner.Text = "Running at " & DateTime.Now.ToString("f")
                                       End Sub)

                             Try
                                 If Not My.Computer.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(smb_Paths(casilla)) Then
                                     Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                                   MessageBox.Show("SMB Path not found (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & smb_Paths(casilla), "SMB Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                                               End Sub)
                                     smb_IsRunning(casilla) = False
                                     Exit While
                                 End If

                                 Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(smb_Paths(casilla), smb_FilePattern(casilla))

                                 For Each filePath In files
                                     If Not smb_ProcessedFiles(casilla).Contains(filePath) Then
                                         ProcessSMBFile(filePath, casilla, firstSMB)
                                         smb_ProcessedFiles(casilla).Add(filePath)
                                     End If
                                 Next

                                 smb_LastRead(casilla) = DateTime.Now
                                 System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(smb_ReadInterval(casilla))

                             Catch ex As UnauthorizedAccessException
                                 Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                               MessageBox.Show("SMB Access Denied (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message, "SMB Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                                           End Sub)
                                 smb_IsRunning(casilla) = False
                                 Exit While
                             Catch ex As Exception
                                 Debug.WriteLine("SMB Error (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message)
                             End Try
                         End While
                     End Sub)

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("SMB Server Init Error (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub ProcessSMBFile(filePath As String, casilla As Integer, config As DataRow)
        Try
            Dim fileContent() As String = File.ReadAllLines(filePath)

            Me.Invoke(Sub()
                          lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " Processing: " & Path.GetFileName(filePath) & " (" & fileContent.Length & " lines)"
                      End Sub)

            ' Get SMB Type for this casilla to determine processing logic
            Dim smbType As String = If(smb_Types.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Types(casilla), "")

            For Each line In fileContent
                If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(line) Then Continue For

                ' Process based on SMB Type
                Select Case smbType
                    Case "InSight Vision Cognex"
                        ' Expected format: PartNumber;SSN;Result;Ref1;Status1;Ref2;Status2;...
                        Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                      Dim parts() As String = line.Split(";"c)
                                      If parts.Length < 3 Then Exit Sub

                                      Dim msgPartNumber As String = parts(0).Trim()
                                      Dim msgSSN As String = parts(1).Trim()
                                      Dim msgIsGood As Boolean = parts(2).Trim().ToUpper() = "1"

                                      ' Get the casilla-specific part number and station ID
                                      Dim casillaPartNumber As String = ""
                                      Dim casillaStationID As Integer = 0
                                      Select Case casilla
                                          Case 1 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.StationID
                                          Case 2 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.StationID
                                          Case 3 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.StationID
                                          Case 4 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.StationID
                                          Case 5 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.StationID
                                          Case 6 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.StationID
                                      End Select

                                      ' Validate part number matches loaded casilla
                                      'If msgPartNumber <> casillaPartNumber Then
                                      '    ' TODO: update casilla with new part number (msgPartNumber)
                                      '    ' Add the model-change logic here and return after updating
                                      '    Exit Sub
                                      'End If

                                      ' Build comments string from failed circuit references (pairs after index 2)
                                      Dim comments As String = ""
                                      If Not msgIsGood AndAlso parts.Length > 3 Then
                                          Dim failedRefs As New List(Of String)
                                          Dim i As Integer = 3
                                          While i + 1 <= parts.Length - 1
                                              Dim refName As String = parts(i).Trim()
                                              Dim refPass As Boolean = parts(i + 1).Trim().ToUpper() = "1"
                                              If Not refPass Then
                                                  failedRefs.Add(refName)
                                              End If
                                              i += 2
                                          End While
                                          If failedRefs.Count > 0 Then
                                              comments = "Failed: " & String.Join(", ", failedRefs.ToArray())
                                          End If

                                          If comments.Length > 50 Then
                                              comments = comments.Substring(0, 49)
                                          End If
                                      End If

                                      enviarssn(msgSSN, DateTime.Now(),
                                                ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID,
                                                casillaStationID,
                                                msgIsGood, 0, False, False, False, comments)
                                  End Sub)

                    Case "Material Data"
                        ' Parse line as material serial or part number
                        ' Format: SERIAL|PARTNUMBER|QTY|etc.
                        Dim parts() As String = line.Split("|"c)

                        If parts.Length >= 2 Then
                            Dim serial As String = parts(0).Trim()
                            Dim partNumber As String = parts(1).Trim()

                            ' TODO: Process material (call existing material processing logic here)
                            Debug.WriteLine("Casilla " & casilla & " Material - Serial: " & serial & ", PartNumber: " & partNumber)
                        End If

                    Case "Serial Import"
                        ' Expected format: Single serial number per line
                        Dim serial As String = line.Trim()

                        ' TODO: Process serial import
                        Debug.WriteLine("Casilla " & casilla & " Serial Import - Serial: " & serial)

                    Case Else
                        ' Custom or unknown type - default parsing
                        ' Format: SERIAL|PARTNUMBER|QTY|etc.
                        Dim parts() As String = line.Split("|"c)

                        If parts.Length >= 2 Then
                            Dim serial As String = parts(0).Trim()
                            Dim partNumber As String = parts(1).Trim()

                            Debug.WriteLine("Casilla " & casilla & " Custom - Serial: " & serial & ", PartNumber: " & partNumber)
                        End If
                End Select
            Next

            ' Move to success directory if configured
            If Convert.ToBoolean(config("MOVE_TO_SUCCESS")) Then
                Dim successDir As String = Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(filePath), "success")

                If Not Directory.Exists(successDir) Then
                    Directory.CreateDirectory(successDir)
                End If

                Dim newPath As String = Path.Combine(successDir, Path.GetFileName(filePath) & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss"))
                File.Move(filePath, newPath)
            End If

        Catch ex As IOException
            ' File locked - will retry on next poll
            Debug.WriteLine("File locked: " & filePath)
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' Move to error directory if configured
            If Convert.ToBoolean(config("MOVE_TO_ERROR")) Then
                Dim errorDir As String = Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(filePath), "error")

                If Not Directory.Exists(errorDir) Then
                    Directory.CreateDirectory(errorDir)
                End If

                Dim newPath As String = Path.Combine(errorDir, Path.GetFileName(filePath) & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss") & ".err")

                Try
                    File.WriteAllText(newPath & ".log", ex.ToString())
                    File.Move(filePath, newPath)
                Catch
                    Debug.WriteLine("Error moving error file: " & filePath)
                End Try
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub smb_StopServer(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            If smb_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                smb_IsRunning(casilla) = False

                ' Disconnect from SMB share
                If smb_Paths.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                    DisconnectSMB(smb_Paths(casilla))
                End If

                smb_Paths.Remove(casilla)
                smb_FilePattern.Remove(casilla)
                smb_ReadInterval.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Types.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Domains.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Usernames.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Passwords.Remove(casilla)
                smb_ProcessedFiles.Remove(casilla)
                smb_LastRead.Remove(casilla)

                Me.Invoke(Sub()
                              lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " SMB Stopped"
                          End Sub)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error stopping SMB (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub
#End Region

    Private Sub TimerLastPiece_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Seconds.Tick
        ' TIMER PARA CONTAR SEGUNDOS
        x = x + 1
        x_use = False
        lbl_timer.Text = GetTime(x)

        If tmr_extractor.Enabled Then
            z = z - 1
            lbl_extractor.Text = GetTime(z)
        End If

        lblDate.Text = Now.ToString("ddd dd hh:mm")


        ' REVISAR SI CAMBIA DE HORA PARA ACTUALIZAR  RATE POR HORA
        If DateTime.Now() > ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora Then
            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora = ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora.AddHours(+1)

            'updateplex(False)
        End If

        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors = False Then
            ' REVISAR SI EXISE TIEMPO MUERTO
            If x >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False Then
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red
            End If

            ' Si hay tiempo muerto registrar... 
            If x >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And IsOpenDT = False And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True Then
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red
                IsOpenDT = True
                txtmsg.Text = "Waiting"
                If My.Forms.frm_a_d_downtime.ShowDialog(Me) = System.Windows.Forms.DialogResult.OK Then
                    IsOpenDT = False
                Else
                    IsOpenDT = False
                End If
                Me.Focus()
            End If
        Else
            ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub TimerHour_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_DownTime.Tick
        'Cada 2 minutos revisar si el timepo muerto no disminuye
        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors = False Then
            If x > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False Then
                revisarDWt()
            End If
        End If

        'Cada 2 minutos revisar si el timepo muerto no disminuye
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Cleanliness_Tools_Messages.Rows.Count > 0 And ExData.isOpen_frm_a_d_msgCleanliness = False Then
            For Each rowClean As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Cleanliness_Tools_Messages.Rows

                Dim inactiveminutes As Integer = CInt(rowClean.Item("InactiveMinutes"))
                Dim description As String = rowClean.Item("Description")

                If inactiveminutes > 0 Then
                    If inactiveminutes < Math.Floor(x / 60) Then

                        Dim cleanlessParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                            {
                                New SqlParameter("@description", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = description},
                                New SqlParameter("@inactiveminutes", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -inactiveminutes}
                            }

                        Dim dtLogs As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT[AutoID] FROM [Part_Station_Cleanliness_Log] WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main & "' and Description=@description AND TrnDate>DATEADD(MINUTE,@inactiveminutes,GETDATE())", cleanlessParameter)

                        If dtLogs.Rows.Count = 0 Then


                            Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                            For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                                If frm.Name = "frm_a_d_msgCleanliness" Then
                                    frmisOPen = True
                                End If
                            Next

                            If frmisOPen = False Then

                                ExData.frm_a_d_msgCleanliness_Message = description

                                ExData.isOpen_frm_a_d_msgCleanliness = True

                                Dim options = New frm_a_d_msgCleanliness()
                                options.ShowDialog()
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Next
        End If

        Try
            If tabbonus.SelectedIndex = 0 Then
                ExFunctions.ByHour(Data_History, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
    End Sub
