    Public Sub enviarplex(ssn As String, _trn As DateTime, _areaid As Integer, _stationid As Integer, _isgood As Boolean, _nestid As Integer, _forcevalues As Boolean, IsExtractor As Boolean)
        'Split Container values
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Job As Integer = -1
        Dim Quantity As Double = -1
        Dim PartNumber As String = ""
        Dim Part_Key As Integer = -1
        Dim Operation_Code As String = ""

        BePlex.Analyse_PlexQR(ssn, serial, Job, Quantity, PartNumber, Part_Key, Operation_Code)

        Dim TransactPLEX As Boolean = False

        If ExData.CONF_shipping_area_id = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID Then
            'Check if requieres box validation... 
            Dim int = BeConn.GetInteger("Select autoid from Part_Operation_Shipping_Validate_BoxQty WHERE stationid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")

            If int > 0 Then

                Dim partParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                    {
                        New SqlParameter("@PartNumber", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = PartNumber}
                    }

                Dim qtybox As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT [BoxSize] FROM [CS_idt_partnumbers] where PartNumber = @PartNumber", partParameter)

                If qtybox > 0 Then
                    If qtybox = Quantity Then
                        TransactPLEX = True
                    Else
                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Others_Quantity_Invalid, My.Resources.Messages.Others_Quantity_Invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                        txt_serial.Text = ""
                        txt_serial.Select()
                    End If
                Else
                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.PartNumber_No_Configured, My.Resources.Messages.PartNumber_No_Configured, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()
                End If
            Else
                TransactPLEX = True
            End If
        Else
            TransactPLEX = True
        End If

        If TransactPLEX Then

            'Just verifies serial not in EOM
            Dim serialParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                    {
                        New SqlParameter("@Serial_No", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = serial}
                    }

            Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select EOM FROM PD_tbl_units_shipping_inventory WHERE Serial_No=@Serial_No", serialParameter)

            If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                If dt.Rows(0).Item(0) = 1 Then
                    'Es EOM SOLO actualziar....
                    BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_units_shipping_inventory SET EOM=0 and trndate=getdate() WHERE Serial_No=@Serial_No", serialParameter)

                    'Print serial
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_BIN4BIN = False Then
                        BePlex.ds_Get_Container_label(serial)
                    End If

                    txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_success : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()
                Else
                    'NO es EOM, ya transaccionada
                    txtmsg.Text = "ERROR Duplicate serial." : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Red
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()
                End If
            Else
                If PartNumber.Length > 0 And Job > 0 Then
                    tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke

                    Dim match1 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match2 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match3 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match4 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match5 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match6 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex.Match(PartNumber)

                    Dim match1_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match2_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match3_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match4_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match5_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match6_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)

                    '2020-04-28 EM: Count matchs
                    Dim sucess_count As Integer = 0
                    Dim pn_coincide As String = ""
                    If (match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber
                    End If

                    If sucess_count = 0 Then
                        'Search Data Of PN for load...
                        If Data_From_Extractor Then
                            tmr_extractor.Stop()
                        End If

                        Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(False, PartNumber, -1, -1, Job)
                        If resultado = False Then
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        End If
                    ElseIf sucess_count = 1 Then
                        Dim seleccion As Integer = 1

                        Dim pass As Boolean = False
                        If (match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 1
                            tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(1)

                        ElseIf (match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 2
                            tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(2)

                        ElseIf (match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 3
                            tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(3)

                        ElseIf (match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 4
                            tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(4)

                        ElseIf (match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 5
                            tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.MintCream


                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(5)
                        ElseIf (match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 6
                            tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(6)
                        Else
                            pass = False
                        End If

                        Dim temp_areaid As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID
                        Dim temp_stationid As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID

                        If _forcevalues Then
                            temp_stationid = _stationid
                            temp_areaid = _areaid
                        End If

                        If pass Then

                            'Review OPERATIONS! serto the box!
                            Dim areFiltersOK As Boolean = True

                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                'GET BOX ID AS STRING

                                Dim boxParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                    {
                                        New SqlParameter("@BoxID", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = serial}
                                    }

                                Dim containerPackoutParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                    {
                                        New SqlParameter("@Container_ID_Packout", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = serial}
                                    }

                                Dim BoxID As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT BoxID FROM [PD_tbl_units_packed] where Container_ID_Packout=@Container_ID_Packout and DelDate is null order by TrnDate desc", containerPackoutParameter)

                                If BoxID.Length = 0 Then
                                    areFiltersOK = False
                                    'ERROR!
                                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                                    txt_serial.Select()

                                Else

                                    Dim dt_steps As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AreaID],[IsGood] FROM [Part_Operation_Packout_Boxes_Tracking] WHERE BoxID=@BoxID Order by TrnDate desc", boxParameter)

                                    For Each area As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.AreasToReview.Rows
                                        Dim pasaprueba As Boolean = False
                                        Dim results As DataRow() = dt_steps.Select("AreaID = '" & area.Item(0) & "'", "TrnDate DESC")

                                        If results.Length > 0 Then
                                            If results(0).Item(0) = True Then
                                                pasaprueba = True
                                            Else
                                                pasaprueba = False
                                            End If
                                        Else
                                            pasaprueba = False
                                        End If

                                        If pasaprueba = False Then
                                            areFiltersOK = False

                                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1), Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                            txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.msgmissing & area.Item(1)
                                            txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(191, 0, 1)
                                            txtmsg.BackColor = Color.MistyRose
                                            Exit For
                                        End If
                                    Next
                                End If
                            End If

                            If areFiltersOK Then
                                ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = ExData.DEF_DefaultDownTimeCode
                                ExData.WAVE_ssnforpallet = ssn

                                BePlex.ds_Container_Move(serial, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Code)

                                If Operation_Code = "Packout (FG)" Then
                                    txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_success : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                                Else
                                    BePlex.Do_Transaction_WithPlex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key_Kanban, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_PLC_Name, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_PLC_Name_Kanban, serial, Job, Quantity, PartNumber, Part_Key, Operation_Code, txtmsg, ch_EOM.Checked, ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)
                                End If

                                ' Actualizar estacion
                                BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_idt_stations SET IsActive='True',DownTimeCodeID='80',LastPieceTime=GETDATE(),LastPartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "',LastSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' WHERE StationID='" & temp_stationid & "'")

                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            Else
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            End If
                        Else
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        End If
                    End If
                ElseIf PartNumber.Length > 0 And Job = -1 Then
                    tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
                    tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke

                    Dim match1 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match2 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match3 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match4 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match5 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match6 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex.Match(PartNumber)

                    Dim match1_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match2_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match3_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match4_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match5_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)
                    Dim match6_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex_panel.Match(PartNumber)

                    '2020-04-28 EM: Count matchs
                    Dim sucess_count As Integer = 0
                    Dim pn_coincide As String = ""
                    If (match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber
                    End If
                    If (match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success) And If(Job > 0, Job = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.JobNumber, True) Then
                        sucess_count += 1
                        pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber
                    End If

                    If sucess_count = 0 Then
                        'Search Data Of PN for load...
                        If Data_From_Extractor Then
                            tmr_extractor.Stop()
                        End If

                        Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(False, PartNumber, -1, -1, Job)
                        If resultado = False Then
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        End If
                    ElseIf sucess_count = 1 Then
                        Dim seleccion As Integer = 1

                        Dim pass As Boolean = False
                        If (match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 1
                            tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(1)

                        ElseIf (match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 2
                            tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(2)

                        ElseIf (match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 3
                            tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(3)

                        ElseIf (match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 4
                            tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(4)

                        ElseIf (match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 5
                            tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.MintCream


                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(5)
                        ElseIf (match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.model Then
                            pass = True
                            seleccion = 6
                            tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                            'GETVALUES
                            ExFunctions.SelectedGet(6)
                        Else
                            pass = False
                        End If

                        Dim temp_areaid As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID
                        Dim temp_stationid As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID

                        If _forcevalues Then
                            temp_stationid = _stationid
                            temp_areaid = _areaid
                        End If

                        If pass Then
                            ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = ExData.DEF_DefaultDownTimeCode
                            ExData.WAVE_ssnforpallet = ssn

                            BePlex.ds_Container_Move(serial, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Code)

                            If Operation_Code = "Packout (FG)" Then
                                txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_success : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                            Else
                                BePlex.Do_Transaction_WithPlex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_Key_Kanban, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_PLC_Name, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.DS_Workcenter_PLC_Name_Kanban, serial, Job, Quantity, PartNumber, Part_Key, Operation_Code, txtmsg, ch_EOM.Checked, ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)
                            End If

                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_idt_stations SET IsActive='True',DownTimeCodeID='80',LastPieceTime=GETDATE(),LastPartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "',LastSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' WHERE StationID='" & temp_stationid & "'")


                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Please scan QR code", My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()

                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim Pallet_IsOpen As Integer = 0

    Dim Pallet_CycleMinutes As Integer = 5

    Dim Pallet_SlotNo As Integer = -1

    Public Async Sub enviarssn(ssn As String, _trn As DateTime, _areaid As Integer, _stationid As Integer, _isgood As Boolean, _nestid As Integer, _forcevalues As Boolean, IsExtractor As Boolean, IsGage As Boolean, Optional Comments As String = "", Optional extractorpanel As Boolean = False)

        tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke

        Dim match1 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match2 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match3 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match4 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match5 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match6 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex.Match(ssn)

        Dim match1_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match2_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match3_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match4_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match5_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match6_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex_panel.Match(ssn)

        '2020-04-28 EM: Count matchs
        Dim sucess_count As Integer = 0
        Dim pn_coincide As String = ""
        If match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber
        End If
        If match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber
        End If
        If match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber
        End If
        If match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber
        End If
        If match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber
        End If
        If match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber
        End If

        Dim ssn_isapallet As Boolean = False

        'Clean SegregateList
        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.dtLockedQAUnits.Rows.Clear()


        'Save picture 
        If chPicture.Checked Then

            ExData.WAVE_PICTURE_SSN = ""

            ExData.WAVE_PICTURE_SSN = ssn

            Dim optiosnPicture As New frm_a_d_picture_add_simple
            optiosnPicture.ShowDialog()

        End If


        If sucess_count < 1 And IsExtractor = False Then
            If IsGage Then
                txt_serial.Text = ""
                txt_serial.Select()
            Else
                Dim showerror As Boolean = True

                If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets = True Then
                    Dim matchPallet As Match = Pallet_Regex.Match(ssn)
                    If matchPallet.Success Then

                        Dim originalpallet As String = ssn
                        Dim tempslotno As Integer = -1

                        If (originalpallet.Contains("/") Or originalpallet.Contains("\")) And (originalpallet.Contains(ExData.Tool_Name) = False Or ExData.Tool_Name = "") Then
                            showerror = False

                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Please first scan the pallet. Favor de escanear el pallet primero.", "Pallet Error.", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()

                        Else
                            'Check if is a slot, contains "/"
                            If ssn.Contains("/") Then
                                Dim elements = ssn.Split("/")
                                Try
                                    ssn = elements(0)
                                    tempslotno = elements(1)
                                    Pallet_SlotNo = tempslotno
                                    lblSlot.Text = Pallet_SlotNo
                                    showerror = False
                                Catch ex As Exception

                                End Try
                            Else
                                ssn_isapallet = True
                                showerror = False

                                'Cancel current pallet
                                Pallet_Scanned = False
                                Pallet_Serial = ""
                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1

                                Dim toolParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                    {
                                        New SqlParameter("@ToolName", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                                    }

                                Dim dtTools As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [ToolID],[ToolName],[PartID],[Side],[BinID],[Quantity_Allowed],[Cleanliness_Frecuency],[CycleCounter] FROM [Engineering_Tools] WHERE ToolName=@ToolName", toolParameter)

                                If dtTools.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                    Dim damage As Boolean = False
                                    Dim Counterexceeded As Boolean = False


                                    If BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [ToolID] FROM [Engineering_Tools] where ToolName=@ToolName and ToolStatusID=3", toolParameter) Then
                                        damage = True
                                    End If

                                    If dtTools.Rows(0).Item(7) <= 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CycleCounter Then
                                        damage = True
                                        Counterexceeded = True

                                    End If


                                    If damage = False Then

                                        'Check clean 
                                        Dim cleansize As Integer = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(6)

                                        'Uses after clean
                                        Dim cleanlessParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                            {
                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolName", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssn},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(0)}
                                            }

                                        Dim uses As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT count(distinct Tool_Name_Unique) FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking_pallet] WHERE Tool_Name=@ToolName AND TrnDate>isnull((SELECT MAX(TrnDate) FROM Engineering_Tools_Cleaness WHERE ToolID=@ToolID),DATEADD(DD,-7,GETDATE()))", cleanlessParameter)

                                        If ExData.CONF_Production_WAVE_Pallet_Clean = False Then
                                            uses = 0
                                        End If

                                        Dim boolTime As Boolean = True

                                        If boolTime Then
                                            If uses <= cleansize Then
                                                If uses = cleansize - 1 Then
                                                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_Clean_1, "Advertencia", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor, 2)
                                                End If
                                                Pallet_Scanned = True
                                                Pallet_Serial = ssn & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")
                                                ExData.Tool_Name = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(1)
                                                ExData.Tool_Name_ID = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(0)
                                                Pallet_SerialID = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(0)
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(5)
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(5)
                                                lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0

                                                txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew
                                                txtmsg.Text = "Escanear unidades"
                                            Else
                                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_Clean_2, "Advertencia", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor, 2)
                                                MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_First)
                                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                                txt_serial.Select()
                                                Pallet_Scanned = False
                                                Pallet_Serial = ""
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                                Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                                ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                                ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                            End If
                                        Else
                                            MsgBox("Usada en menos de " & Pallet_CycleMinutes & " minutos.")
                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                            Pallet_Scanned = False
                                            Pallet_Serial = ""
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                            Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                            ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                        End If
                                    Else
                                        If Counterexceeded And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CycleCounter Then
                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                            Pallet_Scanned = False
                                            Pallet_Serial = ""
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                            Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(1)
                                            counteriszeroMail()
                                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE [dbo].[Engineering_Tools]  SET [ToolStatusID] = 3 WHERE ToolName = '" & ExData.Tool_Name & "'")
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                            ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Counterexceeded_B, My.Resources.Messages.Counterexceeded_A, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)

                                        Else
                                            MsgBox("Pallet dañado, llamar a ingeneria.")
                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                            Pallet_Scanned = False
                                            Pallet_Serial = ""
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                            Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                            ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                        End If

                                    End If
                                ElseIf ssn.Contains("REWORK") Then
                                    Pallet_Scanned = True
                                    Pallet_Serial = ssn & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("mmss")
                                    ExData.Tool_Name = Pallet_Serial
                                    ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                    Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                    Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 10
                                    Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 10
                                    lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed
                                    Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0

                                    txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew
                                    txtmsg.Text = "Escanear unidades retrabajo"
                                Else
                                    MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_not_exist)
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If
                    ElseIf ssn = "EMPTYUNIT" Then
                        If Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed > 0 Then

                            showerror = False

                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed - 1
                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No + 1
                            lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed

                            If ExData.Tool_Name_ID <> -1 Then
                                Dim insertParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                           {
                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = 1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectCodeID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets_ToStationID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNIndex", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = 99},
                                                New SqlParameter("@Tool_Name", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name},
                                                New SqlParameter("@Tool_Name_Unique", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = Pallet_Serial},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolID_1", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name_ID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobType", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobNumber", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobSide", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SlotNo", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No}
                                           }

                                BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_tracking_pallet] (PartID,IsGood,DefectCodeID,StationID,TrnDate,SSN,ControlID,SSNIndex,Tool_Name,Tool_Name_Unique,ToolID_1,JobID,JobType,JobNumber,JobSide,SlotNo)  VALUES  (@PartID,@IsGood,@DefectCodeID,@StationID,GETDATE(),@SSN,@ControlID,@SSNIndex,@Tool_Name,@Tool_Name_Unique,@ToolID_1,@JobID,@JobType,@JobNumber,@JobSide,@SlotNo)", insertParameter)

                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

                If showerror Then

                    'Search Data Of PN for load...
                    Dim ssnVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                        {
                            New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                        }

                    Dim dt_history As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE SSN=@SSN and AreaID = '" & ExData.CONF_smt_area_id & "' Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter)

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                        dt_history.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE SSN=@SSN and AreaID = '" & ExData.CONF_smt_area_id & "' Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter))
                    End If


                    If dt_history.Rows.Count = 0 Then
                        dt_history = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE SSN=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                            dt_history.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE SSN=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter))
                        End If
                    End If

                    If dt_history.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                        Dim jobid As Integer = -1

                        Try
                            If dt_history.Rows(0).Item(2) = 1 Then
                                jobid = dt_history.Rows(0).Item(3)
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try

                        If Data_From_Extractor Then
                            tmr_extractor.Stop()
                        End If

                        Dim partid As Integer = dt_history.Rows(0).Item(0)

                        If partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartID Then
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, partid)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else
                            Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(False, "", dt_history.Rows(0).Item(0), dt_history.Rows(0).Item(1), jobid)
                            If resultado = False Then
                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            Else
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            End If
                        End If
                    Else
                        If cbAutoScanner.Checked = False Then

                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
