                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Please scan QR code", My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()

                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim Pallet_IsOpen As Integer = 0

    Dim Pallet_CycleMinutes As Integer = 5

    Dim Pallet_SlotNo As Integer = -1

    Public Async Sub enviarssn(ssn As String, _trn As DateTime, _areaid As Integer, _stationid As Integer, _isgood As Boolean, _nestid As Integer, _forcevalues As Boolean, IsExtractor As Boolean, IsGage As Boolean, Optional Comments As String = "", Optional extractorpanel As Boolean = False)

        tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke

        Dim match1 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match2 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match3 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match4 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match5 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex.Match(ssn)
        Dim match6 As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex.Match(ssn)

        Dim match1_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match2_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match3_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match4_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match5_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.regex_panel.Match(ssn)
        Dim match6_panel As Match = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.regex_panel.Match(ssn)

        '2020-04-28 EM: Count matchs
        Dim sucess_count As Integer = 0
        Dim pn_coincide As String = ""
        If match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber
        End If
        If match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber
        End If
        If match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber
        End If
        If match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber
        End If
        If match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber
        End If
        If match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success Then
            sucess_count += 1
            pn_coincide = pn_coincide & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber
        End If

        Dim ssn_isapallet As Boolean = False

        'Clean SegregateList
        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.dtLockedQAUnits.Rows.Clear()


        'Save picture 
        If chPicture.Checked Then

            ExData.WAVE_PICTURE_SSN = ""

            ExData.WAVE_PICTURE_SSN = ssn

            Dim optiosnPicture As New frm_a_d_picture_add_simple
            optiosnPicture.ShowDialog()

        End If


        If sucess_count < 1 And IsExtractor = False Then
            If IsGage Then
                txt_serial.Text = ""
                txt_serial.Select()
            Else
                Dim showerror As Boolean = True

                If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets = True Then
                    Dim matchPallet As Match = Pallet_Regex.Match(ssn)
                    If matchPallet.Success Then

                        Dim originalpallet As String = ssn
                        Dim tempslotno As Integer = -1

                        If (originalpallet.Contains("/") Or originalpallet.Contains("\")) And (originalpallet.Contains(ExData.Tool_Name) = False Or ExData.Tool_Name = "") Then
                            showerror = False

                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Please first scan the pallet. Favor de escanear el pallet primero.", "Pallet Error.", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()

                        Else
                            'Check if is a slot, contains "/"
                            If ssn.Contains("/") Then
                                Dim elements = ssn.Split("/")
                                Try
                                    ssn = elements(0)
                                    tempslotno = elements(1)
                                    Pallet_SlotNo = tempslotno
                                    lblSlot.Text = Pallet_SlotNo
                                    showerror = False
                                Catch ex As Exception

                                End Try
                            Else
                                ssn_isapallet = True
                                showerror = False

                                'Cancel current pallet
                                Pallet_Scanned = False
                                Pallet_Serial = ""
                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1

                                Dim toolParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                    {
                                        New SqlParameter("@ToolName", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                                    }

                                Dim dtTools As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [ToolID],[ToolName],[PartID],[Side],[BinID],[Quantity_Allowed],[Cleanliness_Frecuency],[CycleCounter] FROM [Engineering_Tools] WHERE ToolName=@ToolName", toolParameter)

                                If dtTools.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                    Dim damage As Boolean = False
                                    Dim Counterexceeded As Boolean = False


                                    If BeConn.GetBooleanFromQuery("SELECT [ToolID] FROM [Engineering_Tools] where ToolName=@ToolName and ToolStatusID=3", toolParameter) Then
                                        damage = True
                                    End If

                                    If dtTools.Rows(0).Item(7) <= 0 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CycleCounter Then
                                        damage = True
                                        Counterexceeded = True

                                    End If


                                    If damage = False Then

                                        'Check clean 
                                        Dim cleansize As Integer = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(6)

                                        'Uses after clean
                                        Dim cleanlessParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                            {
                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolName", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssn},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(0)}
                                            }

                                        Dim uses As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT count(distinct Tool_Name_Unique) FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking_pallet] WHERE Tool_Name=@ToolName AND TrnDate>isnull((SELECT MAX(TrnDate) FROM Engineering_Tools_Cleaness WHERE ToolID=@ToolID),DATEADD(DD,-7,GETDATE()))", cleanlessParameter)

                                        If ExData.CONF_Production_WAVE_Pallet_Clean = False Then
                                            uses = 0
                                        End If

                                        Dim boolTime As Boolean = True

                                        If boolTime Then
                                            If uses <= cleansize Then
                                                If uses = cleansize - 1 Then
                                                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_Clean_1, "Advertencia", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor, 2)
                                                End If
                                                Pallet_Scanned = True
                                                Pallet_Serial = ssn & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss")
                                                ExData.Tool_Name = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(1)
                                                ExData.Tool_Name_ID = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(0)
                                                Pallet_SerialID = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(0)
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(5)
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(5)
                                                lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0

                                                txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew
                                                txtmsg.Text = "Escanear unidades"
                                            Else
                                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_Clean_2, "Advertencia", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor, 2)
                                                MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_First)
                                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                                txt_serial.Select()
                                                Pallet_Scanned = False
                                                Pallet_Serial = ""
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                                Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                                Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                                ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                                ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                            End If
                                        Else
                                            MsgBox("Usada en menos de " & Pallet_CycleMinutes & " minutos.")
                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                            Pallet_Scanned = False
                                            Pallet_Serial = ""
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                            Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                            ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                        End If
                                    Else
                                        If Counterexceeded And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CycleCounter Then
                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                            Pallet_Scanned = False
                                            Pallet_Serial = ""
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                            Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = dtTools.Rows(0).Item(1)
                                            counteriszeroMail()
                                            BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE [dbo].[Engineering_Tools]  SET [ToolStatusID] = 3 WHERE ToolName = '" & ExData.Tool_Name & "'")
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                            ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Counterexceeded_B, My.Resources.Messages.Counterexceeded_A, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)

                                        Else
                                            MsgBox("Pallet dañado, llamar a ingeneria.")
                                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                                            txt_serial.Select()
                                            Pallet_Scanned = False
                                            Pallet_Serial = ""
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 0
                                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0
                                            Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                            ExData.Tool_Name = ""
                                            ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                        End If

                                    End If
                                ElseIf ssn.Contains("REWORK") Then
                                    Pallet_Scanned = True
                                    Pallet_Serial = ssn & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("mmss")
                                    ExData.Tool_Name = Pallet_Serial
                                    ExData.Tool_Name_ID = -1
                                    Pallet_SerialID = -1
                                    Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 10
                                    Pallet_Serial_Quantity = 10
                                    lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed
                                    Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0

                                    txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew
                                    txtmsg.Text = "Escanear unidades retrabajo"
                                Else
                                    MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_not_exist)
                                End If
                            End If
                        End If
                    ElseIf ssn = "EMPTYUNIT" Then
                        If Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed > 0 Then

                            showerror = False

                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed - 1
                            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No + 1
                            lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed

                            If ExData.Tool_Name_ID <> -1 Then
                                Dim insertParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                           {
                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = 1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectCodeID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -1},
                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets_ToStationID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_User.BeFirst_ControlID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SSNIndex", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = 99},
                                                New SqlParameter("@Tool_Name", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name},
                                                New SqlParameter("@Tool_Name_Unique", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = Pallet_Serial},
                                                New SqlParameter("@ToolID_1", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name_ID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobID},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobType", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobNumber", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber},
                                                New SqlParameter("@JobSide", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side},
                                                New SqlParameter("@SlotNo", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No}
                                           }

                                BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_tracking_pallet] (PartID,IsGood,DefectCodeID,StationID,TrnDate,SSN,ControlID,SSNIndex,Tool_Name,Tool_Name_Unique,ToolID_1,JobID,JobType,JobNumber,JobSide,SlotNo)  VALUES  (@PartID,@IsGood,@DefectCodeID,@StationID,GETDATE(),@SSN,@ControlID,@SSNIndex,@Tool_Name,@Tool_Name_Unique,@ToolID_1,@JobID,@JobType,@JobNumber,@JobSide,@SlotNo)", insertParameter)

                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                End If

                If showerror Then

                    'Search Data Of PN for load...
                    Dim ssnVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                        {
                            New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                        }

                    Dim dt_history As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE SSN=@SSN and AreaID = '" & ExData.CONF_smt_area_id & "' Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter)

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                        dt_history.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE SSN=@SSN and AreaID = '" & ExData.CONF_smt_area_id & "' Order By TrnDate desc", ssnVarcharParameter))
                    End If


                    If dt_history.Rows.Count = 0 Then
                        dt_history = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE SSN=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                            dt_history.Merge(BeConn_OLD.GetDt("SELECT PartID,GroupMLS,[JobType],[JobNumber] FROM PD_tbl_units_wip WHERE SSN=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter))
                        End If
                    End If

                    If dt_history.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                        Dim jobid As Integer = -1

                        Try
                            If dt_history.Rows(0).Item(2) = 1 Then
                                jobid = dt_history.Rows(0).Item(3)
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try

                        If Data_From_Extractor Then
                            tmr_extractor.Stop()
                        End If

                        Dim partid As Integer = dt_history.Rows(0).Item(0)

                        If partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartID Or partid = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartID Then
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, partid)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else
                            Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(False, "", dt_history.Rows(0).Item(0), dt_history.Rows(0).Item(1), jobid)
                            If resultado = False Then
                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            Else
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            End If
                        End If
                    Else
                        If cbAutoScanner.Checked = False Then

                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)

                        End If
                        saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                        txt_serial.Text = ""
                        txt_serial.Select()
                    End If
                Else
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()
                End If
            End If
            'AFTER PROCESS, RETURN VALUES BACK
        ElseIf sucess_count < 1 And IsExtractor = True Then
            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
            saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
            txt_serial.Text = ""
            txt_serial.Select()
        Else
            ExFunctions.CloseOpenTickets(ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)

            If sucess_count = 1 Then
                If Pallet_Scanned = False And ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets Then
                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_First, "Pallet Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()

                ElseIf ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets And Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed < 1 Then
                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_First, "Pallet Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()
                Else
                    Dim seleccion As Integer = 1
                    Dim pass As Boolean = False

                    If (match1.Success Or match1_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.model Then
                        pass = True
                        seleccion = 1
                        tbl_sel1.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                        'GETVALUES
                        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(1)

                    ElseIf (match2.Success Or match2_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.model Then
                        pass = True
                        seleccion = 2
                        tbl_sel2.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                        'GETVALUES
                        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(2)

                    ElseIf (match3.Success Or match3_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.model Then
                        pass = True
                        seleccion = 3
                        tbl_sel5.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                        'GETVALUES
                        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(3)

                    ElseIf (match4.Success Or match4_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.model Then
                        pass = True
                        seleccion = 4
                        tbl_sel3.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                        'GETVALUES
                        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(4)

                    ElseIf (match5.Success Or match5_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.model Then
                        pass = True
                        seleccion = 5
                        tbl_sel4.BackColor = Color.MintCream


                        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(5)
                    ElseIf (match6.Success Or match6_panel.Success) And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.model Then
                        pass = True
                        seleccion = 6
                        tbl_sel6.BackColor = Color.MintCream

                        'GETVALUES
                        ExFunctions.SelectedGet(6)
                    Else
                        pass = False
                    End If

                    'Revisar pieza coincide con pallet escaneado...
                    Dim palletfromunit As Boolean = False

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets = False Then
                        palletfromunit = True
                    Else

                        Dim toolParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                    {
                                        New SqlParameter("@ToolName", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name}
                                    }

                        Dim dtTool As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [ToolID],[ToolName],[PartID],[Side],[BinID],[Quantity_Allowed],[Cleanliness_Frecuency] FROM [Engineering_Tools] WHERE ToolName=@ToolName AND PartID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID & "'", toolParameter)
                        If dtTool.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                            palletfromunit = True
                        End If

                    End If

                    If palletfromunit Then

                        'HECK IF SLOT IS 
                        If Pallet_SlotNo < 1 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.ToolScanSlot Then

                            'Revisar si existe en tabal de Hand Assembly
                            Dim toolParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                    {
                                        New SqlParameter("@ToolName", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Tool_Name},
                                        New SqlParameter("@SSN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                                    }

                            Dim dt_pallettemp As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [SlotNo] FROM [PD_tbl_units_tracking_pallet_temp] where Tool_Name=@ToolName and SSN=@SSN and trndate>DATEADD(HOUR,-12,GETDATE()) order by trndate desc", toolParameter)

                            If dt_pallettemp.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Pallet_SlotNo = dt_pallettemp.Rows(0).Item(0)
                            End If

                        ElseIf Pallet_SlotNo < 1 Then
                            Pallet_SlotNo = 1
                        End If

                        If Pallet_SlotNo < 1 Then
                            ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Tool_Slot_First, "Pallet Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                            txt_serial.Text = ""
                            txt_serial.Select()
                        Else


                            'Review if need gage...
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isgage And IsGage = False And Rb_pass.Checked Then
                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_missing_wavegage_title, My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_units_missing_wavegage_title, ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                                Exit Sub
                            End If

                            Dim temp_areaid As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID
                            Dim temp_stationid As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID

                            If _forcevalues Then
                                temp_stationid = _stationid
                                temp_areaid = _areaid
                            End If

                            If IsExtractor Then
                                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = extractorpanel
                            End If

                            'Check if pass...

                            If pass Then
                                'checkai(False)
                                ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = ExData.DEF_DefaultDownTimeCode
                                ExData.WAVE_ssnforpallet = ssn

                                '09/04/2019 Actualizacion para aceptar por panel...
                                Dim indexpanel As Integer = 1
                                Dim actualizarpadre As Boolean = False

                                Dim regex1 As Regex

                                If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True And IsGage = False Then

                                    'Is by panel
                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.hasParentSSN Then
                                        Dim chilVarcharParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                {
                                                    New SqlParameter("@child", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = ssn}
                                                }

                                        ssn = BeConn.GetString("Select parente from PD_tbl_parents_smt where child=@child", chilVarcharParameter)

                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                            If ssn = "" Then
                                                ssn = BeConn_OLD.GetString("Select parente from PD_tbl_parents_smt where child=@child", chilVarcharParameter)
                                            End If
                                        End If

                                        If ssn = "" And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site <> "" Then
                                            Dim unitresult = Units.GetUnitsArrayGetChildsSITE(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Other_Site, ssn)

                                            If unitresult.Count > 0 Then
                                                ssn = unitresult(0).Parent
                                            End If
                                        End If

                                    End If

                                    'Serial panel verfication
                                    regex1 = New Regex(ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PanelPartIdFormat)
                                    Dim match As Match = regex1.Match(ssn)
                                    Dim stageactual As Integer = 0

                                    If (match.Success) Then
                                        'Çheck current status of panel.

                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.shouldMergeBeforeProcess Then

                                                    'If have conversion before this stage!
                                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HaveConversionBefore Then
                                                        unitStage = BeConn.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@ConversionSSN or ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
                                                    Else
                                                        unitStage = BeConn.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                            Dim oldunitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                            If oldunitStage > unitStage And oldunitStage > 0 Then
                                                                unitStage = oldunitStage
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                        If unitStage = -99 Then
                                                            'Review OLD database temporal.
                                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HaveConversionBefore Then
                                                                unitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@ConversionSSN or ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)
                                                            Else
                                                                unitStage = BeConn_OLD.GetInteger("Select case when min(StageID)<0 then isnull(-max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) else isnull(max(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage),-99) end from PD_tbl_units_wip left join PD_tbl_rutes on PD_tbl_units_wip.PartID=PD_tbl_rutes.PartID and PD_tbl_units_wip.JobSide=PD_tbl_rutes.Side and PD_tbl_units_wip.StatusAreaID=PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID where ssn=@SSN", ssnVarcharParameter)


                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If



                                                    'Check if meet any option to do the transaction

                                                    '7 - IS NEW and Stage is 1.
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID = 1 Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '8 - COME FROM PREVIOUS STAGE OR IS NEW  (IF LAST RECORD IN PREVOUS OP WAS OK)
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (Math.Abs(unitStage) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID - 1) Then
                                                        If useAPIS Then
                                                            If History.Count > 0 Then
                                                                Dim HistoryOfPreviousStage = History.Where(Function(h) h.area = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaName AndAlso h.side = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide).OrderByDescending(Function(h) h.trnDate).ToList()

                                                                If HistoryOfPreviousStage.Count > 0 Then
                                                                    If HistoryOfPreviousStage(0).isGood = True Then
                                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                                    Else

                                                                    End If
                                                                End If
                                                            End If
                                                        Else
                                                            Dim previousresult As Boolean = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT  isgood FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide & "' ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnConvertionWIPParameter)

                                                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Check_Old_Server = True Then
                                                                If previousresult = False Then
                                                                    previousresult = BeConn_OLD.GetBoolean("SELECT  isgood FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking WHERE (SSN=@SSN or SSN=@SSNConvertion) AND AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousAreaID & "' AND JobSide='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PreivousSide & "' ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", snnConvertionWIPParameter)
                                                                End If
                                                            End If

                                                            If previousresult = True Then
                                                                hasCorrect = True
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    '9 - COME FROM CURRENT OR BEST OPERATION
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (Math.Abs(unitStage) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID And Math.Abs(unitStage) <> 99) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '10 - IS BAD BUT SAME OPERATION AND IS ALLOWED TO CORRECT ACTION
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (unitStage < 0 And Math.Abs(unitStage) = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) And Data_From_Extractor = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    ' 11 - IS RMA
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_rma_area_id) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    ' 12 - IS Quality Inpsection
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_Quality_Inspection_area_id) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '13 - IS MERGED BEFORE PROCESS (NO HISTORY)
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.shouldMergeBeforeProcess = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanelWithChilds = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    '14 - IGNORE STAGES
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.IgnorarStages = True) Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If

                                                    'Check if last valid operation is valid
                                                    If hasCorrect = False And unitStage = -99 Then
                                                        Dim oldstageid As Integer = 0

                                                        Dim tempoldStage As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT  case WHEN isgood=1 THEN abs(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage) else -1 * abs(PD_tbl_rutes.Stage) END as STAGE FROM PD_tbl_units_tracking INNER JOIN PD_tbl_rutes ON PD_tbl_units_tracking.AreaID = PD_tbl_rutes.AreaID AND PD_tbl_units_tracking.JobSide = PD_tbl_rutes.Side AND PD_tbl_units_tracking.PartID = PD_tbl_rutes.PartID WHERE (PD_tbl_units_tracking.SSN = @SSN) ORDER BY PD_tbl_units_tracking.TrnDate DESC", ssnVarcharParameter)

                                                        If tempoldStage <> 0 Then
                                                            oldstageid = tempoldStage
                                                        End If

                                                        'LAST VALID OPERATION IS SAME (REWORK)
                                                        If (Math.Abs(oldstageid) >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.CurrentStageID) Then
                                                            hasCorrect = True
                                                        End If
                                                    End If

                                                    If hasCorrect = False And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.ScanningByTool = True Then
                                                        hasCorrect = True
                                                    End If
                                                End If


                                                'PERFORM IF IS CORRECT!
                                                If hasCorrect = False Then
                                                    If unitStage < 0 And Math.Abs(unitStage) <> 99 Then
                                                        mensajesreparacion += 1
                                                        Continue For
                                                    Else
                                                        xlocHelp = unitStage
                                                        mensajesareainvalida += 1
                                                        Continue For
                                                    End If
                                                Else

                                                    ' Tercer candado: No este duplicado en el area/lado

                                                    IsRework = False

                                                    Dim ssnindex As Integer = 1

                                                    'TODO Si esta duplicado no dejar escanea

                                                    If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                                        ssnindex = dt.Rows.Count + 1
                                                        txtmsg.Text = My.Resources.Messages.prod_duplicate : txtmsg.BackColor = Color.Honeydew : txtmsg.ForeColor = Color.Green
                                                        duplicado += 1

                                                    Dim JobTypeDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobType
                                                    Dim JobNumberDePieza As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber

                                                    If (ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.FromPartID <> ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.toPartID) And ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.topart Then

                                                    BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[PD_tbl_units_tracking] (PartID,IsGood,DefectCodeID,IsRework,StationID,TrnDate,JobID,JobType,JobNumber,JobSide,SSNPanel,SSN,ControlID,AreaID,SSNIndex,Shift,GroupMLS,SetupID,Comments,SSNQty,ToolID_1) VALUES (@PartID,@IsGood,@DefectCodeID,@IsRework,@StationID,@TrnDate,@JobID,@JobType,@JobNumber,@JobSide,@SSNPanel,@SSN,@ControlID,@AreaID,@SSNIndex,@Shift,@GroupMLS,@SetupID,@Comments,@SSNQty,@ToolID_1)", insertParameter)

                                                End If

                                        End If
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    'COME BACK VALUES FROM ON LIST>>>>>
                                    If seleccion = 1 Then
                                        'lbl_qty1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                                        SelectedSet(1)
                                    ElseIf seleccion = 2 Then
                                        'lbl_qty2.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                                        SelectedSet(2)
                                    ElseIf seleccion = 3 Then
                                        'lbl_qty3.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                                        SelectedSet(3)
                                    ElseIf seleccion = 4 Then
                                        'lbl_qty4.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                                        SelectedSet(4)
                                    ElseIf seleccion = 5 Then
                                        'lbl_qty5.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                                        SelectedSet(5)
                                    ElseIf seleccion = 6 Then
                                        'lbl_qty6.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobQtyBuild
                                        SelectedSet(6)
                                    End If

                                    ' Vaciar serial y seleccionar
                                    txt_serial.Text = "" : txt_serial.Select()
                                Else
                                    'Go And CLOSE THE JOB
                                    BeConn.UpdateRecords("UPDATE PD_tbl_jobs_normal SET StatusID=0, Job_Status_Key='" & Planning_Job_Completed & "' WHERE jobid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.JobNumber & "' and JobType='" & ExData.Planning_Type_Job & "' and areaid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "' and Side='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Side & "' ")

                                    'UPDATE THE JO
                                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Select a new JOB, process the material before exit. Selecciona otro Job, no olvides procesar el material antes de salir.", "Job Complete", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                                    txt_serial.Select()
                                End If
                            Else
                                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                                ExFunctions.saveerror(My.Resources.Messages.prod_serial_format.Split(".")(0), ssn, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartID)
                                txt_serial.Text = ""
                                txt_serial.Select()
                            End If
                        End If
                    Else
                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Pallet not match with the part no. El pallet no coincide con el numero de parte.", "Pallet Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                        txt_serial.Text = ""
                        txt_serial.Select()
                    End If


                    Pallet_SlotNo = -1
                    lblSlot.Text = "--"
                End If
            Else
                ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer("Serial coincide con mas de dos modelos. " & pn_coincide & "Remueve uno.", "Error", Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
            End If
        End If

        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then
            var_stageid = 0
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Sub counteriszeroMail()
        Dim dtC As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT top 1 u.Username as Name,u.email as Email From IT_tbl_emails_suscriptions a INNER JOIN HR_idt_users u ON a.ControlID = u.ControlID WHERE  (a.ReporteID='80' OR a.ReporteID=0)")

        Dim sendt As Boolean = False

        Try
            Dim mm As New MailMessage()
            mm.From = New MailAddress("autoemail@firstronic.com", "BeFirst")

            For Each rowe As DataRow In dtC.Rows
                Dim name As String = rowe("Name").ToString()
                Dim email As String = rowe("Email").ToString()
                mm.To.Add(email)
                sendt = True
            Next

            mm.Subject = "Pallet locked " & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber & " - " & ExData.Selected_Area.StationName & " - " & ExData.Tool_Name

            Dim mensaje As String = ""

            mensaje = mensaje & "Process:<br />" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationName & "<br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "<br />Partnumber:<br />" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.PartNumber & "<br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "<br />Tool Name:<br />" & ExData.Tool_Name & "<br />"


            mensaje = mensaje & "<br />Details: <br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "Pallet locked more than 6000 Cycles" & ": " & ExData.Tool_Name & "<br />"

            mensaje = mensaje & "<br /><hr><br />This is an automatically generated email – please do not reply to it. If you have any queries please email emarquez@firstronic.com."

            mm.Body = mensaje

            mm.IsBodyHtml = True
            Dim smtp As New SmtpClient()
            smtp.Host = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result]  FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='SMTPServer'")
            smtp.EnableSsl = BeConn.GetBoolean("SELECT CAST([Result] as bit)  FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='SMTPSSL'")
            Dim credentials As New System.Net.NetworkCredential()
            credentials.UserName = Settings.SMTPEmail.setting_Value
            credentials.Password = Settings.SMTPPassword.setting_Value
            smtp.UseDefaultCredentials = True
            smtp.Credentials = credentials
            smtp.Port = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result]  FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='SMTPPort'")
            If sendt = True Then
                Try
                    smtp.Send(mm)
                Catch ex6 As Exception

                End Try
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub Form1_FormClosing(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.FormClosingEventArgs) Handles Me.FormClosing
        If changesMade = 1 Then 'cannot close
            e.Cancel = True
            'code save chages 
        ElseIf changesMade = 2 Then

            tmr_extractor.Stop()
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()

            'can close
            Try
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Close()
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Dispose()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In tcp_IsRunning
                    tcp_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                For Each kvp In tcp_Listeners
                    kvp.Value?.Stop()
                Next
                tcp_Listeners.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In smb_IsRunning
                    smb_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                smb_Paths.Clear()
                smb_FilePattern.Clear()
                smb_ReadInterval.Clear()
                smb_Types.Clear()
                smb_Domains.Clear()
                smb_Usernames.Clear()
                smb_Passwords.Clear()
                smb_ProcessedFiles.Clear()
                smb_LastRead.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            e.Cancel = False
            frm_a_b_Login.Close()
        ElseIf changesMade = 3 Then

            tmr_extractor.Stop()
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()

            'can close
            Try
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Close()
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.Dispose()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In tcp_IsRunning
                    tcp_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                For Each kvp In tcp_Listeners
                    kvp.Value?.Stop()
                Next
                tcp_Listeners.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Try
                For Each kvp In smb_IsRunning
                    smb_IsRunning(kvp.Key) = False
                Next
                smb_Paths.Clear()
                smb_FilePattern.Clear()
                smb_ReadInterval.Clear()
                smb_Types.Clear()
                smb_Domains.Clear()
                smb_Usernames.Clear()
                smb_Passwords.Clear()
                smb_ProcessedFiles.Clear()
                smb_LastRead.Clear()
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            e.Cancel = False
            frm_a_b_Login.Close()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub refreshdata(casilla As Integer)

        'Reset Pallet Info
        Pallet_Scanned = False
        Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
        lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed

        Select Case casilla
            Case 1
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.model = True Then
                    lbl_modelsel1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber & " " & ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Side
                    PreviousPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber

                    'PLEX DATA

                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.UpdateControlPanelInformation(linkWorkcenter1, lblCP1_status, lblCP1_pn, lblCP1_job, lblCP1_user, lblCP1_checksheet, lblCP1_inv, lbl_wk1, lbl_pnplex1, lbl_plexop1, lbl_plexjob1)

                    'ExFunctions.updateplexinfo(ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Selected, False, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Quantity, )

                    lblCustomer1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.CustomerName
                    lbl_job1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobNumber
                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobType = 2 Then
                        lbl_job1.Text = "Kanban"
                    End If

                    lblStd1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_StandarQty

    Private Sub Button1_Click_1(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_load1.Click
        If ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID = ExData.CONF_fix_plex_area_id Then
            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = 1
            Dim options = New frm_WAVE_plexCorrections()
            options.ShowDialog()
            refreshdata(1)
        Else
            Dim unload As Boolean = False
            If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And Data_From_Extractor = False Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                    btn_process1.PerformClick()
                    unload = True
                    'Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                    'If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                    '    unload = True
                    'End If
                Else
                    unload = True
                End If
            Else
                unload = True
            End If

            If unload Then
                Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                    If frm.Name = "frm_WAVE_jobSelection" Then
                        frmisOPen = True
                    End If
                Next

                If frmisOPen = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = 1
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection()
                    options.ShowDialog()
                    refreshdata(1)
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Sub colorx(qty As Integer)
        imt1.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt2.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt3.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt4.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray
        imt5.Image = My.Resources.deleteicongray

        If qty Mod 5 >= 1 Then
            imt1.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty Mod 5 >= 2 Then
            imt2.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty Mod 5 >= 3 Then
            imt3.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If
        If qty Mod 5 >= 4 Then
            imt4.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If

        If qty >= 5 And qty Mod 5 = 0 Then
            imt5.Image = My.Resources.deleteicon
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim ExtractorIgnorePN As String = ""
    Dim ExtractroPVSConnection As String = ""

    Private Sub tmr_extractor_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_extractor.Tick

        z = CInt(tmr_extractor.Interval / 1000)


        Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

        For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
            If frm.Name = "frm_WAVE_jobSelection" Then
                frmisOPen = True
            End If
        Next

        If Data_From_Extractor_Type = 2 And frmisOPen = False Then
            '◘ HERE SET THE Extractor settings...
            Dim ConnectionString As String = ExData.ConnectionString
            Dim Connection As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(ConnectionString)
            For Each row As DataRow In dt_Extractors.Rows
                Dim ConnectionStringCust As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [ConnectionString] FROM [IT_Databases_TestRecords] where alias='" & row.Field(Of String)("BaseDatos") & "' and TypeID=1")
                ExtractroPVSConnection = ConnectionStringCust
                Dim ConnectionCust As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(ConnectionStringCust)
                If row.Field(Of Integer)("Tipo") = 2 And ExData.CONF_Company_NO = 1 Then

                    Dim trn2 As DateTime = row.Item("Fecha")
                    Dim tableName As String = row.Item("Tabla")
                    Dim trnc As Integer = row.Item("indice")
                    Dim machinename As String = row.Item("MachineName")
                    Dim machintetype As String = row.Item("MachineType")
                    Dim requeststage As Boolean = row.Item("RequestStage")

                    '◘ Selecciono datos
                    Dim sql_test As String = "Select * From " & tableName & " WHERE ID>'" & trnc & "' and TesterName='" & machinename & "' and TestType='" & machintetype & "' and status<>'3' " & ExtractorIgnorePN & " Order by id asc"

                    Dim command_test As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_test, ConnectionCust)
                    Dim dt_test As New DataTable
                    Dim adpt_test As New Data.SqlClient.SqlDataAdapter(command_test)

                    Dim maximo As Int64 = row.Field(Of Int64)("indice")
                    Try
                        ConnectionCust.Open()
                        'Connection.Open()
                        'Obtengo datos
                        adpt_test.Fill(dt_test)

                        'Reviso todos los valores
                        For Each subrow As DataRow In dt_test.Rows
                            If subrow.Field(Of String)("UnitID") = "N/A" Then
                                'Si fuese el caso, no hacer nada
                            Else
                                Dim snn As String = subrow.Item("UnitID")
                                Dim trn As DateTime = subrow.Item("TrnDate")
                                Dim opid As String = subrow.Item("OpID")
                                Dim TESTMODE As String = ""

                                Try
                                    TESTMODE = subrow.Item("TESTMODE")
                                Catch ex As Exception

                                End Try

                                'Agregar a BeFirst
                                Dim continuar As Boolean = True

                                If continuar Then
                                    Dim areaid As Integer = 0
                                    Dim stationid As Integer = 0

                                    Select Case subrow.Field(Of String)("TestType")
                                        Case "ICT"
                                            areaid = 5
                                            stationid = 31
                                        Case "FUNCTIONAL"
                                            areaid = 6
                                            stationid = 41
                                        Case "CONTENCION"
                                            areaid = 15
                                            stationid = 218
                                        Case "VISION"
                                            areaid = 22
                                            stationid = 219
                                        Case "PROGRAMACION"
                                            areaid = 18
                                            stationid = 204
                                        Case "PROGRAMMER"
                                            areaid = 18
                                            stationid = 204
                                    End Select

                                    Dim currentindex As Integer = 0

                                    Dim pn As String = subrow.Item("PartNumber").ToString.Trim

                                    If pn.Length > 0 Then
                                        If pn.Substring(0, 1) = "9" Or pn.Substring(0, 1) = "8" Then
                                            'First LOAD PN - USER WAVE SELECT JOB
                                            Dim partid As Integer = 0

                                            Dim rows() = dt_PartNumbersAvailables.Select("Partnumber='" & pn & "'")

                                            If PreviousPartNumber <> pn Then
                                                tmr_extractor.Stop()

                                                Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(True, pn, -1, -1, -1)
                                                If resultado = False Then
                                                    'Ask to ignore it.
                                                    Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("Ignorar PartNumber? Esto opcion no permite recuperar archivos. / Ignore partnumber, files will no be able to recover.", "Error con PartNumber", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo)

                                                    If (result = DialogResult.Yes) Then
                                                        ExtractorIgnorePN &= "AND PartNumber<>'" & pn & "' "


                                                        'TODO MOVE EXTRACTORS TO NEW SERVER BeConn_OLD
                                                        BeConn_OLD.InsertRecords("UPDATE CF_tbl_extractors SET Indice='" & subrow.Item("ID") & "',Fecha='" & trn.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss") & "' WHERE autoid='" & row.Field(Of Integer)("autoid") & "'")
                                                    Else

                                                    End If

                                                    'MsgBox(My.Resources.Messages.Plex_Load_Error & " " & pn)
                                                    PreviousPartNumber = ""
                                                    Exit Sub
                                                Else
                                                    partid = rows(0).Item(0)
                                                    PreviousPartNumber = pn

                                                    checkai(False)



                                                End If
                                            Else
                                                If rows.Length > 0 Then
                                                    partid = rows(0).Item(0)
                                                    PreviousPartNumber = pn
                                                End If
                                            End If

                                            Dim shift As Integer = GetShift(trn)

                                            Dim isgood As Boolean = True

                                            Dim Failredesc As String = ""
                                            If subrow.Field(Of String)("Status") <> "0" Then
                                                isgood = False
                                                Failredesc = subrow.Item("FailureDesc")
                                            End If

                                            Dim nestid As Integer = 1

                                            Try
                                                nestid = subrow.Item("NESTID")
                                            Catch ex As Exception

                                            End Try

                                            Dim tester As String = subrow.Item("TesterName")

                                            Dim rowssta() = dt_StationsAvailables.Select("StationName='" & tester & "' and areaid='" & areaid & "'")

                                            If rowssta.Length > 0 Then
                                                stationid = rowssta(0).Item(0)
                                            Else
                                                'Insert station
                                                dt_StationsAvailables = ExFunctions.createstation(tester, areaid)
                                                Dim rowssta2() = dt_StationsAvailables.Select("StationName='" & tester & "' and areaid='" & areaid & "'")
                                                If rowssta2.Length > 0 Then
                                                    stationid = rowssta2(0).Item(0)
                                                Else

                                                End If
                                            End If

                                            If row.Item("indice") < subrow.Item("ID") Then
                                                row.Item("indice") = subrow.Item("ID")
                                                dt_Extractors.AcceptChanges()
                                            End If

                                            If partid <> 0 Then
                                                '2020-05-27 EM: Add if panel for each child

                                                'If TESTMODE = "PANEL" Then
                                                '    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = True
                                                'Else
                                                '    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel = False
                                                'End If

                                                'TODO MOVE EXTRACTORS TO NEW SERVER BeConn_OLD
                                                BeConn_OLD.InsertRecords("UPDATE CF_tbl_extractors SET Indice='" & subrow.Item("ID") & "',Fecha='" & trn.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss") & "' WHERE autoid='" & row.Field(Of Integer)("autoid") & "'")
                                                'Dim sql_insertar As String =
                                                'Dim command_insertar As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_insertar, Connection) 'Aqui ejecutamos el comando para SQL en Connection              
                                                'Try
                                                '    command_insertar.ExecuteNonQuery()

                                                'Catch ex As Exception

                                                'End Try

                                                enviarssn(snn, trn, areaid, stationid, isgood, nestid, True, True, False, Failredesc.Replace("'", ""), ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.isByPanel)


                                            End If
                                        End If
                                    End If
                                End If
                            End If
                        Next
                    Catch ex As Exception
                        'MsgBox(ex.ToString)
                    Finally
                        ConnectionCust.Close()
                    End Try
                ElseIf row.Field(Of Integer)("Tipo") = 7 And ExData.CONF_Company_NO = 1 Then

                    Dim trn2 As DateTime = row.Item("Fecha")
                    Dim tableName As String = row.Item("Tabla")
                    Dim trnc As Integer = row.Item("indice")
                    Dim machinename As String = row.Item("MachineName")
                    Dim machintetype As String = row.Item("MachineType")
                    Dim requeststage As Boolean = row.Item("RequestStage")

                    '◘ Selecciono datos
                    Dim sql_test As String = "Select * From " & tableName & " WHERE AutoID>'" & trnc & "' and TesterName='" & machinename & "' and TestType='" & machintetype & "' Order by id asc"

                    Dim command_test As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_test, ConnectionCust)
                    Dim dt_test As New DataTable
                    Dim adpt_test As New Data.SqlClient.SqlDataAdapter(command_test)

                                                                                    Dim insertQAParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
