                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@PartNo", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = line1(0).Substring(0, 13).Replace("_", "-")},
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = sn},
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -1},
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Comments", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName & " AOI BAD " & machineerro & " " & location.Trim}
                                                                                           }

                                                                                    BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[QA_tbl_lockunitspvs] (PartNo,SN,TrnDate,ControlID,Comments)  VALUES (@PartNo,@SN,GETDATE(),@ControlID,@Comments)", insertQAParameter)

                                                                                    Exit For
                                                                                End If
                                                                            Next
                                                                        End If
                                                                    End If
                                                                End If
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    Next
                                                    Exit For
                                                End If
                                            Next

                                            'Para piezas buenas
                                            If cancelar = False Then
                                                For j As Integer = 1 To arraqty
                                                    If malos.Contains(j) Then
                                                        'si lo contiene, entonces ya se agrego
                                                    Else
                                                        'Si no lo contiene es porque es buena
                                                        Dim sn As String = dt_seriales.Rows(j - 1).Item(1)

                                                        Dim insertParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                           {
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = sn},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@AOIID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = AOIID},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = StationID},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = partid},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Side", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = sideid},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Trndate", SqlDbType.DateTime) With {.Value = Fecha.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss")},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = True},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@IsRework", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = False},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@RefCir", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = Location},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectDesc", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ""},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@UserPass", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = False},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@UserDesc", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ""},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Position", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = j}
                                                                           }

                                                        'Significa que ya la agregamos
                                                        Dim sql_insert As String = "INSERT INTO [dbo].[Machines_Extractor_AOI_Data] (SN,AOIID,StationID,PartID,Side,Trndate,IsGood,IsRework,RefCir,DefectDesc,UserPass,UserDesc,Position)  VALUES  (@SN,@AOIID,@StationID,@PartID,@Side,@Trndate,@IsGood,@IsRework,@RefCir,@DefectDesc,@UserPass,@UserDesc,@Position)"
                                                        Dim command_insert As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_insert, Connection)
                                                        command_insert.Parameters.Clear()
                                                        command_insert.Parameters.AddRange(insertParameter)
                                                        Try
                                                            Connection.Open()
                                                            command_insert.ExecuteNonQuery()
                                                        Catch ex As Exception
                                                        Finally
                                                            command_insert.Parameters.Clear()
                                                            Connection.Close()
                                                        End Try

                                                    End If
                                                Next
                                            End If

                                            Try
                                                File.Delete(sFile)
                                            Catch ex As Exception
                                                'File.Delete(sFile)
                                            End Try

                                            For Each rowSSN As DataRow In dt_seriales.Rows
                                                If rowSSN.Item("IsSSN") Then
                                                    enviarssn(rowSSN.Item("Serie"), DateTime.Now(), ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID, StationID, rowSSN.Item("IsGood"), 1, True, True, False, "")

                                                    If rowSSN.Item("IsGood") And ifGoodUnlockUnit Then
                                                        Dim deleteQAParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                {
                                                                    New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = rowSSN.Item("Serie")},
                                                                    New SqlParameter("@Comments", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName & " AOI BAD"}
                                                                }

                                                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("DELETE FROM [dbo].[QA_tbl_lockunitspvs] WHERE SN=@SN AND [Comments] LIKE @Comments +'%' ", deleteQAParameter)
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            Next
                                        End If
                                    Else

                                    End If
                                End If
                            Catch ex As Exception

                                'If System.IO.File.Exists(Path & "\Error" & sFile.Substring(Path.Length)) Then
                                '    System.IO.File.Delete(Path & "\Error" & sFile.Substring(Path.Length))
                                'End If
                                'File.Move(sFile, Path & "\Error" & sFile.Substring(Path.Length))
                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next

                    'REMOVE TST FILES
                    Dim filestst() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(Path, "*.TXT")

                    For Each sFile As String In filestst
                        If sFile.Contains("_" & SearchName & "_") Then
                            Try
                                File.Delete(sFile)
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            Next
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Function Load_PartNumber(extracto As Boolean, Optional pn As String = "", Optional pn_partid As Integer = -1, Optional bin As Integer = -1, Optional job As Integer = -1) As Boolean
        Dim resultado As Boolean = True
        Dim sel As Integer = 0

        Dim pnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                   {
                        New SqlParameter("@partid", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = pn_partid},
                        New SqlParameter("@partnumber", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = pn}
                   }

        Dim dt0 As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT partnumber,partid FROM [CS_idt_partnumbers] where partid=@partid or partnumber=@partnumber", pnParameter)

        If dt0.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            pn = dt0.Rows(0).Item(0)
            pn_partid = dt0.Rows(0).Item(1)

            If extracto = True Then
                tmr_extractor.Stop()
                sel = 1
                ExData.Selected_Area.CasillaReset(sel)
                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = sel

                Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                    If frm.Name = "frm_WAVE_jobSelection" Then
                        frmisOPen = True
                    End If
                Next

                If frmisOPen = False Then
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection(pn, bin, job, True)
                    options.ShowDialog()

                    refreshdata(sel)

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber <> pn Then
                        resultado = False
                    Else

                        tmr_extractor.Start()
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                sel = 1
                ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation = 1

                If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation6 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation5 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation4 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation3 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 > 1 Then
                    Dim optionssel = New frm_a_d_casillaPositionSelect
                    optionssel.ShowDialog()
                End If

                sel = ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation


                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation

                Dim unload As Boolean = False
                If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And Data_From_Extractor = False Then
                    Select Case sel
                        Case 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 2
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 3
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 4
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 5
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 6
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                    End Select
                Else
                    unload = True
                End If

                If unload Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = sel
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection(pn, bin, job)
                    options.ShowDialog()
                    refreshdata(sel)

                    Select Case sel
                        Case 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 2
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 3
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 4
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 5
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 6
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                    End Select
                End If

            End If
        Else
            resultado = False
        End If



        Return resultado
    End Function

    Private Sub DataReceivedHandler(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadExisting()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then
            'sensor1 = False
            sensor1_active = False
        Else
            sensor1_active = True
            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()
            Try
                If Incoming_Text.Length > 0 Then
                    If Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 1 Then
                        Try
                            If Math.Abs(DateDiff(DateInterval.Minute, DateTime.Now, lastunit_date)) < 120 Then
                                sensor1 = True
                            Else
                                sensor1 = False
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                    ElseIf Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 0 Then
                        sensor1 = False
                    End If
                Else
                    'sensor1 = False
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sensor1 = False
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub

    Private sensor1 As Boolean = False
    Private sensor1_active As Boolean = False
    Private downtime_new As Boolean = False

    Private Sub tmr_sensors_dw_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_sensors_dw.Tick
        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors Then
            If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.IsOpen = False Then
                'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Red
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.Red
            Else
                If sensor1_active Then
                    'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Lime
                    sensor1_active = False
                Else
                    'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If
            End If
            If sensor1 Then
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.Lime
                ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
                If x_use = False Then
                    x_use = True
                    x = 0
                    lbl_timer.Text = GetTime(0)
                    lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Black
                    ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = 80
                    ExData.Selected_Area.LastPiece = DateTime.Now()
                    downtime_new = False
                End If
            Else
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red

                If x Mod 15 = 0 And x_use = False And downtime_new = True Then
                    x_use = True
                    revisarDWt()
                End If

                If downtime_new = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
                    frm_a_d_downtime.ShowDialog(Me)
                    downtime_new = True
                    ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    '========================
    'SCANNER KEYENCE SR700

    Dim var_stageid As Integer = 0
    Dim escanead_correcto As Boolean = False
    Dim estuvo_mal As Boolean = False '2020-01-26 EM: USE TO CATCH BAD BOARD FROM AOI...



    Private Sub cbAutoScanner_CheckedChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cbAutoScanner.CheckedChanged
        If cbAutoScanner.Checked Then
            Try
                'LOAD COMS
                CONF_SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner()

                var_stageid = 0

                tmr_io.Start()
                tmr_coms.Start()
                ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        Else
            ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = False

            If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
            End If
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_io_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_io.Tick
        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then

            'Read_DB9_Values()
        Else
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim scannerold As String = ""
    Public Property VerifyValidation As Integer

    Private Sub tmr_coms_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_coms.Tick
        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then
            Select Case var_stageid
                Case 0
                    If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                        SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = True 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS

                        var_stageid = 1
                    End If
                Case 1
                    Try
                        '-- TRY READ DATA
                        Dim readed As Boolean = False
                        Dim serial_ssn As String = ""
                        If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                            Dim serial As String = SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.ReadExisting
                            If serial.Length > 10 Then
                                serial_ssn = serial.Trim
                                lblscanner.Text = serial_ssn
                                readed = True
                            End If
                        End If

                        If readed Then
                            'TURN OFF CAMERAS
                            If scannerold <> serial_ssn Then

                                If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                                End If

                                var_stageid = 2

                                scannerold = serial_ssn
                                txt_serial.Text = serial_ssn
                                btn_Add.PerformClick()
                            Else

                            End If
                        End If
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                Case 2
                    'DO Nothing UNtil 

            End Select
        Else
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

        fOpt.ShowDialog()
    End Sub

    Private Sub chReworkAOI_CheckedChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles chReworkAOI.CheckedChanged

        'Delete all files in AOI...

        If Data_From_Extractor_Type = 14 Then
            Dim ConnectionString As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='DataBase_Machines'")
            Dim Connection As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(ConnectionString)

            For Each aoimachine As DataRow In dt_Extractors.Rows

                Dim directoriolecturaGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim directoriosuccessGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim StationID As Integer = aoimachine.Item("StationID")

                Dim SearchName As String = aoimachine.Item("MachineName")

                Dim Path As String = directoriolecturaGood
                Dim PathSuccess As String = directoriosuccessGood


                If IO.Directory.Exists(Path) Then
                    Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(Path, "*.TST")
                    Dim texto As String = ""

                    For Each sFile As String In files

                        Dim blnIgnoreFiles As Boolean = True

                        If sFile.Contains("_" & SearchName & "_") Then
                            blnIgnoreFiles = False
                        End If

                        If blnIgnoreFiles Then

                        Else
                            texto = IO.File.ReadAllText(sFile)

                            Try
                                File.Delete(sFile)
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            Next
        End If

﻿Imports System.Data.SqlClient
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO
Imports System.IO.Ports
Imports System.Media
Imports System.Net
Imports System.Net.Mail
Imports System.Net.Sockets
Imports System.Speech.Synthesis
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Text.RegularExpressions
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
'Imports Microsoft.Office.Core
'Imports Microsoft.Office.Interop

Public Class frm_WAVE

    'Timer in second of last 
    Public x As Integer
    Private x_use As Boolean = False

    'Timer for extractor
    Public z As Integer = 5

    Public changesMade As Integer = 1

    'Flag for DT
    Public IsOpenDT As Boolean = False

    'Codigo de defecto por defaulta
    Public DefectCode As Integer = -1
    Public DefectCodeName As String = ""
    Public DefectDepartment As Integer = 1


    Private Player As SoundPlayer = New SoundPlayer(My.Resources._8bit)
    Private PlayerOK As SoundPlayer = New SoundPlayer(My.Resources.okbeep)


    'Extractors
    Public dt_Extractors As New DataTable
    Private Data_From_Extractor As Boolean = False
    Private Data_From_Extractor_Type As Integer = -1


    'Tickets
    Private haveticket As Boolean = False
    Private haveticket_color As Boolean = False
    Private back_color As Color = Color.WhiteSmoke
    Private back_font As Color = Color.Black

    Private PreviousPartNumber As String = "" 'Used to determine if UpdateCasilla is started

    'Tables availables for extractors. 
    Private dt_PartNumbersAvailables As New DataTable
    Private dt_StationsAvailables As New DataTable

    'Pallet counter 2020-12-17 EM
    Private Pallet_Scanned As Boolean = False
    Private Pallet_Prefix As String = "None"
    Private Pallet_Serial As String = ""
    Private Pallet_SerialID As Integer = -1
    Private Pallet_Serial_Quantity As Integer = 0
    Private Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed As Integer = 0
    Private Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No As Integer = 0
    Private Pallet_Regex As Regex

    Private lastunit_date As DateTime

    Private AOIforRework As Boolean = False

#Region "TCPSettings"
    Dim tcp_Client_Conenction As TcpClient
    ' Per-casilla TCP state (keyed by casilla number 1-6)
    Dim tcp_Listeners As New Dictionary(Of Integer, TcpListener)
    Dim tcp_IsRunning As New Dictionary(Of Integer, Boolean)
    Dim tcp_PreviousSerials As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim tcp_Types As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
#End Region

#Region "SMBSettings"
    ' Per-casilla SMB state (keyed by casilla number 1-6)
    Dim smb_Paths As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim smb_IsRunning As New Dictionary(Of Integer, Boolean)
    Dim smb_LastRead As New Dictionary(Of Integer, DateTime)
    Dim smb_ProcessedFiles As New Dictionary(Of Integer, List(Of String))
    Dim smb_FilePattern As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim smb_ReadInterval As New Dictionary(Of Integer, Integer)
    Dim smb_Types As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim smb_Domains As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim smb_Usernames As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim smb_Passwords As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
#End Region

#Region "SMB Credential API Declarations"
    ' Win32 API for network authentication
    Private Declare Function WNetAddConnection2 Lib "mpr.dll" Alias "WNetAddConnection2A" _
        (ByRef lpNetResource As NETRESOURCE, ByVal lpPassword As String, ByVal lpUsername As String, ByVal dwFlags As Integer) As Integer

    Private Declare Function WNetCancelConnection2 Lib "mpr.dll" Alias "WNetCancelConnection2A" _
        (ByVal lpName As String, ByVal dwFlags As Integer, ByVal fForce As Integer) As Integer

    <StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)>
    Private Structure NETRESOURCE
        Public dwScope As Integer
        Public dwType As Integer
        Public dwDisplayType As Integer
        Public dwUsage As Integer
        Public lpLocalName As String
        Public lpRemoteName As String
        Public lpComment As String
        Public lpProvider As String
    End Structure

    Private Const RESOURCETYPE_DISK As Integer = &H1
    Private Const CONNECT_UPDATE_PROFILE As Integer = &H1

    ' Helper function to decrypt password (simple implementation - enhance as needed)
    Private Function DecryptPassword(encryptedBytes As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(encryptedBytes) OrElse encryptedBytes Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        End If

        Try
            Dim bytes As Byte() = CType(encryptedBytes, Byte())
            If bytes.Length = 0 Then Return ""

            ' TODO: Implement proper decryption if passwords are encrypted
            ' For now, assuming plain text stored as bytes
            Return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(bytes)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("Password decryption error: " & ex.Message)
            Return ""
        End Try
    End Function

    ' Connect to SMB share with credentials
    Private Function ConnectSMB(remotePath As String, username As String, password As String, domain As String) As Boolean
        Try
            ' If no credentials provided, use current Windows credentials
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(username) AndAlso String.IsNullOrEmpty(password) Then
                Return True
            End If

            ' Extract the share path (without file path)
            Dim uri As New Uri(remotePath)
            Dim sharePath As String = "\\" & uri.Host & uri.LocalPath.Split("\"c)(0)

            ' Prepare username with domain if provided
            Dim fullUsername As String = username
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(domain) Then
                fullUsername = domain & "\" & username
            End If

            ' Create network resource structure
            Dim netResource As New NETRESOURCE()
            netResource.dwType = RESOURCETYPE_DISK
            netResource.lpRemoteName = sharePath

            ' Attempt connection
            Dim result As Integer = WNetAddConnection2(netResource, password, fullUsername, 0)

            If result = 0 Then
                Return True ' Success
            ElseIf result = 1219 Then
                ' Already connected - this is OK
                Return True
            Else
                Debug.WriteLine($"SMB connection failed with error code: {result}")
                Return False
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("ConnectSMB error: " & ex.Message)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    ' Disconnect from SMB share
    Private Sub DisconnectSMB(remotePath As String)
        Try
            Dim uri As New Uri(remotePath)
            Dim sharePath As String = "\\" & uri.Host & uri.LocalPath.Split("\"c)(0)
            WNetCancelConnection2(sharePath, 0, 1)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("DisconnectSMB error: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub
#End Region

    Private Sub fm_Index_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        lblDate.Text = DateString.ToString

        lblVersionSoftware.Text = ExData.SOFTWAREVERSION

        lastunit_date = DateTime.Now()

        ExFunctions.ByHour(Data_History, ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main)

        txtArea.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName
        txtStation.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.StationName

        ' Cargar datos de la estacion
        Me.Text = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] WHERE Description='CompanyName'") & " - " & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName & " - " & ExData.Selected_Area.StationName

        Dim ToolNames As New DataTable
        ToolNames.Columns.Add("SSN", GetType(System.String))

        ExData.Tool_Name_Dt = ToolNames
        ExData.Tool_Name_Dt.Clear()

        '=== Actualiza ultimos seriales
        Data_lastserials.DataSource = ExData.Selected_Area.LastSerials
        Data_lastserials.Sort(Data_lastserials.Columns("Hora"), System.ComponentModel.ListSortDirection.Descending)
        Data_lastserials.AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.Fill
        If Data_lastserials.RowCount > 0 Then
            Data_lastserials.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = 0
        End If
        ColorearSeriales(Data_lastserials)


        'Iniciar contador ultima pieza
        DefectCode = ExData.DEF_DefaultDefectCode
        IsOpenDT = False

        '' Panel17.BackColor = Color.FromArgb(42, 42, 42)


        ' Cargar tabla de defectos
        Dim SerialesConDefecto As New DataTable
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("Serial", GetType(System.String))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("TrnDate", GetType(System.DateTime))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("IsPanel", GetType(System.Boolean))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("Malas", GetType(System.Int32))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("Seleccion", GetType(System.Int32))
        SerialesConDefecto.Columns.Add("PartID", GetType(System.Int32))

        ExData.SerialesDefectuosos = SerialesConDefecto
        ExData.SerialesDefectuosos.Clear()

        '2020-04-27 EM: TO Save Serials
        ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Plex_Serials.initialize()

        '2020-04-28 EM: Verify is substatinos are available.
        If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation1 <= 0 Then
            tblPanelSel1.Enabled = False
            btnprinter1.Enabled = False
            btn_load1.Enabled = False
            btn_unload1.Enabled = False
        End If
        If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 <= 0 Then
            tblPanelSel2.Enabled = False
            btnprinter2.Enabled = False
            btn_load2.Enabled = False
            btn_unload2.Enabled = False
        End If
        If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation3 <= 0 Then
            tblPanelSel3.Enabled = False
            btnprinter3.Enabled = False
            btn_load3.Enabled = False
            btn_unload3.Enabled = False
        End If
        If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation4 <= 0 Then
            tblPanelSel4.Enabled = False
            btnprinter4.Enabled = False
            btn_load4.Enabled = False
            btn_unload4.Enabled = False
        End If
        If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation5 <= 0 Then
            tblPanelSel5.Enabled = False
            btnprinter5.Enabled = False
            btn_load5.Enabled = False
            btn_unload5.Enabled = False
        End If
        If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation6 <= 0 Then
            tblPanelSel6.Enabled = False
            btnprinter6.Enabled = False
            btn_load6.Enabled = False
            btn_unload6.Enabled = False
        End If

        '2020-04-28 EM: Bakcground
        tblPanelSel1.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tblPanelSel2.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tblPanelSel5.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tblPanelSel3.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tblPanelSel4.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke
        tblPanelSel6.BackColor = Color.WhiteSmoke

        tbl_sel1.Enabled = False
        tbl_sel2.Enabled = False
        tbl_sel5.Enabled = False
        tbl_sel3.Enabled = False
        tbl_sel4.Enabled = False
        tbl_sel6.Enabled = False

        Try
            If ExData.SERVERIP Then
                LedBeFirst.BackColor = Color.Lime
            Else
                LedBeFirst.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Pallets Then
            pnl_Pallets.BackColor = Color.Lime

            Pallet_Prefix = BeConn.GetString("Select Prefix from Part_Areas_Pallet_Prefix WHERE AreaID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "'")

            Pallet_Scanned = False
            Pallet_Serial = ""
            Pallet_Regex = New Regex("^" & Pallet_Prefix)
            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed = 0
            lblpalletwait.Text = Pallet_Serial_Quantity_Allowed
            Pallet_Serial_Quantity_No = 0

            'Chck the time
            Try
                Pallet_CycleMinutes = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT [CycleTime] FROM [Part_Station_Downtime_Pallets] WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main & "'")
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

        Else
            pnl_Pallets.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
        End If

        '2020-07-15 EM: Load nozzles cleaness
        Load_DB9_Ports()


        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors Then
            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime = 0
            tmr_sensors_dw.Enabled = True
            tmr_sensors_dw.Start()
            x = 0
        Else
            '=== Ultima pieza
            Dim a As DateTime = DateTime.Now() : Dim b As DateTime = ExData.Selected_Area.LastPiece
            Dim diff = a - b
            x = Math.Min(diff.TotalSeconds, 86000)
        End If

        tmr_DownTime.Start()

        '2020-04-28 EM: Update plex data.
        'updateplex(False)

        txt_pendientesplex1.Enabled = True
        txt_pendientesplex2.Enabled = True
        txt_pendientesplex3.Enabled = True
        txt_pendientesplex4.Enabled = True
        txt_pendientesplex5.Enabled = True

        '    txt_pendientesplex4.Enabled = False
        '    txt_pendientesplex5.Enabled = False
        '    txt_pendientesplex6.Enabled = False
        'End If

        If ExData.CONF_Plex_Transaction_Active = False Then
            btn_process1.Visible = False
            btn_process2.Visible = False
            btn_process3.Visible = False

    Sub CONF_SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET() 'SALIDA DE SENALES
        'READ CONFIGURATION IF EXIST
        Dim productName As String = "NoName"

        Try
            productName = System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().GetName().Name
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        '◘ Create directory
        Dim confDir As String = "C:\BeFirst\Configuration"

        If My.Computer.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(confDir) Then

        Else
            Directory.CreateDirectory(confDir)
            Try
                Dim ToHideDir As New System.IO.DirectoryInfo(confDir)
                ToHideDir.Attributes = IO.FileAttributes.Hidden
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        'Hide folder
        Dim fileName As String = confDir & "\" & productName & "_COMARDUINO.txt"
        ExData.port_file = fileName

        '◘ Read File (Configuration)
        If My.Computer.FileSystem.FileExists(fileName) Then
            'Read current settings
            Dim readText() As String = File.ReadAllLines(fileName)
            Dim s As String
            For Each s In readText
                'Read if sline is valid
                If s.Length > 1 Then
                    'Check if a variable
                    If s.Substring(0, 1) = "@" Then
                        Dim variables() = s.Substring(1).Split("^")
                        Select Case variables(0)
                            Case "port_com_port1"
                                ExData.port_com_port1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_baud1"
                                ExData.port_com_baud1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_parity1"
                                ExData.port_com_parity1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_data1"
                                ExData.port_com_data1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_stop1"
                                ExData.port_com_stop1 = variables(1)
                        End Select
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            'Build and show ports...
            'txtcom1.Text = ExData.port_com_port1

            'LOAD PORTS....
            Try
                If ExData.port_com_port1.Contains("COM") Then
                    If SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.IsOpen Then
                        Try
                            'RemoveHandler sp1.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg1
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                        SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.Close()
                    End If
                    'AddHandler sp1.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg1
                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.PortName = ExData.port_com_port1
                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.BaudRate = CInt(ExData.port_com_baud1)
                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.Open()

                    'pnl_sensornozzle.BackColor = Color.Lime
                Else
                    'pnl_sensornozzle.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                'pnl_sensornozzle.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try

            'If txtcom1.Text.Contains("COM") Then
            '    tmr_tryconnect.Start()
            'End If

        Else

            ExData.port_com_port1 = "No Configurate"
            ExData.port_com_baud1 = "9600"
            ExData.port_com_parity1 = "Even"
            ExData.port_com_data1 = "8"
            ExData.port_com_stop1 = "1"

            'TRY SAVE FILE
            'Create File
            File.Create(fileName).Dispose()

            'Actualizaciones
            Dim qty_values As Integer = 14
            Dim aryText(qty_values) As String

            aryText(0) = "@port_com_port1^" & ExData.port_com_port1
            aryText(1) = "@port_com_baud1^" & ExData.port_com_baud1
            aryText(2) = "@port_com_parity1^" & ExData.port_com_parity1
            aryText(3) = "@port_com_data1^" & ExData.port_com_data1
            aryText(4) = "@port_com_stop1^" & ExData.port_com_stop1


            Dim objWriter As New System.IO.StreamWriter(fileName, True)
            For i = 0 To qty_values
                objWriter.WriteLine(aryText(i))
            Next

            objWriter.Close()

            CONF_SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET()

        End If
    End Sub

#Region "TCP as SERVER"
    Private Sub tcp_StopServer(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            If tcp_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                tcp_IsRunning(casilla) = False
            End If
            If tcp_Listeners.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                tcp_Listeners(casilla)?.Stop()
                tcp_Listeners.Remove(casilla)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub tcp_SERVER_Add(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            ' Stop existing listener for this casilla if already running
            tcp_StopServer(casilla)

            Dim tcpRows As DataRowCollection
            Select Case casilla
                Case 1 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 2 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 3 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 4 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 5 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case 6 : tcpRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.AreasToTCP.Rows
                Case Else : Return
            End Select

            If tcpRows.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim firstTCP As DataRow = tcpRows(0)
            If firstTCP("CLIENT_OR_SERVER").ToString() <> "SERVER" Then Return

            tcp_Types(casilla) = firstTCP("TCP_TYPE").ToString()
            tcp_PreviousSerials(casilla) = ""
            tcp_IsRunning(casilla) = True

            Dim listener As New TcpListener(IPAddress.Parse(firstTCP("IP").ToString()), CInt(firstTCP("Port")))
            listener.Server.SetSocketOption(SocketOptionLevel.Socket, SocketOptionName.ReuseAddress, True)
            listener.Start()
            tcp_Listeners(casilla) = listener

            Task.Run(Sub()
                         While tcp_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) AndAlso tcp_IsRunning(casilla)
                             Try
                                 Dim client As TcpClient = listener.AcceptTcpClient()
                                 Me.Invoke(Sub() lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " Connected: " & client.Client.RemoteEndPoint.ToString())
                                 Task.Run(Sub() server_Handle_Client(client, casilla))
                             Catch ex As SocketException
                                 If Not (tcp_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) AndAlso tcp_IsRunning(casilla)) Then Exit While
                             End Try
                         End While
                     End Sub)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("TCP Server Error (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub server_Handle_Client(client As TcpClient, casilla As Integer)
        Try
            Using stream As NetworkStream = client.GetStream()
                Dim buffer(1024) As Byte
                Dim bytesRead As Integer = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length)
                Dim receivedMessage As String = Encoding.ASCII.GetString(buffer, 0, bytesRead).Trim()

                Dim tcpType As String = If(tcp_Types.ContainsKey(casilla), tcp_Types(casilla), "")

                If receivedMessage.Length > 0 And tcpType = "InSight Vision Cognex" Then

                    Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                  lblscanner.Text = DateTime.Now.ToString("f") & " [C" & casilla & "] Received: " & receivedMessage
                                  ' Expected format: PartNumber;SSN;Result;Ref1;Status1;Ref2;Status2;...
                                  Dim parts() As String = receivedMessage.Split(";"c)
                                  If parts.Length < 3 Then Exit Sub

                                  Dim msgPartNumber As String = parts(0).Trim()
                                  Dim msgSSN As String = parts(1).Trim()
                                  Dim msgIsGood As Boolean = parts(2).Trim().ToUpper() = "TRUE"

                                  ' Avoid duplicate processing
                                  Dim prevSerial As String = If(tcp_PreviousSerials.ContainsKey(casilla), tcp_PreviousSerials(casilla), "")
                                  If msgSSN = prevSerial Then Exit Sub
                                  tcp_PreviousSerials(casilla) = msgSSN

                                  ' Get the casilla-specific part number and station ID
                                  Dim casillaPartNumber As String = ""
                                  Dim casillaStationID As Integer = 0
                                  Select Case casilla
                                      Case 1 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.StationID
                                      Case 2 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.StationID
                                      Case 3 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.StationID
                                      Case 4 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.StationID
                                      Case 5 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.StationID
                                      Case 6 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.StationID
                                  End Select

                                  ' Validate part number matches loaded casilla
                                  If msgPartNumber <> casillaPartNumber Then
                                      ' TODO: update casilla with new part number (msgPartNumber)
                                      ' Add the model-change logic here and return after updating
                                      Exit Sub
                                  End If

                                  ' Build comments string from failed circuit references (pairs after index 2)
                                  Dim comments As String = ""
                                  If Not msgIsGood AndAlso parts.Length > 3 Then
                                      Dim failedRefs As New List(Of String)
                                      Dim i As Integer = 3
                                      While i + 1 <= parts.Length - 1
                                          Dim refName As String = parts(i).Trim()
                                          Dim refPass As Boolean = parts(i + 1).Trim().ToUpper() = "TRUE"
                                          If Not refPass Then
                                              failedRefs.Add(refName)
                                          End If
                                          i += 2
                                      End While
                                      If failedRefs.Count > 0 Then
                                          comments = "Failed: " & String.Join(", ", failedRefs.ToArray())
                                      End If
                                  End If

                                  enviarssn(msgSSN, DateTime.Now(),
                                            ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID,
                                            casillaStationID,
                                            msgIsGood, 0, False, False, False, comments)
                              End Sub)
                End If

                Dim responseBytes() As Byte = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes("Message received.")
                stream.Write(responseBytes, 0, responseBytes.Length)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' client disconnected
        Finally
            client.Close()
        End Try
    End Sub
#End Region

#Region "SMB File Monitoring"
    Private Sub smb_SERVER_Add(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            Dim smbRows As DataRowCollection
            Select Case casilla
                Case 1 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 2 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 3 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 4 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 5 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case 6 : smbRows = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.AreasToSMB.Rows
                Case Else : Return
            End Select

            If smbRows.Count = 0 Then Return

            Dim firstSMB As DataRow = smbRows(0)
            If Not Convert.ToBoolean(firstSMB("SMB_ENABLED")) Then Return

            smb_Paths(casilla) = firstSMB("SMB_PATH").ToString()
            smb_FilePattern(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_FILE_PATTERN")), "*.TXT", firstSMB("SMB_FILE_PATTERN").ToString())
            smb_ReadInterval(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_READ_INTERVAL")), 5000, CInt(firstSMB("SMB_READ_INTERVAL")))
            smb_Types(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_TYPE")), "", firstSMB("SMB_TYPE").ToString())
            smb_Domains(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_DOMAIN")), "", firstSMB("SMB_DOMAIN").ToString())
            smb_Usernames(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_USERNAME")), "", firstSMB("SMB_USERNAME").ToString())
            smb_Passwords(casilla) = If(IsDBNull(firstSMB("SMB_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED")), "", DecryptPassword(firstSMB("SMB_PASSWORD_ENCRYPTED")))
            smb_IsRunning(casilla) = True
            smb_ProcessedFiles(casilla) = New List(Of String)
            smb_LastRead(casilla) = DateTime.MinValue

            Me.Invoke(Sub()
                          lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " SMB: " & smb_Paths(casilla)
                      End Sub)

            ' Connect to SMB with credentials
            Dim username As String = If(smb_Usernames.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Usernames(casilla), "")
            Dim password As String = If(smb_Passwords.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Passwords(casilla), "")
            Dim domain As String = If(smb_Domains.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Domains(casilla), "")

            If Not ConnectSMB(smb_Paths(casilla), username, password, domain) Then
                Me.Invoke(Sub()
                              MessageBox.Show("Failed to authenticate to SMB share (Casilla " & casilla & ")", "SMB Authentication Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                          End Sub)
                Return
            End If

            Task.Run(Sub()
                         While smb_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) AndAlso smb_IsRunning(casilla)

                             Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                           lblscanner.Text = "Running at " & DateTime.Now.ToString("f")
                                       End Sub)

                             Try
                                 If Not My.Computer.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(smb_Paths(casilla)) Then
                                     Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                                   MessageBox.Show("SMB Path not found (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & smb_Paths(casilla), "SMB Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning)
                                               End Sub)
                                     smb_IsRunning(casilla) = False
                                     Exit While
                                 End If

                                 Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(smb_Paths(casilla), smb_FilePattern(casilla))

                                 For Each filePath In files
                                     If Not smb_ProcessedFiles(casilla).Contains(filePath) Then
                                         ProcessSMBFile(filePath, casilla, firstSMB)
                                         smb_ProcessedFiles(casilla).Add(filePath)
                                     End If
                                 Next

                                 smb_LastRead(casilla) = DateTime.Now
                                 System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(smb_ReadInterval(casilla))

                             Catch ex As UnauthorizedAccessException
                                 Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                               MessageBox.Show("SMB Access Denied (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message, "SMB Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
                                           End Sub)
                                 smb_IsRunning(casilla) = False
                                 Exit While
                             Catch ex As Exception
                                 Debug.WriteLine("SMB Error (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message)
                             End Try
                         End While
                     End Sub)

        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("SMB Server Init Error (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message, "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub ProcessSMBFile(filePath As String, casilla As Integer, config As DataRow)
        Try
            Dim fileContent() As String = File.ReadAllLines(filePath)

            Me.Invoke(Sub()
                          lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " Processing: " & Path.GetFileName(filePath) & " (" & fileContent.Length & " lines)"
                      End Sub)

            ' Get SMB Type for this casilla to determine processing logic
            Dim smbType As String = If(smb_Types.ContainsKey(casilla), smb_Types(casilla), "")

            For Each line In fileContent
                If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(line) Then Continue For

                ' Process based on SMB Type
                Select Case smbType
                    Case "InSight Vision Cognex"
                        ' Expected format: PartNumber;SSN;Result;Ref1;Status1;Ref2;Status2;...
                        Me.Invoke(Sub()
                                      Dim parts() As String = line.Split(";"c)
                                      If parts.Length < 3 Then Exit Sub

                                      Dim msgPartNumber As String = parts(0).Trim()
                                      Dim msgSSN As String = parts(1).Trim()
                                      Dim msgIsGood As Boolean = parts(2).Trim().ToUpper() = "1"

                                      ' Get the casilla-specific part number and station ID
                                      Dim casillaPartNumber As String = ""
                                      Dim casillaStationID As Integer = 0
                                      Select Case casilla
                                          Case 1 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.StationID
                                          Case 2 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.StationID
                                          Case 3 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.StationID
                                          Case 4 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.StationID
                                          Case 5 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.StationID
                                          Case 6 : casillaPartNumber = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartNumber : casillaStationID = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.StationID
                                      End Select

                                      ' Validate part number matches loaded casilla
                                      'If msgPartNumber <> casillaPartNumber Then
                                      '    ' TODO: update casilla with new part number (msgPartNumber)
                                      '    ' Add the model-change logic here and return after updating
                                      '    Exit Sub
                                      'End If

                                      ' Build comments string from failed circuit references (pairs after index 2)
                                      Dim comments As String = ""
                                      If Not msgIsGood AndAlso parts.Length > 3 Then
                                          Dim failedRefs As New List(Of String)
                                          Dim i As Integer = 3
                                          While i + 1 <= parts.Length - 1
                                              Dim refName As String = parts(i).Trim()
                                              Dim refPass As Boolean = parts(i + 1).Trim().ToUpper() = "1"
                                              If Not refPass Then
                                                  failedRefs.Add(refName)
                                              End If
                                              i += 2
                                          End While
                                          If failedRefs.Count > 0 Then
                                              comments = "Failed: " & String.Join(", ", failedRefs.ToArray())
                                          End If

                                          If comments.Length > 50 Then
                                              comments = comments.Substring(0, 49)
                                          End If
                                      End If

                                      enviarssn(msgSSN, DateTime.Now(),
                                                ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID,
                                                casillaStationID,
                                                msgIsGood, 0, False, False, False, comments)
                                  End Sub)

                    Case "Material Data"
                        ' Parse line as material serial or part number
                        ' Format: SERIAL|PARTNUMBER|QTY|etc.
                        Dim parts() As String = line.Split("|"c)

                        If parts.Length >= 2 Then
                            Dim serial As String = parts(0).Trim()
                            Dim partNumber As String = parts(1).Trim()

                            ' TODO: Process material (call existing material processing logic here)
                            Debug.WriteLine("Casilla " & casilla & " Material - Serial: " & serial & ", PartNumber: " & partNumber)
                        End If

                    Case "Serial Import"
                        ' Expected format: Single serial number per line
                        Dim serial As String = line.Trim()

                        ' TODO: Process serial import
                        Debug.WriteLine("Casilla " & casilla & " Serial Import - Serial: " & serial)

                    Case Else
                        ' Custom or unknown type - default parsing
                        ' Format: SERIAL|PARTNUMBER|QTY|etc.
                        Dim parts() As String = line.Split("|"c)

                        If parts.Length >= 2 Then
                            Dim serial As String = parts(0).Trim()
                            Dim partNumber As String = parts(1).Trim()

                            Debug.WriteLine("Casilla " & casilla & " Custom - Serial: " & serial & ", PartNumber: " & partNumber)
                        End If
                End Select
            Next

            ' Move to success directory if configured
            If Convert.ToBoolean(config("MOVE_TO_SUCCESS")) Then
                Dim successDir As String = Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(filePath), "success")

                If Not Directory.Exists(successDir) Then
                    Directory.CreateDirectory(successDir)
                End If

                Dim newPath As String = Path.Combine(successDir, Path.GetFileName(filePath) & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss"))
                File.Move(filePath, newPath)
            End If

        Catch ex As IOException
            ' File locked - will retry on next poll
            Debug.WriteLine("File locked: " & filePath)
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' Move to error directory if configured
            If Convert.ToBoolean(config("MOVE_TO_ERROR")) Then
                Dim errorDir As String = Path.Combine(Path.GetDirectoryName(filePath), "error")

                If Not Directory.Exists(errorDir) Then
                    Directory.CreateDirectory(errorDir)
                End If

                Dim newPath As String = Path.Combine(errorDir, Path.GetFileName(filePath) & "_" & DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMddHHmmss") & ".err")

                Try
                    File.WriteAllText(newPath & ".log", ex.ToString())
                    File.Move(filePath, newPath)
                Catch
                    Debug.WriteLine("Error moving error file: " & filePath)
                End Try
            End If
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private Sub smb_StopServer(casilla As Integer)
        Try
            If smb_IsRunning.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                smb_IsRunning(casilla) = False

                ' Disconnect from SMB share
                If smb_Paths.ContainsKey(casilla) Then
                    DisconnectSMB(smb_Paths(casilla))
                End If

                smb_Paths.Remove(casilla)
                smb_FilePattern.Remove(casilla)
                smb_ReadInterval.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Types.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Domains.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Usernames.Remove(casilla)
                smb_Passwords.Remove(casilla)
                smb_ProcessedFiles.Remove(casilla)
                smb_LastRead.Remove(casilla)

                Me.Invoke(Sub()
                              lblscanner.Text = "Casilla " & casilla & " SMB Stopped"
                          End Sub)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MessageBox.Show("Error stopping SMB (Casilla " & casilla & "): " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub
#End Region

    Private Sub TimerLastPiece_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_Seconds.Tick
        ' TIMER PARA CONTAR SEGUNDOS
        x = x + 1
        x_use = False
        lbl_timer.Text = GetTime(x)

        If tmr_extractor.Enabled Then
            z = z - 1
            lbl_extractor.Text = GetTime(z)
        End If

        lblDate.Text = Now.ToString("ddd dd hh:mm")


        ' REVISAR SI CAMBIA DE HORA PARA ACTUALIZAR  RATE POR HORA
        If DateTime.Now() > ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora Then
            ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.HourQty = 0
            ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora = ExData.Selected_Area.UltimaHora.AddHours(+1)

            'updateplex(False)
        End If

        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors = False Then
            ' REVISAR SI EXISE TIEMPO MUERTO
            If x >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False Then
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red
            End If

            ' Si hay tiempo muerto registrar... 
            If x >= ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And IsOpenDT = False And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True Then
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red
                IsOpenDT = True
                txtmsg.Text = "Waiting"
                If My.Forms.frm_a_d_downtime.ShowDialog(Me) = System.Windows.Forms.DialogResult.OK Then
                    IsOpenDT = False
                Else
                    IsOpenDT = False
                End If
                Me.Focus()
            End If
        Else
            ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub TimerHour_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_DownTime.Tick
        'Cada 2 minutos revisar si el timepo muerto no disminuye
        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors = False Then
            If x > ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.waittime And ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False Then
                revisarDWt()
            End If
        End If

        'Cada 2 minutos revisar si el timepo muerto no disminuye
        If ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Cleanliness_Tools_Messages.Rows.Count > 0 And ExData.isOpen_frm_a_d_msgCleanliness = False Then
            For Each rowClean As DataRow In ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.Cleanliness_Tools_Messages.Rows

                Dim inactiveminutes As Integer = CInt(rowClean.Item("InactiveMinutes"))
                Dim description As String = rowClean.Item("Description")

                If inactiveminutes > 0 Then
                    If inactiveminutes < Math.Floor(x / 60) Then

                        Dim cleanlessParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                            {
                                New SqlParameter("@description", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = description},
                                New SqlParameter("@inactiveminutes", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -inactiveminutes}
                            }

                        Dim dtLogs As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT[AutoID] FROM [Part_Station_Cleanliness_Log] WHERE StationID='" & ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Main & "' and Description=@description AND TrnDate>DATEADD(MINUTE,@inactiveminutes,GETDATE())", cleanlessParameter)

                        If dtLogs.Rows.Count = 0 Then


                            Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                            For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                                If frm.Name = "frm_a_d_msgCleanliness" Then
                                    frmisOPen = True
                                End If
                            Next

                            If frmisOPen = False Then

                                ExData.frm_a_d_msgCleanliness_Message = description

                                ExData.isOpen_frm_a_d_msgCleanliness = True

                                Dim options = New frm_a_d_msgCleanliness()
                                options.ShowDialog()
                            End If
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Next
        End If

        Try
            If tabbonus.SelectedIndex = 0 Then
                ExFunctions.ByHour(Data_History, ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub enviarplex(ssn As String, _trn As DateTime, _areaid As Integer, _stationid As Integer, _isgood As Boolean, _nestid As Integer, _forcevalues As Boolean, IsExtractor As Boolean)
        'Split Container values
        Dim serial As String = ""
        Dim Job As Integer = -1
        Dim Quantity As Double = -1
        Dim PartNumber As String = ""
        Dim Part_Key As Integer = -1
        Dim Operation_Code As String = ""

        BePlex.Analyse_PlexQR(ssn, serial, Job, Quantity, PartNumber, Part_Key, Operation_Code)

        Dim TransactPLEX As Boolean = False

        If ExData.CONF_shipping_area_id = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID Then
            'Check if requieres box validation... 
            Dim int = BeConn.GetInteger("Select autoid from Part_Operation_Shipping_Validate_BoxQty WHERE stationid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_Casilla.StationID & "'")

            If int > 0 Then

                Dim partParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                    {
                        New SqlParameter("@PartNumber", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = PartNumber}
                    }

                Dim qtybox As Integer = BeConn.GetInteger("SELECT [BoxSize] FROM [CS_idt_partnumbers] where PartNumber = @PartNumber", partParameter)

                If qtybox > 0 Then
                    If qtybox = Quantity Then
                        TransactPLEX = True
                    Else
                        ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.Others_Quantity_Invalid, My.Resources.Messages.Others_Quantity_Invalid, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                        txt_serial.Text = ""
                        txt_serial.Select()
                    End If
                Else
                    ExFunctions.ShowMSG_Timer(My.Resources.Messages.PartNumber_No_Configured, My.Resources.Messages.PartNumber_No_Configured, Data_From_Extractor, tmr_extractor.Enabled, tmr_extractor)
                    txt_serial.Text = ""
                    txt_serial.Select()
                End If
            Else
                TransactPLEX = True
            End If
        Else
            TransactPLEX = True
        End If

        If TransactPLEX Then

            'Just verifies serial not in EOM
            Dim serialParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                    {
                        New SqlParameter("@Serial_No", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = serial}
                    }

            Dim dt As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("Select EOM FROM PD_tbl_units_shipping_inventory WHERE Serial_No=@Serial_No", serialParameter)

            If dt.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                If dt.Rows(0).Item(0) = 1 Then
                    'Es EOM SOLO actualziar....
