                                Dim strLines As String() = texto.Split(New [Char]() {CChar(vbCrLf)}).Select((Function(s) s.Trim)).ToArray()

                                'Solo asegurar es valido
                                If strLines.Length > 0 Then


                                    'OBTENER NUMERO DE PARTE
                                    Dim line1 As String()

                                    If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                        line1 = strLines(1).Trim.Split(",")
                                    Else
                                        line1 = strLines(0).Trim.Split(",")
                                    End If

                                    'OBTENER SIDE
                                    If line1(0).Substring(8, 1) = "A" Then
                                        line1(0) = line1(0).Substring(0, 8) + line1(0).Substring(9, 5) + "A"
                                    End If

                                    If line1(0).Substring(8, 1) = "B" Then
                                        line1(0) = line1(0).Substring(0, 8) + line1(0).Substring(9, 5) + "B"
                                    End If

                                    Dim partnumber As String = line1(0).Substring(0, 13).Replace("_", "-")

                                    Dim found = dt_PartNumbersAvailables.Select("PartNumber='" & line1(0).Substring(0, 3).Replace("_", "-") & "'")

                                    Try
                                        found = dt_PartNumbersAvailables.Select("PartNumber='" & partnumber & "'")
                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                    End Try

                                    If PreviousPartNumber <> partnumber Then
                                        Dim resultado = Load_PartNumber(True, partnumber)
                                        If resultado = False Then
                                            PreviousPartNumber = ""
                                            Exit Sub
                                        Else
                                            PreviousPartNumber = partnumber
                                        End If
                                    Else
                                        PreviousPartNumber = partnumber
                                    End If

                                    If found.Length > 0 Then
                                        'Obtener partID
                                        Dim partid As Integer = found(0).Item("PartID")

                                        Dim ifGoodUnlockUnit As Boolean = True
                                        'Check if unlock

                                        Dim dtDisableUnlock As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [AutoID] FROM [Quality_Inspection_AOI_ChangeStatus_DisableOK] where partid='" & partid & "' and areaid='" & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & "'")

                                        If dtDisableUnlock.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                            ifGoodUnlockUnit = False
                                        End If

                                        Dim sideid As String = "A"
                                        If line1(0).Length > 13 Then
                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(13, 1)
                                        End If
                                        If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(5, 1)
                                            If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                                sideid = "A"
                                            End If
                                        End If

                                        Dim arraqty As Integer

                                        If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                            arraqty = strLines(4).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        Else
                                            arraqty = strLines(3).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        End If

                                        'Fecha
                                        Dim line2 As String()

                                        If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                            line2 = strLines(2).Trim.Split(",")

                                        Else
                                            line2 = strLines(1).Trim.Split(",")

                                        End If

                                        Dim Fecha As DateTime = DateTime.Now

                                        'DEFINE LINE
                                        Dim linea As Integer = StationID
                                        Dim AOIID As Integer = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID

                                        'BARCODE Panel
                                        Dim codigossn As String = ""

                                        Dim line3 As String

                                        If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                            line3 = strLines(3).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        Else
                                            line3 = strLines(2).Trim.Split(",")(0)
                                        End If

                                        If chReworkAOI.Checked Then

                                            'Check for serial Numbers 

                                            ExData.WAVE_AOIREWORK_SSN = ""

                                            Dim frmSerial As New frm_WAVE_aoirework

                                            frmSerial.ShowDialog()

                                            If ExData.WAVE_AOIREWORK_SSN = "" Then


                                            Else

                                                Dim dtLockPosition As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [PartID],[CirRef],[ContainsText],DefectCodeID  FROM [Quality_Inspection_AOI_ChangeStatus] WHERE partid='" & partid & "'")

                                                codigossn = line3

                                                'Estado del panel
                                                Dim IsGood As Boolean = True

                                                'Para ver cuales faltan (son buenos)
                                                Dim malos As New List(Of Integer)

                                                Dim cancelar As Boolean = False

                                                'BUSCO 'Seriales begin para comenzar... hasta seriaales end'
                                                'Genero la tabla de seriales
                                                Dim dt_seriales As New DataTable("Seriales")
                                                dt_seriales.Columns.Add("ID", GetType(System.Int32))
                                                dt_seriales.Columns.Add("Serie", GetType(System.String))
                                                dt_seriales.Columns.Add("IsGood", GetType(System.Boolean))
                                                dt_seriales.Columns.Add("IsSSN", GetType(System.Boolean))

                                                Dim index = 0
                                                Dim filafinal As Integer = 1

                                                Dim firstrow As Integer = 6

                                                If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                                    firstrow = 6
                                                Else
                                                    firstrow = 5
                                                End If

                                                For unitmala As Integer = firstrow To strLines.Length - 1
                                                    Dim datos As String() = strLines(unitmala).Split(",")
                                                    Dim sn As String = datos(0)
                                                    If sn = "SerialesBegin" Then
                                                        'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                        For fila As Integer = unitmala + 1 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                            Dim datosfila As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                            If datosfila(0) = "SerialesEnd" Then
                                                                filafinal = fila
                                                                Exit For
                                                            ElseIf datosfila(1) = "NO_BARCODE_READ" Then
                                                                sn = codigossn & "_" & index + 1
                                                                index += 1
                                                                dt_seriales.Rows.Add(datosfila(0), sn, True, False)
                                                            Else
                                                                sn = datosfila(1)
                                                                index += 1
                                                                dt_seriales.Rows.Add(datosfila(0), sn, True, True) 'OBTENGO SERIAL NO
                                                            End If
                                                        Next
                                                        Exit For
                                                    End If
                                                Next

                                                Dim listdefects As New List(Of String)

                                                For unitmala As Integer = filafinal To strLines.Length - 1
                                                    Dim datost As String() = strLines(unitmala).Split(",")
                                                    Dim snt As String = datost(0)
                                                    If snt = "DefectosBegin" Then
                                                        'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                        For fila As Integer = unitmala + 1 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                            Dim datosd As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                            Dim snfila As String = datosd(0)
                                                            If snfila = "DefectosEnd" Then
                                                                filafinal = fila
                                                                Exit For
                                                            Else
                                                                Dim datos As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                                Dim posicion As Integer = datos(5)
                                                                Dim sn As String = datos(4)
                                                                Dim issn As Boolean = True
                                                                If sn = "NO_BARCODE_READ" Then
                                                                    issn = False
                                                                    sn = codigossn & "_" & posicion
                                                                End If


                                                                IsGood = False

                                                                Dim selectwithdefects() = dt_seriales.Select("ID='" & posicion & "'")

                                                                If selectwithdefects.Length > 0 Then
                                                                    For i As Integer = 0 To selectwithdefects.Length - 1
                                                                        selectwithdefects(i)("IsGood") = False
                                                                    Next
                                                                End If

                                                                dt_seriales.AcceptChanges()

                                                                Dim location As String = datos(0).Trim ' Or RefCir
                                                                Dim machineerro As String = datos(2).Trim 'AOI ERROR
                                                                Dim usererror As String = datos(3).Trim 'User Error

                                                                Dim xmisfit As Double = 0
                                                                Dim ymisfit As Double = 0


                                                                If IsNumeric(datos(9).Trim) Then
                                                                    xmisfit = CDbl(datos(9).Trim)
                                                                End If

                                                                If IsNumeric(datos(10).Trim) Then
                                                                    ymisfit = CDbl(datos(10).Trim)
                                                                End If

                                                                Dim xpos As Double = 0
                                                                Dim ypos As Double = 0

                                                                If IsNumeric(datos(7).Trim) Then
                                                                    xpos = CDbl(datos(7).Trim)
                                                                End If

                                                                If IsNumeric(datos(8).Trim) Then
                                                                    ypos = CDbl(datos(8).Trim)
                                                                End If

                                                                Dim usersel As Boolean = False
                                                                If usererror = "PASS" Or usererror = "False Alarm" Then
                                                                    usersel = True
                                                                End If

                                                                Dim isduplicate As Boolean = False

                                                                Dim defectstring As String = posicion & sn & location & machineerro & usererror

                                                                If Not listdefects.Contains(defectstring) Then
                                                                    listdefects.Add(defectstring)
                                                                Else
                                                                    isduplicate = True
                                                                End If

                                                                If posicion = 0 Then
                                                                    cancelar = True
                                                                    Exit For
                                                                Else

                                                                    '2022-04-22 ReQUEST BY RICHARD
                                                                    'REMOVE Sub component errors<<<<
                                                                    If machineerro.Contains("Sub component errors") Or isduplicate Then
                                                                        'Ignorar 
                                                                    Else
                                                                        If malos.Contains(posicion) Then

                                                                        Else
                                                                            'Es la primera vez...
                                                                            malos.Add(posicion)

                                                                        End If
                                                                    End If
                                                                End If
                                                            End If
                                                        Next
                                                        Exit For
                                                    End If
                                                Next

                                                If IsGood Then

                                                    'QA Rework OK...
                                                    ReworkQA(ExData.WAVE_AOIREWORK_SSN, True)

                                                End If
                                            End If


                                            Try
                                                File.Delete(sFile)
                                            Catch ex As Exception

                                            End Try
                                        Else
                                            Dim dtLockPosition As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT [PartID],[CirRef],[ContainsText],DefectCodeID  FROM [Quality_Inspection_AOI_ChangeStatus] WHERE partid='" & partid & "'")

                                            If line3 = "NO_BARCODE_READ" Then
                                                'Search index in line 3

                                                Dim counter As Integer = 0

                                                Dim Sql_counter As String = "Select counter from Machines_Extractor_AOI_Programs where partid='" & partid & "' and aoiid='" & AOIID & "' and side='" & sideid & "'"
                                                Dim command_counter As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(Sql_counter, Connection) 'Aqui ejecutamos el comando 
                                                Dim dt_counter As New DataTable
                                                Dim adpt_counter As New Data.SqlClient.SqlDataAdapter(command_counter)
                                                Try
                                                    Connection.Open()
                                                    adpt_counter.Fill(dt_counter)
                                                Catch ex As Exception

                                                Finally
                                                    Connection.Close()
                                                End Try

                                                If dt_counter.Rows.Count > 0 Then

                                                    counter = dt_counter.Rows(0).Item(0) + 1
                                                    Dim sql_insert As String = "UPDATE Machines_Extractor_AOI_Programs SET counter='" & counter & "'  where partid='" & partid & "' and aoiid='" & AOIID & "' and side='" & sideid & "'"
                                                    Dim command_insert As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_insert, Connection)
                                                    Try
                                                        Connection.Open()
                                                        command_insert.ExecuteNonQuery()
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    Finally
                                                        Connection.Close()
                                                    End Try
                                                Else
                                                    counter = 1
                                                    'Agregamos noparte a base de datos.
                                                    Dim sql_insert As String = "INSERT INTO Machines_Extractor_AOI_Programs ([AOIID] ,[ProgramName] ,[ArrQty] ,[PartID] ,[Side] ,[Counter]) VALUES ('" & AOIID & "','','" & arraqty & "','" & partid & "','" & sideid & "','1')"
                                                    Dim command_insert As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_insert, Connection)
                                                    Try
                                                        Connection.Open()
                                                        command_insert.ExecuteNonQuery()
                                                    Catch ex As Exception

                                                    Finally
                                                        Connection.Close()
                                                    End Try
                                                End If
                                                codigossn = partid & "_pnl_" & AOIID & "_" & counter
                                            Else
                                                codigossn = line3
                                            End If

                                            'Estado del panel
                                            Dim IsGood As Boolean = True

                                            'Para ver cuales faltan (son buenos)
                                            Dim malos As New List(Of Integer)

                                            Dim cancelar As Boolean = False

                                            'BUSCO 'Seriales begin para comenzar... hasta seriaales end'
                                            'Genero la tabla de seriales
                                            Dim dt_seriales As New DataTable("Seriales")
                                            dt_seriales.Columns.Add("ID", GetType(System.Int32))
                                            dt_seriales.Columns.Add("Serie", GetType(System.String))
                                            dt_seriales.Columns.Add("IsGood", GetType(System.Boolean))
                                            dt_seriales.Columns.Add("IsSSN", GetType(System.Boolean))

                                            Dim index = 0
                                            Dim filafinal As Integer = 1

                                            Dim firstrow As Integer = 6

                                            If strLines(6) = "" Then
                                                firstrow = 6
                                            Else
                                                firstrow = 5
                                            End If

                                            For unitmala As Integer = firstrow To strLines.Length - 1
                                                Dim datos As String() = strLines(unitmala).Split(",")
                                                Dim sn As String = datos(0)
                                                If sn = "SerialesBegin" Then
                                                    'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                    For fila As Integer = unitmala + 1 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                        Dim datosfila As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                        If datosfila(0) = "SerialesEnd" Then
                                                            filafinal = fila
                                                            Exit For
                                                        ElseIf datosfila(1) = "NO_BARCODE_READ" Then
                                                            sn = codigossn & "_" & index + 1
                                                            index += 1
                                                            dt_seriales.Rows.Add(datosfila(0), sn, True, False)
                                                        Else
                                                            sn = datosfila(1)
                                                            index += 1
                                                            dt_seriales.Rows.Add(datosfila(0), sn, True, True) 'OBTENGO SERIAL NO
                                                        End If
                                                    Next
                                                    Exit For
                                                End If
                                            Next

                                            Dim listdefects As New List(Of String)

                                            For unitmala As Integer = filafinal To strLines.Length - 1
                                                Dim datost As String() = strLines(unitmala).Split(",")
                                                Dim snt As String = datost(0)
                                                If snt = "DefectosBegin" Then
                                                    'De la fila siguiente hasta 
                                                    For fila As Integer = unitmala + 1 To strLines.Length - 1
                                                        Dim datosd As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                        Dim snfila As String = datosd(0)
                                                        If snfila = "DefectosEnd" Then
                                                            filafinal = fila
                                                            Exit For
                                                        Else
                                                            Dim datos As String() = strLines(fila).Split(",")
                                                            Dim posicion As Integer = datos(5)
                                                            Dim sn As String = datos(4)
                                                            Dim issn As Boolean = True
                                                            If sn = "NO_BARCODE_READ" Then
                                                                issn = False
                                                                sn = codigossn & "_" & posicion
                                                            End If

                                                            Dim selectwithdefects() = dt_seriales.Select("ID='" & posicion & "'")

                                                            If selectwithdefects.Length > 0 Then
                                                                For i As Integer = 0 To selectwithdefects.Length - 1
                                                                    selectwithdefects(i)("IsGood") = False
                                                                Next
                                                            End If

                                                            dt_seriales.AcceptChanges()

                                                            Dim location As String = datos(0).Trim ' Or RefCir
                                                            Dim machineerro As String = datos(2).Trim 'AOI ERROR
                                                            Dim usererror As String = datos(3).Trim 'User Error

                                                            Dim xmisfit As Double = 0
                                                            Dim ymisfit As Double = 0


                                                            If IsNumeric(datos(9).Trim) Then
                                                                xmisfit = CDbl(datos(9).Trim)
                                                            End If

                                                            If IsNumeric(datos(10).Trim) Then
                                                                ymisfit = CDbl(datos(10).Trim)
                                                            End If

                                                            Dim xpos As Double = 0
                                                            Dim ypos As Double = 0

                                                            If IsNumeric(datos(7).Trim) Then
                                                                xpos = CDbl(datos(7).Trim)
                                                            End If

                                                            If IsNumeric(datos(8).Trim) Then
                                                                ypos = CDbl(datos(8).Trim)
                                                            End If

                                                            Dim usersel As Boolean = False
                                                            If usererror = "PASS" Or usererror = "False Alarm" Then
                                                                usersel = True
                                                            End If

                                                            Dim isduplicate As Boolean = False

                                                            Dim defectstring As String = posicion & sn & location & machineerro & usererror

                                                            If Not listdefects.Contains(defectstring) Then
                                                                listdefects.Add(defectstring)
                                                            Else
                                                                isduplicate = True
                                                            End If

                                                            If posicion = 0 Then
                                                                cancelar = True
                                                                Exit For
                                                            Else

                                                                '2022-04-22 ReQUEST BY RICHARD
                                                                'REMOVE Sub component errors<<<<
                                                                If machineerro.Contains("Sub component errors") Or isduplicate Then
                                                                    'Ignorar 
                                                                Else

                                                                    Dim isRework As Boolean = False

                                                                    If malos.Contains(posicion) Then
                                                                        isRework = True
                                                                    End If

                                                                    Dim insertParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                           {
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = sn},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@AOIID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = AOIID},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = StationID},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = partid},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Side", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = sideid},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Trndate", SqlDbType.DateTime) With {.Value = Fecha.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss")},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = False},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@IsRework", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = isRework},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@RefCir", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = location},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectDesc", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = machineerro},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@UserPass", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = usersel},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@UserDesc", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = usererror},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Position", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = posicion},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Xmisfit", SqlDbType.Real) With {.Value = xmisfit},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Ymisfit", SqlDbType.Real) With {.Value = ymisfit},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Xpos", SqlDbType.Real) With {.Value = xpos},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Ypos", SqlDbType.Real) With {.Value = ypos}
                                                                           }

                                                                    'Significa que ya la agregamos
                                                                    Dim sql_insert As String = "INSERT INTO [dbo].[Machines_Extractor_AOI_Data] (SN,AOIID,StationID,PartID,Side,Trndate,IsGood,IsRework,RefCir,DefectDesc,UserPass,UserDesc,Position,Xmisfit,Ymisfit,Xpos,Ypos)  VALUES  (@SN,@AOIID,@StationID,@PartID,@Side,@Trndate,@IsGood,@IsRework,@RefCir,@DefectDesc,@UserPass,@UserDesc,@Position,@Xmisfit,@Ymisfit,@Xpos,@Ypos)"
                                                                    Dim command_insert As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_insert, Connection)
                                                                    command_insert.Parameters.Clear()
                                                                    command_insert.Parameters.AddRange(insertParameter)
                                                                    Try
                                                                        Connection.Open()
                                                                        command_insert.ExecuteNonQuery()
                                                                    Catch ex As Exception
                                                                    Finally
                                                                        command_insert.Parameters.Clear()
                                                                        Connection.Close()
                                                                    End Try

                                                                    If dtLockPosition.Rows.Count > 0 And issn Then
                                                                        Dim foundDefects = dtLockPosition.Select("CirRef='" & location.Trim & "'")
                                                                        If foundDefects.Length > 0 Then
                                                                            For Each row In foundDefects
                                                                                If machineerro.Contains(row.Item("ContainsText")) Then
                                                                                    Dim insertQAParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                                           {
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@PartNo", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = line1(0).Substring(0, 13).Replace("_", "-")},
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = sn},
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@ControlID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = -1},
                                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Comments", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName & " AOI BAD " & machineerro & " " & location.Trim}
                                                                                           }

                                                                                    BeConn.InsertRecords("INSERT INTO [dbo].[QA_tbl_lockunitspvs] (PartNo,SN,TrnDate,ControlID,Comments)  VALUES (@PartNo,@SN,GETDATE(),@ControlID,@Comments)", insertQAParameter)

                                                                                    Exit For
                                                                                End If
                                                                            Next
                                                                        End If
                                                                    End If
                                                                End If
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    Next
                                                    Exit For
                                                End If
                                            Next

                                            'Para piezas buenas
                                            If cancelar = False Then
                                                For j As Integer = 1 To arraqty
                                                    If malos.Contains(j) Then
                                                        'si lo contiene, entonces ya se agrego
                                                    Else
                                                        'Si no lo contiene es porque es buena
                                                        Dim sn As String = dt_seriales.Rows(j - 1).Item(1)

                                                        Dim insertParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                           {
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = sn},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@AOIID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = AOIID},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@StationID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = StationID},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = partid},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Side", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = sideid},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Trndate", SqlDbType.DateTime) With {.Value = Fecha.ToString("MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss")},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@IsGood", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = True},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@IsRework", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = False},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@RefCir", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = Location},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@DefectDesc", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ""},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@UserPass", SqlDbType.Bit) With {.Value = False},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@UserDesc", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ""},
                                                                                New SqlParameter("@Position", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = j}
                                                                           }

                                                        'Significa que ya la agregamos
                                                        Dim sql_insert As String = "INSERT INTO [dbo].[Machines_Extractor_AOI_Data] (SN,AOIID,StationID,PartID,Side,Trndate,IsGood,IsRework,RefCir,DefectDesc,UserPass,UserDesc,Position)  VALUES  (@SN,@AOIID,@StationID,@PartID,@Side,@Trndate,@IsGood,@IsRework,@RefCir,@DefectDesc,@UserPass,@UserDesc,@Position)"
                                                        Dim command_insert As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql_insert, Connection)
                                                        command_insert.Parameters.Clear()
                                                        command_insert.Parameters.AddRange(insertParameter)
                                                        Try
                                                            Connection.Open()
                                                            command_insert.ExecuteNonQuery()
                                                        Catch ex As Exception
                                                        Finally
                                                            command_insert.Parameters.Clear()
                                                            Connection.Close()
                                                        End Try

                                                    End If
                                                Next
                                            End If

                                            Try
                                                File.Delete(sFile)
                                            Catch ex As Exception
                                                'File.Delete(sFile)
                                            End Try

                                            For Each rowSSN As DataRow In dt_seriales.Rows
                                                If rowSSN.Item("IsSSN") Then
                                                    enviarssn(rowSSN.Item("Serie"), DateTime.Now(), ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID, StationID, rowSSN.Item("IsGood"), 1, True, True, False, "")

                                                    If rowSSN.Item("IsGood") And ifGoodUnlockUnit Then
                                                        Dim deleteQAParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                                                                {
                                                                    New SqlParameter("@SN", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = rowSSN.Item("Serie")},
                                                                    New SqlParameter("@Comments", SqlDbType.NVarChar) With {.Value = ExData.Selected_Area.AreaName & " AOI BAD"}
                                                                }

                                                        BeConn.UpdateRecords("DELETE FROM [dbo].[QA_tbl_lockunitspvs] WHERE SN=@SN AND [Comments] LIKE @Comments +'%' ", deleteQAParameter)
                                                    End If
                                                End If
                                            Next
                                        End If
                                    Else

                                    End If
                                End If
                            Catch ex As Exception

                                'If System.IO.File.Exists(Path & "\Error" & sFile.Substring(Path.Length)) Then
                                '    System.IO.File.Delete(Path & "\Error" & sFile.Substring(Path.Length))
                                'End If
                                'File.Move(sFile, Path & "\Error" & sFile.Substring(Path.Length))
                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next

                    'REMOVE TST FILES
                    Dim filestst() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(Path, "*.TXT")

                    For Each sFile As String In filestst
                        If sFile.Contains("_" & SearchName & "_") Then
                            Try
                                File.Delete(sFile)
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            Next
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Function Load_PartNumber(extracto As Boolean, Optional pn As String = "", Optional pn_partid As Integer = -1, Optional bin As Integer = -1, Optional job As Integer = -1) As Boolean
        Dim resultado As Boolean = True
        Dim sel As Integer = 0

        Dim pnParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
                   {
                        New SqlParameter("@partid", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = pn_partid},
                        New SqlParameter("@partnumber", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = pn}
                   }

        Dim dt0 As DataTable = BeConn.GetDt("SELECT partnumber,partid FROM [CS_idt_partnumbers] where partid=@partid or partnumber=@partnumber", pnParameter)

        If dt0.Rows.Count > 0 Then
            pn = dt0.Rows(0).Item(0)
            pn_partid = dt0.Rows(0).Item(1)

            If extracto = True Then
                tmr_extractor.Stop()
                sel = 1
                ExData.Selected_Area.CasillaReset(sel)
                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = sel

                Dim frmisOPen As Boolean = False

                For Each frm As Form In Application.OpenForms
                    If frm.Name = "frm_WAVE_jobSelection" Then
                        frmisOPen = True
                    End If
                Next

                If frmisOPen = False Then
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection(pn, bin, job, True)
                    options.ShowDialog()

                    refreshdata(sel)

                    If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartNumber <> pn Then
                        resultado = False
                    Else

                        tmr_extractor.Start()
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                sel = 1
                ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation = 1

                If ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation6 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation5 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation4 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation3 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 > 0 Or ExData.Selected_Area.SubStation2 > 1 Then
                    Dim optionssel = New frm_a_d_casillaPositionSelect
                    optionssel.ShowDialog()
                End If

                sel = ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation


                ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = ExData.Selected_Area.WAVE_last_substation

                Dim unload As Boolean = False
                If ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And Data_From_Extractor = False Then
                    Select Case sel
                        Case 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 2
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 3
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 4
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 5
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                        Case 6
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count > 0 Then
                                Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show("There is material pending to transact in PLEX. Would do you continue? / Existe material pendiente de transaccionar en PLEX, deseas continuar?", "PLEX TRANSACTION", MessageBoxButtons.YesNoCancel)
                                If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                                    unload = True
                                End If
                            Else
                                unload = True
                            End If
                    End Select
                Else
                    unload = True
                End If

                If unload Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Selected_CasillaToLoad = sel
                    Dim options = New frm_WAVE_jobSelection(pn, bin, job)
                    options.ShowDialog()
                    refreshdata(sel)

                    Select Case sel
                        Case 1
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 2
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla2.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 3
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla3.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 4
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla4.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 5
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla5.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                        Case 6
                            If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla6.PartID <> pn_partid Then
                                resultado = False
                            End If
                    End Select
                End If

            End If
        Else
            resultado = False
        End If



        Return resultado
    End Function

    Private Sub DataReceivedHandler(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadExisting()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then
            'sensor1 = False
            sensor1_active = False
        Else
            sensor1_active = True
            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()
            Try
                If Incoming_Text.Length > 0 Then
                    If Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 1 Then
                        Try
                            If Math.Abs(DateDiff(DateInterval.Minute, DateTime.Now, lastunit_date)) < 120 Then
                                sensor1 = True
                            Else
                                sensor1 = False
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                    ElseIf Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 0 Then
                        sensor1 = False
                    End If
                Else
                    'sensor1 = False
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                sensor1 = False
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub DataReceivedHandler_Scanner(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs)
        Dim sp As SerialPort = CType(sender, SerialPort)
        Dim Incoming As String = sp.ReadExisting()
        If Incoming Is Nothing Then

            'sensor1_active = False
        Else

            Dim Incoming_Text As String = Incoming.Trim()
            Try

                    If Incoming_Text.Substring(0, 1) = 1 Then
                        Try
                            If Math.Abs(DateDiff(DateInterval.Minute, DateTime.Now, lastunit_date)) < 120 Then
                                sensor1 = True
                            Else
                                sensor1 = False
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try

                        sensor1 = False
                    End If
                Else
                    'sensor1 = False
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

    End Sub


    Private sensor1 As Boolean = False
    Private sensor1_active As Boolean = False
    Private downtime_new As Boolean = False

    Private Sub tmr_sensors_dw_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_sensors_dw.Tick
        If ExData.Selected_Area.StationID_Downtime_Sensors Then
            If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ.IsOpen = False Then
                'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Red
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.Red
            Else
                If sensor1_active Then
                    'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Lime
                    sensor1_active = False
                Else
                    'pnl_sensorsdw.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If
            End If
            If sensor1 Then
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.Lime
                ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
                If x_use = False Then
                    x_use = True
                    x = 0
                    lbl_timer.Text = GetTime(0)
                    lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Black
                    ExData.Selected_Area.DTCodeID = 80
                    ExData.Selected_Area.LastPiece = DateTime.Now()
                    downtime_new = False
                End If
            Else
                pnl_dw_status.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
                lbl_timer.ForeColor = Color.Red

                If x Mod 15 = 0 And x_use = False And downtime_new = True Then
                    x_use = True
                    revisarDWt()
                End If

                If downtime_new = False Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = True
                    frm_a_d_downtime.ShowDialog(Me)
                    downtime_new = True
                    ExData.Selected_Area.IsActive = False
                End If
            End If
        Else
            tmr_sensors_dw.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Async Sub btn_process1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btn_process1.Click
        If btn_process1.Enabled And ExData.Selected_Area.DS_Record_Production_Record.Contains("," & ExData.Selected_Area.AreaID & ",") And ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.PackoutStage = False Then
            Dim alltransaction As Boolean = True

            If ExData.CONF_Plex_Recursive_Transactions = False Then
                alltransaction = False
            End If

            Await BePlex.Do_Transaction_RecursiveAsync(alltransaction, True, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Selected, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Building_Key, If(ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobType = 1, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.JobNumber, ""), ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales, txt_pendientesplex1.Text)

            Try
                ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Clear()
                txt_pendientesplex1.Text = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Seriales.Rows.Count
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            ExFunctions.updateplexinfo(ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Selected, False, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Workcenter_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Part_No, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.DS_Operation_Code, ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.Plex_Serials.Quantity, lbl_wk1, lbl_pnplex1, lbl_plexop1, Nothing, lbl_plexjob1)
        End If

        ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.UpdateComparation(dt_vs1)
    End Sub

#Region "Keyence SR700"

    '========================
    'SCANNER KEYENCE SR700

    Dim var_stageid As Integer = 0
    Dim escanead_correcto As Boolean = False
    Dim estuvo_mal As Boolean = False '2020-01-26 EM: USE TO CATCH BAD BOARD FROM AOI...



    Private Sub cbAutoScanner_CheckedChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cbAutoScanner.CheckedChanged
        If cbAutoScanner.Checked Then
            Try
                'LOAD COMS
                CONF_SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner()

                var_stageid = 0

                tmr_io.Start()
                tmr_coms.Start()
                ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        Else
            ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = False

            If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
            End If
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub tmr_io_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_io.Tick
        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then

            'Read_DB9_Values()
        Else
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Dim scannerold As String = ""
    Public Property VerifyValidation As Integer

    Private Sub tmr_coms_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmr_coms.Tick
        If ExData.port_scanner_usage_in = True Then
            Select Case var_stageid
                Case 0
                    If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                        SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = True 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS

                        var_stageid = 1
                    End If
                Case 1
                    Try
                        '-- TRY READ DATA
                        Dim readed As Boolean = False
                        Dim serial_ssn As String = ""
                        If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                            Dim serial As String = SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.ReadExisting
                            If serial.Length > 10 Then
                                serial_ssn = serial.Trim
                                lblscanner.Text = serial_ssn
                                readed = True
                            End If
                        End If

                        If readed Then
                            'TURN OFF CAMERAS
                            If scannerold <> serial_ssn Then

                                If SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.IsOpen Then
                                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_READ_scanner.DtrEnable = False 'OFF TRIGGER CAMERAS
                                End If

                                var_stageid = 2

                                scannerold = serial_ssn
                                txt_serial.Text = serial_ssn
                                btn_Add.PerformClick()
                            Else

                            End If
                        End If
                    Catch ex As Exception

                    End Try
                Case 2
                    'DO Nothing UNtil 

            End Select
        Else
            tmr_io.Stop()
            tmr_coms.Stop()
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub chReworkAOI_CheckedChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles chReworkAOI.CheckedChanged

        'Delete all files in AOI...

        If Data_From_Extractor_Type = 14 Then
            Dim ConnectionString As String = BeConn.GetString("SELECT [Result] FROM [CF_idt_defaults] where Description='DataBase_Machines'")
            Dim Connection As New System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection(ConnectionString)

            For Each aoimachine As DataRow In dt_Extractors.Rows

                Dim directoriolecturaGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim directoriosuccessGood As String = aoimachine.Item("Directory")
                Dim StationID As Integer = aoimachine.Item("StationID")

                Dim SearchName As String = aoimachine.Item("MachineName")

                Dim Path As String = directoriolecturaGood
                Dim PathSuccess As String = directoriosuccessGood


                If IO.Directory.Exists(Path) Then
                    Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(Path, "*.TST")
                    Dim texto As String = ""

                    For Each sFile As String In files

                        Dim blnIgnoreFiles As Boolean = True

                        If sFile.Contains("_" & SearchName & "_") Then
                            blnIgnoreFiles = False
                        End If

                        If blnIgnoreFiles Then

                        Else
                            texto = IO.File.ReadAllText(sFile)

                            Try
                                File.Delete(sFile)
                            Catch ex As Exception

                            End Try
                        End If
                    Next
                End If
            Next
        End If



    End Sub

    Private Sub lblpanel1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles lblpanel1.Click
        If Data_From_Extractor = False Then
            ' Get current state before changing
            Dim currentState As Boolean = ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.isByPanel
            Dim fromText As String = If(currentState, "Panel", "No Panel")
            Dim toText As String = If(currentState, "No Panel", "Panel")

            ' Ask for confirmation
            Dim confirmMessage As String = $"Are you sure you want to change from '{fromText}' to '{toText}'?"
            Dim result As DialogResult = MessageBox.Show(confirmMessage, "Confirm Change", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question)

            If result = DialogResult.Yes Then
                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.isByPanel Then
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.isByPanel = False
                Else
                    ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.isByPanel = True
                End If

                If ExData.Selected_Area.Casilla1.isByPanel Then
                    lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel
                    lblpanel1.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel
                Else
                    lblPiezaActual.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
                    lblpanel1.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

                    lblpanel6.Text = My.Resources.Messages.scan_panel_no
                End If
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

#Region "TCPSettings"

    Dim smb_Usernames As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
    Dim smb_Passwords As New Dictionary(Of Integer, String)
#End Region

#Region "SMB Credential API Declarations"
    ' Win32 API for network authentication
    Private Declare Function WNetAddConnection2 Lib "mpr.dll" Alias "WNetAddConnection2A" _
        (ByRef lpNetResource As NETRESOURCE, ByVal lpPassword As String, ByVal lpUsername As String, ByVal dwFlags As Integer) As Integer

    Private Declare Function WNetCancelConnection2 Lib "mpr.dll" Alias "WNetCancelConnection2A" _
        (ByVal lpName As String, ByVal dwFlags As Integer, ByVal fForce As Integer) As Integer

    <StructLayout(LayoutKind.Sequential)>
    Private Structure NETRESOURCE
        Public dwScope As Integer
        Public dwType As Integer
        Public dwDisplayType As Integer
        Public dwUsage As Integer
        Public lpLocalName As String
        Public lpRemoteName As String
        Public lpComment As String
        Public lpProvider As String
    End Structure

    Private Const RESOURCETYPE_DISK As Integer = &H1
    Private Const CONNECT_UPDATE_PROFILE As Integer = &H1

    ' Helper function to decrypt password (simple implementation - enhance as needed)
    Private Function DecryptPassword(encryptedBytes As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(encryptedBytes) OrElse encryptedBytes Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        End If

        Try
            Dim bytes As Byte() = CType(encryptedBytes, Byte())
            If bytes.Length = 0 Then Return ""

            ' TODO: Implement proper decryption if passwords are encrypted
            ' For now, assuming plain text stored as bytes
            Return System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetString(bytes)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("Password decryption error: " & ex.Message)
            Return ""
        End Try
    End Function

    ' Connect to SMB share with credentials
    Private Function ConnectSMB(remotePath As String, username As String, password As String, domain As String) As Boolean
        Try
            ' If no credentials provided, use current Windows credentials
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(username) AndAlso String.IsNullOrEmpty(password) Then
                Return True
            End If

            ' Extract the share path (without file path)
            Dim uri As New Uri(remotePath)
            Dim sharePath As String = "\\" & uri.Host & uri.LocalPath.Split("\"c)(0)

            ' Prepare username with domain if provided
            Dim fullUsername As String = username
            If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(domain) Then
                fullUsername = domain & "\" & username
            End If

            ' Create network resource structure
            Dim netResource As New NETRESOURCE()
            netResource.dwType = RESOURCETYPE_DISK
            netResource.lpRemoteName = sharePath

            ' Attempt connection
            Dim result As Integer = WNetAddConnection2(netResource, password, fullUsername, 0)

            If result = 0 Then
                Return True ' Success
            ElseIf result = 1219 Then
                ' Already connected - this is OK
                Return True
            Else
                Debug.WriteLine($"SMB connection failed with error code: {result}")
                Return False
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("ConnectSMB error: " & ex.Message)
            Return False
        End Try
    End Function

    ' Disconnect from SMB share
    Private Sub DisconnectSMB(remotePath As String)
        Try
            Dim uri As New Uri(remotePath)
            Dim sharePath As String = "\\" & uri.Host & uri.LocalPath.Split("\"c)(0)
            WNetCancelConnection2(sharePath, 0, 1)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("DisconnectSMB error: " & ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub CONF_SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET() 'SALIDA DE SENALES
        'READ CONFIGURATION IF EXIST

        Try
            productName = System.Reflection.Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().GetName().Name
        Catch ex As Exception

        '◘ Create directory

        If My.Computer.FileSystem.DirectoryExists(confDir) Then

        Else

            Try
                Dim ToHideDir As New System.IO.DirectoryInfo(confDir)
                ToHideDir.Attributes = IO.FileAttributes.Hidden
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        End If

        'Hide folder
        Dim fileName As String = confDir & "\" & productName & "_COMARDUINO.txt"
        ExData.port_file = fileName

        '◘ Read File (Configuration)
        If My.Computer.FileSystem.FileExists(fileName) Then
            'Read current settings
            Dim readText() As String = File.ReadAllLines(fileName)
            Dim s As String
            For Each s In readText
                'Read if sline is valid
                If s.Length > 1 Then
                    'Check if a variable
                    If s.Substring(0, 1) = "@" Then
                        Dim variables() = s.Substring(1).Split("^")
                        Select Case variables(0)
                            Case "port_com_port1"
                                ExData.port_com_port1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_baud1"
                                ExData.port_com_baud1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_parity1"
                                ExData.port_com_parity1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_data1"
                                ExData.port_com_data1 = variables(1)
                            Case "port_com_stop1"
                                ExData.port_com_stop1 = variables(1)
                        End Select
                    End If
                End If
            Next

            'Build and show ports...
            'txtcom1.Text = ExData.port_com_port1

            'LOAD PORTS....
            Try
                If ExData.port_com_port1.Contains("COM") Then
                    If SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.IsOpen Then
                        Try
                            'RemoveHandler sp1.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg1
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try
                        SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.Close()
                    End If
                    'AddHandler sp1.PinChanged, AddressOf PinChg1
                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.PortName = ExData.port_com_port1
                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.BaudRate = CInt(ExData.port_com_baud1)
                    SERIAL_ARDUINO_SET.Open()

                    'pnl_sensornozzle.BackColor = Color.Lime
                Else
                    'pnl_sensornozzle.BackColor = Color.DarkGray
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                'pnl_sensornozzle.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try

            'If txtcom1.Text.Contains("COM") Then
            '    tmr_tryconnect.Start()
            'End If

        Else

            ExData.port_com_port1 = "No Configurate"
            ExData.port_com_baud1 = "9600"
            ExData.port_com_parity1 = "Even"
            ExData.port_com_data1 = "8"
            ExData.port_com_stop1 = "1"

            'TRY SAVE FILE
